<!-- Google Tag Manager -->
<script>
(function () {
  if (window.__GTM_LOADED__) return;
  window.__GTM_LOADED__ = true;

  (function(w,d,s,l,i){
    w[l]=w[l]||[];
    w[l].push({'gtm.start': new Date().getTime(), event:'gtm.js'});

    var f=d.getElementsByTagName(s)[0],
        j=d.createElement(s),
        dl=l!='dataLayer'?'&l='+l:'';

    j.async=true;
    j.src='https://gtm.jfrog.com/gtm.js?id='+i+dl;
    f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f);

<!-- End Google Tag Manager -->

<script>
    (function () {
        // Only run on the absolute root of the portal
        var isRoot = location.pathname === "/" && !location.search && !location.hash;
        if (!isRoot) return;

        var d = document.documentElement;

        // Hide immediately (before paint)
        d.classList.add("rm-root-prehide");

        // Reveal after 0.5s
        window.setTimeout(function () {
            d.classList.add("rm-root-ready");
            d.classList.remove("rm-root-prehide");
        }, 300);
    })();
</script>

<style>
    /* ROOT-only prehide (gated by class) */
    html.rm-root-prehide,
    html.rm-root-prehide body {
        background: #000 !important;
    }

    html.rm-root-prehide body {
        opacity: 0 !important;
    }

    /* Fade in once ready */
    html.rm-root-ready body {
        animation: rmRootFadeIn 260ms ease forwards;
    }

    @keyframes rmRootFadeIn {
        to {
            opacity: 1;
        }
    }
</style>

<!-- JFrog Interior Mobile Header (all pages) -->
<div id="jf-imh-header" aria-label="JFrog mobile header">
  <div class="jf-imh-bar">
    <a class="jf-imh-logo" href="/" aria-label="JFrog Docs home">
      <img
        src="https://files.readme.io/fcd415e63681e1a53d9bd8420b6baec79f07b7404abd72df766cbbe606ed4646-logo_versionDefault.png"
        alt="JFrog Docs"
      />
    </a>

    <div class="jf-imh-actions">
      <!-- Custom search button (proxies to ReadMe native search toggle) -->
<button
  id="jf-imh-search-btn"
  class="jf-imh-search-btn"
  type="button"
  aria-label="Open search"
>
  <span class="jf-imh-search-circle" aria-hidden="true">
<svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 28 28" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M18.9384 16.8223C21.0134 13.8494 20.7244 9.72779 18.0715 7.07489C15.0943 4.09768 10.2673 4.09768 7.29004 7.07489C4.31283 10.0521 4.31283 14.8791 7.29004 17.8563C10.2673 20.8335 15.0943 20.8335 18.0715 17.8563C18.1134 17.8144 18.1548 17.7721 18.1956 17.7294L23.0361 22.5699C23.2639 22.7977 23.6333 22.7977 23.8611 22.5699C24.0889 22.3421 24.0889 21.9728 23.8611 21.7449L18.9384 16.8223ZM17.2465 7.89985C19.7681 10.4215 19.7681 14.5098 17.2465 17.0314C14.7249 19.553 10.6366 19.553 8.115 17.0314C5.5934 14.5098 5.5934 10.4215 8.115 7.89985C10.6366 5.37825 14.7249 5.37825 17.2465 7.89985Z" fill="white"/>
</svg>

  </span>
</button>

      <a
        class="jf-imh-try-btn"
        href="https://jfrog.com/start-free/"
        target="_blank"
        rel="noopener noreferrer"
      >
        Try JFrog
      </a>

      <button
        id="jf-imh-menu-btn"
        class="jf-imh-menu-btn"
        type="button"
        aria-label="Open menu"
        aria-expanded="false"
        aria-controls="jf-imh-drawer"
      >
        <span class="jf-imh-menu-circle" aria-hidden="true">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round">
            <path d="M4 7h16"></path>
            <path d="M4 12h16"></path>
            <path d="M4 17h16"></path>
          </svg>
        </span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- IDENTICAL-STYLE GLP drawer (interior/global header version) -->
<div id="jf-imh-overlay" aria-hidden="true">
  <div id="jf-imh-backdrop"></div>

  <div id="jf-imh-drawer" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Mobile menu">
    <button id="jf-imh-close" aria-label="Close menu">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
        <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12"></path>
      </svg>
    </button>

    <div class="jf-imh-links-wrap">
      <a href="https://support.jfrog.com/s/create-ticket" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="jf-imh-drawer-link">
        Contact Support
      </a>

      <hr class="jf-imh-divider" />

      <a href="https://jfrog.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="jf-imh-drawer-link">
        JFrog.com
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  const TAG = "__jfInteriorMobileHeader_identicalMenu_withSearchProxy_v1";
  if (window[TAG]) return;
  window[TAG] = true;

  function getReadMeSearchToggle() {
    return (
      document.querySelector(".rm-Header .rm-SearchToggle") ||
      document.querySelector(".rm-SearchToggle")
    );
  }

  function openReadMeSearch() {
    const nativeSearchBtn = getReadMeSearchToggle();

    if (nativeSearchBtn) {
      nativeSearchBtn.click();
      return true;
    }

    // Fallback if ReadMe binds shortcut listeners instead of button behavior
    const isMac = /Mac|iPhone|iPad|iPod/.test(navigator.platform);
    const evt = new KeyboardEvent("keydown", {
      key: "k",
      code: "KeyK",
      metaKey: isMac,
      ctrlKey: !isMac,
      bubbles: true,
      cancelable: true
    });
    document.dispatchEvent(evt);
    return false;
  }

  function initSearchProxy() {
    const searchBtn = document.getElementById("jf-imh-search-btn");
    if (!searchBtn || searchBtn.__jfBound) return;

    searchBtn.addEventListener("click", function (e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      openReadMeSearch();
    });

    searchBtn.__jfBound = true;
  }

  function initDrawer() {
    const menuBtn = document.getElementById("jf-imh-menu-btn");
    const closeBtn = document.getElementById("jf-imh-close");
    const overlay = document.getElementById("jf-imh-overlay");
    const backdrop = document.getElementById("jf-imh-backdrop");

    if (!menuBtn || !overlay) return;

    function openDrawer() {
      overlay.classList.add("jf-open");
      overlay.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "false");
      menuBtn.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
      document.documentElement.classList.add("jf-imh-lock-scroll");
    }

    function closeDrawer() {
      overlay.classList.remove("jf-open");
      overlay.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true");
      menuBtn.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
      document.documentElement.classList.remove("jf-imh-lock-scroll");
    }

    if (!menuBtn.__jfBound) {
      menuBtn.addEventListener("click", openDrawer);
      menuBtn.__jfBound = true;
    }

    if (closeBtn && !closeBtn.__jfBound) {
      closeBtn.addEventListener("click", closeDrawer);
      closeBtn.__jfBound = true;
    }

    if (backdrop && !backdrop.__jfBound) {
      backdrop.addEventListener("click", closeDrawer);
      backdrop.__jfBound = true;
    }

    if (!document.__jfEscBound) {
      document.addEventListener("keydown", function (e) {
        if (e.key === "Escape") closeDrawer();
      });
      document.__jfEscBound = true;
    }

    if (!overlay.__jfLinkCloseBound) {
      overlay.addEventListener("click", function (e) {
        const link = e.target.closest(".jf-imh-drawer-link");
        if (link) closeDrawer();
      });
      overlay.__jfLinkCloseBound = true;
    }

    window.__jfInteriorMobileHeader = { openDrawer, closeDrawer, openReadMeSearch };
  }

  function boot() {
    initDrawer();
    initSearchProxy();
  }

  if (document.readyState === "loading") {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", boot);
  } else {
    boot();
  }

  /* Re-init for ReadMe SPA route changes */
  let lastUrl = location.pathname + location.search + location.hash;
  setInterval(function () {
    const now = location.pathname + location.search + location.hash;
    if (now !== lastUrl) {
      lastUrl = now;
      initDrawer();
      initSearchProxy();
    }
  }, 250);
})();
</script>

<style>
/* Mobile only */
@media (max-width: 1120px) {
  .rm-Header,
  .rm-Header-top,
  .rm-Header-bottom,
  header.Header3zzata9F_ZPQ.rm-Header_classic,
  .Header3zzata9F_ZPQ {
    min-height: 0 !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
    margin: 0 !important;
    border: 0 !important;
    background: transparent !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
  }

  /* Keep native ReadMe search button functional but visually hidden (so custom button can trigger it) */
  .rm-Header .rm-Header-search {
    position: absolute !important;
    width: 1px !important;
    height: 1px !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
    clip: rect(0 0 0 0) !important;
    clip-path: inset(50%) !important;
    white-space: nowrap !important;
    opacity: 0 !important;
    pointer-events: none !important;
  }

  /* Top bar */
  #jf-imh-header {
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 10030;
    width: 100%;
    display: block;
  }

  .jf-imh-bar {
    height: 76px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 12px;
    padding: 0 12px;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
    background: #111821;
  }

  .jf-imh-logo {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    min-width: 0;
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .jf-imh-logo img {
    display: block;
    width: auto;
    height: 56px;
    max-width: 185px;
    object-fit: contain;
  }

  .jf-imh-actions {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 20px;
    margin-left: auto;
    flex: 0 0 auto;
  }

  /* Search button (icon only) */
  .jf-imh-search-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    background: transparent;
    border: 0;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    cursor: pointer;
    color: #ffffff;
    -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
  }

  .jf-imh-search-circle {
    width: auto !important;
    height: auto !important;
    min-width: 0 !important;
    min-height: 0 !important;
    border-radius: 0 !important;
    display: inline-flex !important;
    align-items: center !important;
    justify-content: center !important;
    background: transparent !important;
    border: 0 !important;
  }

  .jf-imh-search-btn svg {
    width: 28px;
    height: 28px;
    display: block;
    color: #ffffff;
  }

  .jf-imh-search-btn svg path {
    fill: #ffffff;
  }

  .jf-imh-try-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    height: 44px;
    padding: 0 22px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: #36a13b;
    border: 1px solid #36a13b;
    color: #fff !important;
    text-decoration: none !important;
    font-family: "Open Sans", Inter, sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 1;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  .jf-imh-try-btn:hover,
  .jf-imh-try-btn:focus-visible {
    background: #40be46;
    border-color: #40be46;
    color: #fff !important;
  }

  .jf-imh-menu-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    background: transparent;
    border: 0;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    cursor: pointer;
    color: #ffffff;
    -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
  }

  .jf-imh-menu-circle {
    width: 44px;
    height: 44px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
    border: 1.5px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25);
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .jf-imh-menu-btn svg {
    width: 22px;
    height: 22px;
    color: #ffffff;
  }

  .jf-imh-menu-btn:hover .jf-imh-menu-circle,
  .jf-imh-menu-btn:focus-visible .jf-imh-menu-circle {
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.10);
    border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35);
  }

  /* Drawer */
  #jf-imh-overlay {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    z-index: 10040;
    display: none;
  }

  #jf-imh-overlay.jf-open {
    display: flex;
  }

  #jf-imh-backdrop {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: rgba(14, 22, 34, 0.75);
  }

  #jf-imh-drawer {
    position: relative;
    margin-left: auto;
    width: 370px;
    max-width: 80vw;
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    padding: 20px 24px;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    background: #111821;
    transform: translateX(100%);
    transition: transform 0.2s ease;
  }

  #jf-imh-overlay.jf-open #jf-imh-drawer {
    transform: translateX(0);
  }

  #jf-imh-close {
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: 4px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    background: none;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    color: #ffffff;
  }

  #jf-imh-close svg {
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
    color: #ffffff;
  }

  .jf-imh-links-wrap {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    width: 100%;
  }

  .jf-imh-drawer-link {
    display: inline-block;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    min-width: 0;
    padding: 14px 40px;
    border-radius: 50px;
    border: 1.5px solid #40be46;
    color: #ffffff !important;
    text-align: center;
    text-decoration: none !important;
    white-space: nowrap;
    font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 22px;
    transition: background-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease;
  }

  .jf-imh-drawer-link:hover {
    background: rgba(64, 190, 70, 0.1);
  }

  .jf-imh-divider {
    width: 100%;
    margin: 24px 0;
    border: none;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
  }

  .Header-left_mobile1RG-X93lx6PF {
    display: none !important;
  }

  /* Keep project picker dropdown inside viewport on mobile */
  #rmps-menu {
    box-sizing: border-box !important;
    left: 12px !important;
    right: 12px !important;
    width: auto !important;
    max-width: none !important;
    overflow-x: hidden !important;
  }

  #rmps-menu .rmps-item {
    min-width: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  #rmps-menu .rmps-item > span:last-child {
    min-width: 0;
    overflow-wrap: anywhere;
    word-break: break-word;
  }
}

/* Smaller phones */
@media (max-width: 420px) {
  .jf-imh-logo img {
    height: 50px;
    max-width: 165px;
  }

  .jf-imh-search-circle {
    width: 42px;
    height: 42px;
  }

  .jf-imh-try-btn {
    height: 42px;
    padding: 0 16px;
    font-size: 13px;
  }

  .jf-imh-menu-circle {
    width: 42px;
    height: 42px;
  }

  #jf-imh-drawer {
    width: 280px;
    max-width: 84vw;
    padding: 18px 20px;
  }

  .jf-imh-drawer-link {
    padding: 13px 28px;
    font-size: 15px;
  }
}

/* Scroll lock when drawer open */
html.jf-imh-lock-scroll,
html.jf-imh-lock-scroll body {
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

.MobileSubnav1DsTfasXloM2 .IconWrapper,

  position: relative;

<style>
  /* Mobile-only Guides / API tabs */
  #jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs {
    display: none;
  }

  @media (max-width: 1120px) {
    #jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 18px;
      width: 100%;
      box-sizing: border-box;
      padding: 10px 16px 8px;
      margin: 0;
      background: #111418; /* dark bar */
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
      position: relative;
      z-index: 5;
    }

    /* If inserted into rm-ReferenceMain or rm-Guides main, keep it full width */
    main#content > #jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs,
    main#Explorer > #jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs {
      margin-left: 0;
      margin-right: 0;
    }

    #jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs .jf-mobile-top-tab {
      appearance: none;
      -webkit-appearance: none;
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: 6px 0 10px;
      margin: 0;
      border: 0;
      background: transparent !important;
      box-shadow: none !important;
      border-radius: 0 !important;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,.88) !important;
      text-decoration: none !important;
      font-size: 14px;
      line-height: 1.2;
      font-weight: 600;
      white-space: nowrap;
      position: relative;
    }

    #jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs .jf-mobile-top-tab:hover,
    #jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs .jf-mobile-top-tab:focus,
    #jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs .jf-mobile-top-tab:active {
      color: #fff !important;
      text-decoration: none !important;
      background: transparent !important;
      box-shadow: none !important;
      outline: none;
    }

    #jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs .jf-mobile-top-tab.is-active {
      color: #40be46 !important;
    }

    /* green underline / active indicator */
    #jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs .jf-mobile-top-tab.is-active::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      left: 0;
      right: 0;
      bottom: 0;
      height: 3px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: #22c55e;
    }
  }
</style>

<script>
(function () {
  var KEY = "__jf_mobile_guides_api_tabs_v7";
  if (window[KEY]) return;
  window[KEY] = true;

  function isMobile() {
    return window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia("(max-width: 1120px)").matches;
  }

  function normalizePath(path) {
    path = String(path || "/").split("#")[0].split("?")[0];
    path = path.replace(/\/+$/, "");
    return path || "/";
  }

  function getMain() {
    /* Guides OR API Reference */
    return (
      document.querySelector("main#content") ||
      document.querySelector("main#Explorer")
    );
  }

  function getProjectBase() {
    var path = normalizePath(window.location.pathname);
    var parts = path.split("/").filter(Boolean);

    /* Expected:
       /artifactory/docs/...
       /artifactory/reference/...
       -> base = /artifactory
    */
    if (!parts.length) return "";

    // Optional guard: if first segment is docs/reference at root, don't use it as project
    if (parts[0] === "docs" || parts[0] === "reference") return "";

    return "/" + parts[0];
  }

  function buildTabs() {
    var wrap = document.createElement("div");
    wrap.id = "jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs";
    wrap.setAttribute("role", "navigation");
    wrap.setAttribute("aria-label", "Section navigation");

    var guides = document.createElement("a");
    guides.className = "jf-mobile-top-tab";
    guides.setAttribute("data-kind", "guides");
    guides.textContent = "Guides";

    var api = document.createElement("a");
    api.className = "jf-mobile-top-tab";
    api.setAttribute("data-kind", "api");
    api.textContent = "API Reference";

    wrap.appendChild(guides);
    wrap.appendChild(api);
    return wrap;
  }

  function getOrCreateTabs() {
    var tabs = document.getElementById("jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs");
    if (!tabs) tabs = buildTabs();
    return tabs;
  }

  function updateTabLinks() {
    var tabs = document.getElementById("jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs");
    if (!tabs) return;

    var base = getProjectBase(); // "/artifactory"
    var guidesHref = (base || "") + "/docs";
    var apiHref = (base || "") + "/reference";

    var guides = tabs.querySelector('[data-kind="guides"]');
    var api = tabs.querySelector('[data-kind="api"]');

    if (guides) guides.setAttribute("href", guidesHref);
    if (api) api.setAttribute("href", apiHref);
  }

  function setActive() {
    var tabs = document.getElementById("jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs");
    if (!tabs) return;

    var current = normalizePath(window.location.pathname);
    var links = tabs.querySelectorAll(".jf-mobile-top-tab");
    for (var i = 0; i < links.length; i++) {
      links[i].classList.remove("is-active");
      links[i].removeAttribute("aria-current");
    }

    var active;
    if (/\/reference(\/|$)/.test(current)) {
      active = tabs.querySelector('[data-kind="api"]');
    } else {
      active = tabs.querySelector('[data-kind="guides"]');
    }

    if (active) {
      active.classList.add("is-active");
      active.setAttribute("aria-current", "page");
    }
  }

  function ensureInserted() {
    var existing = document.getElementById("jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs");

    if (!isMobile()) {
      if (existing && existing.parentNode) existing.parentNode.removeChild(existing);
      return false;
    }

    var main = getMain();
    if (!main) return false;

    var tabs = existing || getOrCreateTabs();

    // Insert as first child of main (works for both Guides and Reference mains)
    if (main.firstElementChild !== tabs) {
      main.insertBefore(tabs, main.firstChild);
    }

    updateTabLinks();
    setActive();
    return true;
  }

  function kickInsertLoop() {
    var count = 0;
    var max = 80;
    var t = setInterval(function () {
      count++;
      ensureInserted();
      if (count >= max) clearInterval(t);
    }, 250);
  }

  function onRouteChangeLike() {
    setTimeout(ensureInserted, 50);
    setTimeout(ensureInserted, 250);
    setTimeout(ensureInserted, 700);
    setTimeout(ensureInserted, 1400);
    setTimeout(ensureInserted, 2200);
    kickInsertLoop();
  }

  var observer = new MutationObserver(function () {
    ensureInserted();
  });

  function startObserver() {
    observer.observe(document.documentElement, {
      childList: true,
      subtree: true
    });
  }

  (function patchHistory() {
    var push = history.pushState;
    var replace = history.replaceState;

    history.pushState = function () {
      var ret = push.apply(this, arguments);
      onRouteChangeLike();
      return ret;
    };

    history.replaceState = function () {
      var ret = replace.apply(this, arguments);
      onRouteChangeLike();
      return ret;
    };

    window.addEventListener("popstate", onRouteChangeLike);
    window.addEventListener("hashchange", onRouteChangeLike);
    window.addEventListener("resize", ensureInserted);
    window.addEventListener("orientationchange", ensureInserted);
  })();

  startObserver();
  onRouteChangeLike();
})();
</script></head><body id="enterprise" glp-state-container><div id="ssr-top"><script src="https://cdn.readme.io/public/js/cash-dom.min.js?1775163821505"></script></div><div id="ssr-main"><div <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>

<!-- Tailwind Config for JFrog Brand Colors -->
<script>
    tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
            extend: {
                fontFamily: {
                    sans: ["Inter", "sans-serif"],
                },
                colors: {
                    jfrog: {
                        green: "#40be46",
                        greenHover: "#36a33b",
                        dark: "#0e1622",
                        panel: "#15202b",
                        card: "#1e293b",
                        text: "#cbd5e1",
                        light: "#f8fafc",
                    },
                },
                boxShadow: {
                    glow: "0 0 15px rgba(64, 190, 70, 0.3)",
                    "card-light":
                        "0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05), 0 2px 4px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03)",
                },
                backgroundImage: {
                    "hero-pattern":
                        "url('data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width=\\'100%\\' height=\\'100%\\' viewBox=\\'0 0 1200 800\\' xmlns=\\'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\\'%3E%3Cg fill=\\'none\\' stroke=\\'rgba(64, 190, 70, 0.15)\\' stroke-width=\\'1\\'%3E%3Cpath d=\\'M0 600 C 300 700, 600 400, 1200 200\\' /%3E%3Cpath d=\\'M0 620 C 310 720, 610 420, 1200 220\\' /%3E%3Cpath d=\\'M0 640 C 320 740, 620 440, 1200 240\\' /%3E%3Cpath d=\\'M0 660 C 330 760, 630 460, 1200 260\\' /%3E%3Cpath d=\\'M0 680 C 340 780, 640 480, 1200 280\\' /%3E%3Cpath d=\\'M0 500 C 400 400, 700 700, 1200 300\\' stroke-opacity=\\'0.1\\' /%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E')",
                },
            },
        },
    };
</script>

<style>
 /* Hide interior mobile header */
  #jf-imh-header {display:none !important;}

    /* =============================================================================
    TABLE OF CONTENTS
    0) ReadMe platform overrides (hide/collapse native header chrome)
    1) Layout constraints (container widths / z-index / gutters)
    2) Global scope, variables, and utilities
    3) Hero section (bg, header CTAs, search, quick links)
    4) Main category cards (light grid)
    5) Deep-dive section (dark grid)
    6) Support links section (bottom light strip)
    7) Responsive overrides (mobile, extra small, large-screen gutters)
    8) Mobile hamburger menu
  ============================================================================= */

    /* =============================================================================
    0) ReadMe platform overrides
  ============================================================================= */

    @media (min-width: 768px) {

        .rm-Header-top.Header-topuTMpygDG4e1V.Header-top_classic3g7Q6zoBy8zh {
            display: none;
        }

        .rm-Header,
        .rm-Header-top,
        .rm-Header-bottom {
            height: 0 !important;
            min-height: 0 !important;
            padding: 0 !important;
            margin: 0 !important;
            border: 0 !important;
        }

        .rm-Header-top,
        .rm-Header-bottom {
            overflow: hidden !important;
        }

        .rm-Header-search,
        nav[aria-label="Primary navigation"],
        .rm-ProjectPicker,
        #theme-toggle {
            display: none !important;
        }

        header.container.mx-auto.px-6.py-5.flex.justify-between.items-center.relative.z-20 {
            max-width: 1940px !important;
        }

        @media (min-width: 1036px) {
            .container {
                max-width: 1356px;
            }
        }

        #app-root .container {
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        #app-root header {
            z-index: 40;
        }
    }

    /* --- MOBILE: hide ReadMe native header entirely --- */
    @media (max-width: 767px) {
        .rm-Header,
        .rm-Header-top,
        .rm-Header-bottom,
        header.Header3zzata9F_ZPQ.rm-Header_classic,
        .Header3zzata9F_ZPQ {
            display: none !important;
            height: 0 !important;
            min-height: 0 !important;
            overflow: hidden !important;
            padding: 0 !important;
            margin: 0 !important;
            border: 0 !important;
        }

        #rmps-menu,
        #rmps-wrap,
        #rmps-trigger {
            display: none !important;
        }

        #rm-beta-banner {
            display: none !important;
        }
    }

    /* =============================================================================
    2) Global scope, variables, and utilities
  ============================================================================= */

    #app-root {
        font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
        --bg-primary: #ffffff;
        --text-primary: #0f172a;
        --text-secondary: #475569;
        --border-color: #e2e8f0;
        width: 100%;
        min-height: 100vh;
        line-height: 1.5;
        -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    }

    #app-root.dark {
        --bg-primary: #0e1622;
        --text-primary: #f8fafc;
        --text-secondary: #94a3b8;
        --border-color: #1e293b;
    }

    .glass-panel {
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
        backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
    }

    * {
        transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1),
            box-shadow 0.2s ease,
            border-color 0.2s ease;
    }

    .hover-lift:hover {
        transform: translateY(-4px);
        box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1),
            0 4px 6px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
    }

    #app-root ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 8px; }
    #app-root ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #0e1622; }
    #app-root ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #40be46; border-radius: 4px; }

    /* =============================================================================
    3) Hero section
  ============================================================================= */

    #app-root .hero-section {
        height: 482px;
        background-image: url("https://files.readme.io/e2e979165718cf79a25a49f334c0e346c250942308006136c255204613b690b6-562kb_720.png");
        background-size: cover;
        background-position: center;
        background-repeat: no-repeat;
    }

    #app-root .hero-section .bg-hero-pattern,
    #app-root .hero-section .bg-gradient-to-b {
        display: none;
    }

    #app-root .hero-cta-group {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 24px;
    }

    #app-root .hero-cta {
        position: relative;
        min-width: 100px;
        box-sizing: border-box;
        display: inline-flex;
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: center;
        align-items: center;
        padding: 12px 40px;
        height: 44px;
        border-radius: 50px;
        border-width: 1px;
        border-style: solid;
        font-family: "Open Sans";
        font-weight: 700;
        font-size: 18px;
        line-height: 24px;
        text-align: center;
        white-space: nowrap;
        text-decoration: none;
        transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
    }

    #app-root .hero-cta:hover { padding: 12px 28px; }

    #app-root .hero-cta svg {
        width: 0;
        top: 1px;
        display: inline-block !important;
        opacity: 0;
        visibility: hidden;
        transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
    }

    #app-root .hero-cta:hover svg {
        width: 24px;
        padding-left: 6px;
        opacity: 1;
        visibility: visible;
    }

    #app-root .hero-cta-outline {
        background: transparent;
        color: #ffffff;
    }

    #app-root .hero-cta-outline:hover {
        background: #09101b4d;
        border-color: #40be46;
        color: #40be46;
    }

    #app-root .hero-cta-solid {
        border-color: #36a13b;
        background: #36a13b;
        color: #ffffff;
    }

    #app-root .hero-cta-solid:hover {
        background: #40be46;
        border-color: #40be46;
    }

    #app-root .hero-title {
        font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
        font-style: normal;
        font-weight: 700;
        font-size: 40px;
        line-height: 48px;
        letter-spacing: -0.02em;
        color: #ffffff;
        text-align: center;
        margin: 0 0 32px 0;
    }

    #app-root .hero-search { max-width: 874px; margin: 0 auto; }
    #app-root .hero-search-inner { position: relative; }

    #app-root .hero-search-icon-wrapper {
        position: absolute;
        top: 50%;
        left: 24px;
        transform: translateY(-50%);
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        pointer-events: none;
    }

    #app-root .hero-search-icon { width: 24px; height: 24px; color: #36a13b; }

    #app-root .hero-search-input {
        width: 100%;
        box-sizing: border-box;
        border: none;
        outline: none;
        padding: 20px 32px 20px 72px;
        border-radius: 12px;
        background: #ffffff;
        font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
        font-weight: 400;
        font-size: 16px;
        line-height: 24px;
        color: #111827;
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.04);
    }

    #app-root .hero-search-input::placeholder { color: #9ca3af; }

    #app-root .hero-quick-links {
        margin-top: 40px;
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        justify-content: center;
        gap: 28px;
    }

    #app-root .hero-quick-link {
        font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
        font-style: normal;
        font-weight: 300;
        font-size: 16px;
        line-height: 24px;
        color: #ffffff;
        text-decoration: underline;
        text-underline-offset: 4px;
    }

    #app-root .hero-quick-link:hover { color: #40be46; }

    /* =============================================================================
    4) Main category cards — horizontal layout
  ============================================================================= */

    #app-root .card-group-heading {
        font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
        font-weight: 600;
        font-size: 24px;
        line-height: 32px;
        color: #40be46;
        text-align: center;
        margin-bottom: 24px;
    }

    #app-root .card-group {
        margin-bottom: 48px;
    }

    .hp-card {
        width: 100%;
        padding: 24px !important;
        border: 1px solid #D8E6ED;
        border-radius: 12px;
        box-sizing: border-box;
        background: #ffffff;
        transition: border-color 0.18s ease,
            background-color 0.18s ease,
            box-shadow 0.18s ease;
    }

    .hp-card:hover {
        border-color: #40be46;
        box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.06);
    }

    #app-root .hp-card-inner {
        display: flex;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: 12px;
    }

    #app-root .hp-card-icon-wrap {
        flex: 0 0 auto;
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
        background: transparent;
        border-radius: 0;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
    }

    #app-root .hp-card-icon-wrap img {
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
        object-fit: contain;
    }

    #app-root .hp-card-text { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }

    #app-root .hp-card-text h3 {
        font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
        font-weight: 700;
        font-size: 20px;
        line-height: 28px;
        letter-spacing: -0.02em;
        color: #414857;
        margin: 0 0 6px 0;
    }

    #app-root .hp-card-text p {
        font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
        font-weight: 400;
        font-size: 16px;
        line-height: 24px;
        color: #5E6D81;
        margin: 0;
    }

    /* =============================================================================
    5) Deep-dive section (dark grid)
  ============================================================================= */

    #app-root .binary-links-section { padding: 40px 0; }

    #app-root .deep-dive-icon { height: 32px; width: auto; display: block; }

    #app-root .deep-dive-card {
        background-color: #2a323c;
        border-radius: 12px;
        border: 1px solid #324152;
        padding: 20px;
        min-height: unset;
        width: 310px;
        flex: 0 0 310px;
        box-sizing: border-box;
        transition: border-color 0.18s ease,
            background-color 0.18s ease,
            box-shadow 0.18s ease;
    }

    #app-root .deep-dive-card:hover {
        border-color: #40be46;
        box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.04);
    }

    #app-root .deep-dive-card p {
        color: #f8fafb !important;
        font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif !important;
        font-size: 16px !important;
        line-height: 24px !important;
        font-weight: 400 !important;
    }

    #app-root .binary-links-section .grid {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 20px;
    }

    @media (max-width: 767px) {
        #app-root .deep-dive-card {
            width: 100% !important;
            flex: 0 0 100% !important;
        }
    }

    /* =============================================================================
    6) Support links section
  ============================================================================= */

    #app-root .support-links-section {
        background-color: #ffffff;
        padding: 100px 0px;
    }

    .support-links-section .hp-card:hover { border-color: #40be46; }

    .support-links-section h3 {
        font-family: "Open Sans";
        font-weight: 700;
        font-size: 24px;
        line-height: 32px;
        color: #1f1f24;
    }

    .support-links-section .leading-relaxed {
        font-family: "Inter";
        font-weight: 400;
        font-size: 18px;
        line-height: 28px;
        color: #5c5e6c;
    }

    #app-root .support-links-grid {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        row-gap: 64px;
    }

    @media (min-width: 768px) {
        #app-root .support-links-grid {
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
            column-gap: 120px;
            row-gap: 0;
        }
    }

    #app-root .support-link { max-width: 420px; }

    #app-root .support-link-icon {
        display: block;
        width: 74px;
        height: 74px;
        margin-bottom: 2px;
    }

    #app-root .support-link-title {
        font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
        font-weight: 700;
        font-size: 24px !important;
        line-height: 32px;
        letter-spacing: -0.02em;
        color: #1f1f24;
        margin: 0 0 16px 0;
    }

    #app-root .support-link-text {
        font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
        font-weight: 400;
        font-size: 18px !important;
        line-height: 28px;
        color: #5c5e6c;
        margin: 0;
    }

    .py-20 { padding-top: 2rem; padding-bottom: 2rem; }
    .mb-6 { margin-bottom: 1rem; }

    .text-xl {
        font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif !important;
        font-size: 24px !important;
        line-height: 33px !important;
        font-weight: 600 !important;
        margin-left: 1px !important;
    }

    /* =============================================================================
    7) Responsive overrides
  ============================================================================= */

    @media (max-width: 767px) {
        html, body { overflow-x: hidden !important; }

        #app-root .container {
            max-width: 100% !important;
            padding-left: 16px !important;
            padding-right: 16px !important;
        }

        #app-root .hero-section header.container.mx-auto {
            padding: 12px 16px !important;
            display: flex !important;
            align-items: center !important;
            justify-content: space-between !important;
            gap: 12px !important;
            flex-wrap: nowrap !important;
            overflow: visible !important;
        }

        #app-root .hero-section header.container.mx-auto>div:first-child {
            flex: 0 0 auto !important;
            min-width: 0 !important;
        }

        #app-root .hero-section header.container.mx-auto img {
            max-width: 120px !important;
            width: 120px !important;
            height: auto !important;
            display: block !important;
        }

        #app-root .hero-section header.container.mx-auto .hero-cta-group {
            display: none !important;
        }

        #app-root .hero-mobile-controls {
            display: flex !important;
            align-items: center !important;
            gap: 12px !important;
            margin-left: auto !important;
        }

        #app-root .hero-mobile-try-btn {
            display: inline-flex !important;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 8px 20px;
            border-radius: 50px;
            background: #36a13b;
            border: 1px solid #36a13b;
            color: #ffffff;
            font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 14px;
            line-height: 20px;
            text-decoration: none;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }

        #app-root .hero-mobile-hamburger {
            display: flex !important;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            width: 44px;
            height: 44px;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
            border: 1.5px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25);
            border-radius: 50%;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 0;
        }

        #app-root .hero-mobile-hamburger svg {
            width: 22px;
            height: 22px;
            color: #ffffff;
            opacity: 1 !important;
            visibility: visible !important;
        }

        #app-root .hero-section .hero-header-divider {
            display: block !important;
            width: 100%;
            border: none;
            border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }

        #app-root .hero-section {
            height: auto !important;
            min-height: 0 !important;
            padding-bottom: 18px !important;
        }

        #app-root .hero-section .container.mx-auto.px-6.pt-16.pb-24 {
            padding-top: 18px !important;
            padding-bottom: 18px !important;
            padding-left: 16px !important;
            padding-right: 16px !important;
        }

        #app-root .hero-title {
            font-size: 30px !important;
            line-height: 36px !important;
            margin: 6px 0 14px 0 !important;
        }

        #app-root .hero-search { max-width: 100% !important; margin: 0 auto !important; }

        #app-root .hero-search-input {
            padding: 16px 16px 16px 54px !important;
            border-radius: 12px !important;
        }

        #app-root .hero-search-icon-wrapper { left: 16px !important; }

        #app-root .hero-quick-links {
            margin-top: 14px !important;
            gap: 12px !important;
            row-gap: 10px !important;
        }

        section.bg-white.py-20.border-b.border-gray-100 {
            padding-top: 28px !important;
            padding-bottom: 28px !important;
        }

        section.bg-white.py-20.border-b.border-gray-100 .hp-card {
            padding: 16px !important;
            max-width: 560px !important;
            margin-left: auto !important;
            margin-right: auto !important;
        }

        #app-root .binary-links-section { padding: 28px 16px !important; }

        #app-root .binary-links-section h2.text-xl { margin-bottom: 12px !important; }

        #app-root .binary-links-section .grid {
            display: grid !important;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
            gap: 14px !important;
            justify-items: center !important;
            align-items: stretch !important;
        }

        #app-root .deep-dive-card {
            width: 100% !important;
            max-width: 560px !important;
            margin-left: auto !important;
            margin-right: auto !important;
            padding: 18px !important;
        }

        #app-root .deep-dive-icon { height: 28px !important; }

        #app-root .support-links-section { padding: 28px 16px !important; }

        #app-root .support-links-section .grid { row-gap: 22px !important; }

        #app-root .support-links-section .hp-card {
            max-width: 560px !important;
            margin-left: auto !important;
            margin-right: auto !important;
            padding: 18px !important;
        }
    }

    @media (max-width: 420px) {
        #app-root .hero-section header.container.mx-auto img {
            max-width: 110px !important;
            width: 110px !important;
        }

        #app-root .hero-mobile-try-btn {
            padding: 6px 16px !important;
            font-size: 13px !important;
        }

        #app-root .hero-title {
            font-size: 28px !important;
            line-height: 34px !important;
        }

        section.bg-white.py-20.border-b.border-gray-100 .hp-card,
        #app-root .deep-dive-card,
        #app-root .support-links-section .hp-card {
            padding: 16px !important;
        }
    }

    @media (min-width: 1024px) {
        #app-root .container {
            max-width: 1388px !important;
            margin-left: auto !important;
            margin-right: auto !important;
            padding-left: 40px !important;
            padding-right: 40px !important;
        }
    }

    @media (max-width: 1023px) {
        #app-root .container {
            padding-left: 16px !important;
            padding-right: 16px !important;
        }
    }

    @media (max-width: 768px) {
        .hp-card {
            border-radius: 12px !important;
            border: 1px solid #EAEEF5;
        }
    }

    header.container.mx-auto.px-6.py-5.flex.justify-between.items-center.relative.z-20 {
        height: 75px;
    }

    #app-root .hero-mobile-controls {
        display: none;
    }
    #app-root .hero-header-divider {
        display: none;
    }

    /* =============================================================================
    8) Mobile hamburger drawer overlay
  ============================================================================= */

    #jf-mobile-drawer-overlay {
        position: fixed;
        inset: 0;
        z-index: 9999;
        display: none;
    }

    #jf-mobile-drawer-overlay.jf-drawer-open {
        display: flex;
    }

    #jf-mobile-drawer-backdrop {
        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        background: rgba(14, 22, 34, 0.75);
    }

    #jf-mobile-drawer {
        position: relative;
        margin-left: auto;
        width: 370px;
        max-width: 80vw;
        background: #111821;
        min-height: 100vh;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        padding: 20px 24px;
        box-sizing: border-box;
    }

    #jf-mobile-drawer-close {
        align-self: flex-start;
        background: none;
        border: none;
        cursor: pointer;
        padding: 4px;
        margin-bottom: 24px;
    }

    #jf-mobile-drawer-close svg {
        width: 24px;
        height: 24px;
        color: #ffffff;
    }

    .jf-drawer-links-wrap {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        width: 100%;
    }

    .jf-drawer-link {
        display: inline-block;
        box-sizing: border-box;
        text-align: center;
        padding: 14px 40px;
        border-radius: 50px;
        border: 1.5px solid #40be46;
        color: #ffffff;
        font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
        font-weight: 600;
        font-size: 16px;
        line-height: 22px;
        text-decoration: none;
        transition: background-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease;
        white-space: nowrap;
    }

    .jf-drawer-link:hover {
        background: rgba(64, 190, 70, 0.1);
    }

    .jf-drawer-divider {
        width: 100%;
        border: none;
        border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
        margin: 24px 0;
    }

    @media (min-width: 768px) {
        #jf-mobile-drawer-overlay {
            display: none !important;
        }
    }
</style>

<script>
    (function () {
        const TAG = "__jfrogAskAiProxyInstalled_v2";
        if (window[TAG]) return;
        window[TAG] = true;

        const ORIGINAL_CLASS = "rm-AskAi-original";
        const PROXY_CLASS = "rm-AskAi-proxy";
        const PROXY_ATTR = "data-askai-proxy";

        let obs = null;
        let scheduled = false;

        function findOriginal() {
            const root = document.querySelector(".rm-AskAi");
            if (!root) return null;
            const btn =
                root.querySelector("button") ||
                root.querySelector('[role="button"]') ||
                root.querySelector("a");
            if (!btn) return null;
            return { root, btn };
        }

        function getProxy() {
            return document.querySelector(`.rm-AskAi.${PROXY_CLASS}[${PROXY_ATTR}="true"]`);
        }

        function proxyIsGood(proxy) {
            if (!proxy) return false;
            return proxy.parentElement === document.body;
        }

        function ensureProxy() {
            const original = findOriginal();
            if (!original) return false;
            const { root, btn } = original;
            if (!root.classList.contains(ORIGINAL_CLASS)) root.classList.add(ORIGINAL_CLASS);
            const existing = getProxy();
            if (proxyIsGood(existing)) {
                existing.__askAiTargetBtn = btn;
                return true;
            }
            const proxy = root.cloneNode(true);
            proxy.setAttribute(PROXY_ATTR, "true");
            proxy.classList.remove(ORIGINAL_CLASS);
            proxy.classList.add(PROXY_CLASS);
            proxy.__askAiTargetBtn = btn;
            const forward = e => {
                e.preventDefault();
                e.stopPropagation();
                const targetBtn = proxy.__askAiTargetBtn;
                if (targetBtn) targetBtn.click();
            };
            proxy.addEventListener("click", forward, true);
            proxy.addEventListener("keydown", e => {
                if (e.key === "Enter" || e.key === " " || e.key === "Spacebar") forward(e);
            }, true);
            if (obs) obs.disconnect();
            document.body.appendChild(proxy);
            if (obs) obs.observe(document.documentElement, { childList: true, subtree: true });
            return true;
        }

        function scheduleEnsure() {
            if (scheduled) return;
            scheduled = true;
            requestAnimationFrame(() => { scheduled = false; ensureProxy(); });
        }

        function boot() {
            let tries = 0;
            const interval = setInterval(() => {
                ensureProxy();
                tries += 1;
                if (tries >= 80) clearInterval(interval);
            }, 100);
            obs = new MutationObserver(() => scheduleEnsure());
            obs.observe(document.documentElement, { childList: true, subtree: true });
            window.addEventListener("popstate", scheduleEnsure);
            window.addEventListener("hashchange", scheduleEnsure);
            window.addEventListener("resize", scheduleEnsure, { passive: true });
            ensureProxy();
        }

        if (document.readyState === "loading") {
            document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", boot);
        } else {
            boot();
        }
    })();
</script>

<body>
    <div id="app-root">
        <!-- Mobile Drawer Overlay (hamburger menu) -->
        <div id="jf-mobile-drawer-overlay">
            <div id="jf-mobile-drawer-backdrop"></div>
            <div id="jf-mobile-drawer">
                <button id="jf-mobile-drawer-close" aria-label="Close menu">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                        <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12" />
                    </svg>
                </button>
                <div class="jf-drawer-links-wrap">
                    <a href="https://support.jfrog.com/s/create-ticket" target="_blank" class="jf-drawer-link">Contact Support</a>
                    <hr class="jf-drawer-divider" />
                    <a href="https://jfrog.com/" target="_blank" class="jf-drawer-link">JFrog.com</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- 1. HERO SECTION -->
        <div class="relative bg-jfrog-dark text-white overflow-hidden hero-section">
            <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-hero-pattern opacity-50 pointer-events-none"></div>
            <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-b from-transparent to-jfrog-dark/90 pointer-events-none"></div>

            <header style="max-width:100% !important;" class="container mx-auto px-6 py-5 flex justify-between items-center relative z-20">
                <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2 select-none">
                        <div class="flex flex-col leading-tight">
                            <img style="max-width: 141px"
                                src="https://files.readme.io/fcd415e63681e1a53d9bd8420b6baec79f07b7404abd72df766cbbe606ed4646-logo_versionDefault.png"
                                alt="JFrog Help Center Logo" />
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Desktop CTAs -->
                <div class="hidden md:flex hero-cta-group">
                    <a href="https://jfrog.com/" target="_blank" class="hero-cta hero-cta-outline">
                        JFrog.com
                        <svg width="24" height="24" fill="#40BE46">
                            <path d="M7.293 4.707 14.586 12l-7.293 7.293 1.414 1.414L17.414 12 8.707 3.293 7.293 4.707z" />
                        </svg>
                    </a>
                    <a href="https://support.jfrog.com/s/create-ticket" target="_blank" class="hero-cta hero-cta-outline">
                        Contact Support
                        <svg width="24" height="24" fill="#40BE46">
                            <path d="M7.293 4.707 14.586 12l-7.293 7.293 1.414 1.414L17.414 12 8.707 3.293 7.293 4.707z" />
                        </svg>
                    </a>
                    <a href="https://jfrog.com/start-free/" target="_blank" class="hero-cta hero-cta-solid">
                        Try JFrog
                        <svg width="24" height="24" fill="#ffffff">
                            <path d="M7.293 4.707 14.586 12l-7.293 7.293 1.414 1.414L17.414 12 8.707 3.293 7.293 4.707z" />
                        </svg>
                    </a>
                </div>

                <!-- Mobile controls -->
                <div class="hero-mobile-controls">
                    <a href="https://jfrog.com/start-free/" target="_blank" class="hero-mobile-try-btn">Try JFrog</a>
                    <button class="hero-mobile-hamburger" aria-label="Open menu" id="jf-mobile-hamburger-btn">
                        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                            <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M4 6h16M4 12h16M4 18h16" />
                        </svg>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </header>
            <hr class="hero-header-divider" />

            <div class="container mx-auto px-6 pt-16 pb-24 text-center relative z-10">
                <h1 class="hero-title">How can we help ?</h1>
                <div class="hero-search group cursor-text">
                    <div class="hero-search-row">
                        <div class="hero-search-click" onclick="document.querySelector('.rm-SearchToggle')?.click()">
                            <div class="hero-search-inner">
                                <div class="hero-search-icon-wrapper">
                                    <svg class="hero-search-icon" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none"
                                        viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
                                        <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"
                                            d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z" />
                                    </svg>
                                </div>
                                <input type="text" class="hero-search-input" placeholder="Search JFrog help..." readonly />
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="hero-quick-links">
                    <a href="/setup" class="hero-quick-link">Get Started</a>
                    <a href="/artifactory" class="hero-quick-link">Artifactory</a>
                    <a href="/integrations" class="hero-quick-link">Integrations</a>
                    <a href="/security" class="hero-quick-link">Security and Compliance</a>
                    <a href="/security/docs/curation-intro" class="hero-quick-link">Curation</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- 2. MAIN CATEGORIES (Light Section) -->
        <section class="bg-white py-20 border-b border-gray-100">
            <div class="container mx-auto px-6">

                <!-- Getting Started -->
                <div class="card-group">
                    <h2 class="card-group-heading">Getting Started</h2>
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">

                        <a href="/governance/docs/getting-started" class="hp-card block">
                            <div class="hp-card-inner">
                                <div class="hp-card-icon-wrap">
                                    <img src="https://files.readme.io/2cfd5701ed195a8256376fff368f88663b2b200ed06df61e5b3847c5fa22ea5c-Governance.svg" alt="DevGovOps icon" />
                                </div>
                                <div class="hp-card-text">
                                    <h3>Governance &amp; Lifecycle</h3>

                            </div>

                        <a href="/ai-ml/docs/getting-started-ai-ml" class="hp-card block">

                                    <img src="https://files.readme.io/50ab564c20752507b8863c8b76248e036294b00367fdb04a236ea4c6cfb0006a-AI_Machine_Learning.svg" alt="AI & Machine Learning icon" />
                                </div>
                                <div class="hp-card-text">
                                    <h3>AI &amp; Machine Learning</h3>
                                    <p>Discover, govern, serve, and manage all AI assets across your organization</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </a>
                        <a href="/integrations/docs/getting-started" class="hp-card block">

            <div class="container mx-auto">

                <div class="mb-12">
                    <h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-white mb-6">Binary Management (DevOps)</h2>

                        <a href="/security/docs/advanced-security" class="deep-dive-card">

                        <a href="/security/docs/runtime" class="deep-dive-card">

                <div class="mb-12">
                    <h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-white mb-6">Governance &amp; Lifecycle (DevGovOps)</h2>

                                    alt="JFrog Curation" class="deep-dive-icon" />
                            </div>
                            <p>Control Which Open-Source packages, IDE Extensions and 3rd Party Downloads Enter your SDLC</p>
                        </a>

                            <div class="flex items-center mb-3">
                                <img src="https://files.readme.io/052f1ac0f3a66854235caea4ba37095086db79ac44f85ccdc179f4f88e8a3c77-JFrog_Card_Catalog.svg"
                                    alt="JFrog Catalog" class="deep-dive-icon" />
                            </div>
                            <p>Explore open-source packages and identify vulnerabilities and risks using the Catalog</p>
                        </a>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div>
                    <h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-white mb-6">AI &amp; Machine Learning</h2>
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
                        <a href="/ai-ml/docs/getting-started-ai-ml" class="deep-dive-card">
                            <div class="flex items-center mb-3">
                                <img src="https://files.readme.io/754e6d3073fdc2e1677298ec4c889d78c1e7a4e9b411043ebb6e712a33132aed-ML.svg"
                                    alt="JFrog ML" class="deep-dive-icon" />
                            </div>
                            <p class="text-xs leading-relaxed">Deliver trusted AI applications at speed</p>
                        </a>
                        <a href="/ai-ml/docs/jfrog-ai-catalog-overview" class="deep-dive-card">
                            <div class="flex items-center mb-3">
                                <img src="https://files.readme.io/6923e6fd58c9a5f1a69688e61bb8a7e6ea25495ae51bb0195c9ebbf51965991e-AI_Catalog.svg"
                                    alt="JFrog AI Catalog" class="deep-dive-icon" />
                            </div>
                            <p class="text-xs leading-relaxed">View and manage all AI models in your organization</p>
                        </a>
                    </div>
                </div>

            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- 4. SUPPORT LINKS (Light Section) -->
        <section class="bg-white support-links-section">
            <div class="container mx-auto px-6">
                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
                    <a href="https://support.jfrog.com/s/create-ticket" class="hp-card block">
                        <div class="hp-card-inner">

        </section>
    </div>

<style>
/* replace your existing rules */
.jf-survey-banner {
    background: #E2E9F7;
    min-height: 160px;
    padding: 40px clamp(16px, 5vw, 310px);  /* shrinks with viewport */
    box-sizing: border-box;
    margin-bottom: -1px;
}
.jf-survey-inner {
    max-width: 1300px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: row;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: clamp(24px, 5vw, 547px);  /* shrinks with viewport */
}
.jf-survey-text {
    flex-shrink: 0;
}
    .jf-survey-text-heading {
        font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif;
        font-weight: 600;
        font-size: 24px;
        line-height: 32px;
        color: #000000;
        margin: 0 0 12px 0;
    }
    .jf-survey-text-sub {
        font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif;
        font-weight: 400;
        font-size: 24px;
        line-height: 36px;
        color: #414857;
        margin: 0;
    }
    .jf-survey-btn {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        position: relative;
        padding: 16px 64px;
        min-width: 202px;
        height: 58px;
        background: #111821;
        border: 1px solid #111821;
        border-radius: 50px;
        text-decoration: none;
        font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif;
        font-weight: 700;
        font-size: 18px;
        line-height: 26px;
        color: #ffffff;
        white-space: nowrap;
        flex-shrink: 0;
        box-sizing: border-box;
        transition: border-color 0.2s;
    }
    .jf-survey-btn:hover {
        border-color: #3DD068;
    }
    .jf-survey-btn-label {
        color: #ffffff;
        transition: transform 0.2s, color 0.2s;
    }
    .jf-survey-btn:hover .jf-survey-btn-label {
        transform: translateX(-8px);
        color: #3DD068;
    }
    .jf-survey-btn-chevron {
        position: absolute;
        right: 36px;
        top: 50%;
        transform: translateY(-50%);
        opacity: 0;
        width: 14px;
        height: 14px;
        transition: opacity 0.2s;
    }
    .jf-survey-btn:hover .jf-survey-btn-chevron {
        opacity: 1;
    }
    .jf-survey-btn-chevron polyline {
        stroke: #3DD068;
        stroke-width: 2.5;
        stroke-linecap: round;
        stroke-linejoin: round;
        fill: none;
    }
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .jf-survey-banner {
        display: none;
    }
}
</style>

<!-- SURVEY BANNER -->
<div class="jf-survey-banner">
    <div class="jf-survey-inner">
        <div class="jf-survey-text">
            <p class="jf-survey-text-heading">How satisfied are you with JFrog Docs?</p>
            <p class="jf-survey-text-sub">Take 1 minute to help us improve</p>
        </div>
        <a class="jf-survey-btn" href="#" onclick="if(window.Appcues) Appcues.track('Survey click', { location: 'home' }); return false;">
            <span class="jf-survey-btn-label">Share Feedback</span>
            <svg class="jf-survey-btn-chevron" viewBox="0 0 14 14" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                <polyline points="4,2 10,7 4,12"/>
            </svg>
        </a>
    </div>
</div>

    <script>
        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
            console.log("JFrog Theme Loaded");

            const hamburgerBtn = document.getElementById("jf-mobile-hamburger-btn");
            const overlay = document.getElementById("jf-mobile-drawer-overlay");
            const backdrop = document.getElementById("jf-mobile-drawer-backdrop");
            const closeBtn = document.getElementById("jf-mobile-drawer-close");

            function openDrawer() {
                if (overlay) overlay.classList.add("jf-drawer-open");
                document.body.style.overflow = "hidden";
            }
            function closeDrawer() {
                if (overlay) overlay.classList.remove("jf-drawer-open");
                document.body.style.overflow = "";
            }

            if (hamburgerBtn) hamburgerBtn.addEventListener("click", openDrawer);
            if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener("click", closeDrawer);
            if (backdrop) backdrop.addEventListener("click", closeDrawer);
        });
    </script>
</body></div><footer aria-label="Status banner" class="Footer2U8XAPoGhlgO AppFooter rm-Banners"></footer><footer><!-- ==========================
