border-bottom: 1px solid #8080800f;\n}\n\n/* ==========================================================================\n   4. SIDEBAR LINKS (TEXT + STATES)\n   ========================================================================== */\n\n/* Main link row – NO fixed height */\n.rm-Sidebar.hub-sidebar.reference-redesign.Nav3C5f8FcjkaHj\n  .rm-Sidebar-link {\n  display: block;\n  padding: 8px 40px;\n  text-decoration: none;\n}\n\n/* Link text */\n.rm-Sidebar.hub-sidebar.reference-redesign.Nav3C5f8FcjkaHj .Sidebar-link-text_label1gCT_uPnx7Gu {\n    display: block;\n    font-style: normal;\n    font-weight: 600;\n    font-size: 14px;\n    line-height: 22px;\n    color: #343a4b;\n    white-space: normal;\n    overflow: visible;\n    max-width: 260px;\n    word-wrap: normal;\n    word-break: break-word;\n}\n\n/* Hover state */\n.rm-Sidebar.hub-sidebar.reference-redesign.Nav3C5f8FcjkaHj\n  .rm-Sidebar-link:hover {\n  background: #ccd5de36;\n}\n\n/* Active state (background + radius) */\n.rm-Sidebar.hub-sidebar.reference-redesign.Nav3C5f8FcjkaHj\n  .rm-Sidebar-link.active,\n.rm-Sidebar.hub-sidebar.reference-redesign.Nav3C5f8FcjkaHj\n  .rm-Sidebar-link[aria-current=\"page\"] {\n  background: #d3dadf82;\n  border-radius: 0;\n}\n\n/* Attempt to bold active link text (kept exactly as you had it) */\n.rm-Sidebar.hub-sidebar.reference-redesign.Nav3C5f8FcjkaHj\n  .rm-Sidebar-link.active a,\n.rm-Sidebar.hub-sidebar.reference-redesign.Nav3C5f8FcjkaHj\n  .rm-Sidebar-link[aria-current=\"page\"] a {\n  font-weight: bold !important;\n}\n\n\n\n/* ==========================================================================\n   5. EXPANDABLE ROWS (ARROW + ADA FIX)\n   ========================================================================== */\n\n/* Keep link + caret on one line (ADA fix) */\n.rm-Sidebar .rm-sidebar-linkRow {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  gap: 4px;\n}\n\n.rm-Sidebar .rm-sidebar-linkRow > a.rm-Sidebar-link {\n  flex: 1 1 auto;\n}\n\n.rm-Sidebar .rm-sidebar-linkRow > .Sidebar-link-buttonWrapper3hnFHNku8_BJ {\n  flex: 0 0 auto;\n}\n\n/* Chevron rotation */\n.rm-Sidebar .rm-sidebar-linkRow i.Sidebar-link-expandIcon2yVH6SarI6NW {\n  transition: transform 150ms ease;\n}\n\n.rm-Sidebar\n  .rm-sidebar-linkRow\n  i.Sidebar-link-expandIcon2yVH6SarI6NW.rm-sidebar-rotated {\n  transform: rotate(90deg);\n}\n\n/* Chevron icon size */\n.reference-redesign .Sidebar-link-iconnjiqEiZlPn0W {\n  font-size: 20px;\n}\n\n/* Parent links with chevrons: text left + arrow right */\n.rm-Sidebar-link.Sidebar-link_parent {\n  display: flex !important;\n  align-items: center !important;\n  justify-content: space-between !important;\n  width: 100%;\n}\n\n\n\n/* ==========================================================================\n   JFrog Global Footer\n   ========================================================================== */\n\n.jf-footer {\n  background: #111517;\n  color: #ffffff;\n  padding: 75px 0 0;\n  font-family: \"Open Sans\", system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, \"Segoe UI\", sans-serif;\n}\n\n.jf-footer-top {\n  max-width: 1300px;\n  margin: 0 auto 40px;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  gap: 48px;\n}\n\n.jf-footer-columns-row {\n  display: flex;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  align-items: flex-start;\n  gap: 72px;\n}\n\n.jf-footer-columns-left {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-wrap: wrap;\n  align-items: flex-start;\n  align-content: flex-start;\n  gap: 0 80px;\n  max-width: 792px;\n}\n\n.jf-footer-col {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  padding-bottom: 10px;\n  gap: 32px;\n}\n\n.jf-footer-col-products  { width: 120px; }\n.jf-footer-col-resources { width: 192px; }\n.jf-footer-col-company   { width: 117px; }\n.jf-footer-col-developer { width: 123px; }\n\n.jf-footer-heading {\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-size: 18px;\n  line-height: 24px;\n}\n\n.jf-footer-links {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  gap: 17px;\n}\n\n.jf-footer-link {\n  font-size: 14px;\n  line-height: 18px;\n  text-decoration: none;\n  color: #ffffff;\n}\n.jf-footer-link:hover {\n  color: #40be46;\n}\n\n/* FOLLOW US */\n.jf-footer-right {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  gap: 24px;\n}\n\n.jf-footer-follow-row {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 16px;\n}\n\n.jf-footer-social-icons {\n  display: flex;\n  gap: 12px;\n}\n\n.jf-footer-social-icon img {\n  display: block;\n  width: 36px;\n  height: 36px;\n}\n\n.jf-footer-copy {\n  font-size: 16px;\n  line-height: 24px;\n}\n\n/* DISCOVER MORE */\n.jf-footer-discover-row {\n  max-width: 1300px;\n  width: 100%;\n  margin-left: 0 !important;\n  margin-right: 0 !important;\n  margin-top: 32px;\n  padding-left: 0 !important;\n  display: flex;\n  justify-content: flex-start;\n  align-items: center;\n}\n\n.jf-footer-discover-title {\n  font-size: 18px;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  line-height: 24px;\n}\n\n.jf-footer-discover-right {\n  margin-left: auto;\n  display: flex;\n  gap: 182px;\n}\n\n/* BOTTOM BAR */\n.jf-footer-bottom {\n  border-top: 1px solid #4c585c;\n  padding: 23px 0 22px;\n}\n\n.jf-footer-bottom-inner {\n  max-width: 1330px;\n  margin: 0 auto;\n  display: flex;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  align-items: center;\n}\n\n.jf-footer-logo-img {\n  width: 120px;\n  height: auto;\n}\n\n.jf-footer-legal-links {\n  display: flex;\n  gap: 48px;\n}\n\n/* ==========================================================================\n   JFrog Footer — Mobile/Responsive Fixes (ADD ONLY; do not modify existing)\n   ========================================================================== */\n\n/* Give the footer some safe horizontal padding on all screens */\n.jf-footer {\n  padding-left: 20px;\n  padding-right: 20px;\n}\n\n/* Keep inner rows from touching the edges */\n.jf-footer-top,\n.jf-footer-bottom-inner {\n  width: 100%;\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n}\n\n/* Let long link text wrap nicely (e.g., \"Software Supply Chain Topics\") */\n.jf-footer-link,\n.jf-footer-heading,\n.jf-footer-copy,\n.jf-footer-follow-label,\n.jf-footer-legal-links span {\n  overflow-wrap: anywhere;\n  word-break: normal;\n}\n\n/* -----------------------------\n   Tablet + down\n------------------------------ */\n@media (max-width: 900px) {\n  .jf-footer {\n    padding-top: 56px;\n  }\n\n  .jf-footer-top {\n    margin-bottom: 28px;\n    gap: 28px;\n  }\n\n  /* Stack left columns and right \"Follow Us\" area */\n  .jf-footer-columns-row {\n    flex-direction: column;\n    align-items: stretch;\n    gap: 28px;\n  }\n\n  /* Make the left area full width */\n  .jf-footer-columns-left {\n    max-width: none;\n    width: 100%;\n  }\n\n  /* Drop fixed widths so columns can flow */\n  .jf-footer-col-products,\n  .jf-footer-col-resources,\n  .jf-footer-col-company,\n  .jf-footer-col-developer {\n    width: auto;\n  }\n\n  /* Put footer columns into a 2-up grid */\n  .jf-footer-columns-left {\n    display: grid;\n    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));\n    column-gap: 24px;\n    row-gap: 28px;\n    align-items: start;\n    justify-content: space-around;\n    align-content: center;\n    justify-items: center;\n  }\n\n  .jf-footer-col {\n    gap: 18px; /* tighter than desktop */\n    padding-bottom: 0;\n    min-width: 0;\n  }\n\n  .jf-footer-links {\n    gap: 12px;\n  }\n\n  /* Right section becomes a normal full-width row */\n  .jf-footer-right {\n    width: 100%;\n    gap: 16px;\n  }\n\n  .jf-footer-follow-row {\n    justify-content: flex-start;\n    flex-wrap: wrap;\n    row-gap: 10px;\n  }\n\n  .jf-footer-social-icons {\n    flex-wrap: wrap;\n    gap: 10px;\n  }\n\n  /* Bottom bar stacks and wraps cleanly */\n  .jf-footer-bottom-inner {\n    flex-direction: column;\n    align-items: flex-start;\n    gap: 16px;\n  }\n\n  .jf-footer-legal-links {\n    width: 100%;\n    flex-wrap: wrap;\n    gap: 14px 20px;\n    align-items: center;\n  }\n\n  .jf-footer-legal-links span {\n    flex: 1 1 100%;\n  }\n}\n\n/* -----------------------------\n   Phone\n------------------------------ */\n@media (max-width: 520px) {\n  .jf-footer {\n    padding-left: 16px;\n    padding-right: 16px;\n    padding-top: 48px;\n  }\n\n  .jf-footer-heading {\n    font-size: 18px;\n    line-height: 24px;\n  }\n\n  .jf-footer-link {\n    font-size: 15px;\n    line-height: 20px;\n  }\n\n  /* Keep Follow Us + icons from drifting */\n  .jf-footer-follow-row {\n    gap: 12px;\n  }\n\n  .jf-footer-social-icon img {\n    width: 32px;\n    height: 32px;\n  }\n\n  /* Copyright text should wrap and align left */\n  .jf-footer-copy {\n    font-size: 14px;\n    line-height: 20px;\n    text-align: left;\n  }\n\n  /* Bottom bar spacing tighter */\n  .jf-footer-bottom {\n    padding: 18px 0 18px;\n  }\n\n  .jf-footer-logo-img {\n    width: 96px;\n  }\n\n  .jf-footer-legal-links {\n    gap: 10px 16px;\n  }\n}\n\n\n/* TEMP INLINE IMAGE ICONS FIX (coupled with JS) */\nimg.inline-icon {\n  max-width: 20px !important;\n  max-height: 20px !important;\n  width: auto !important;\n  height: auto !important;\n  vertical-align: text-bottom;\n  display: inline-block;\n}\n\n/* ==========================================================================\n   ReadMe TOC: consistent depth indentation + clean markers\n   (Deep-TOC friendly: 0..5 depth + compressed indent after level 2)\n   ========================================================================== */\n\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] {\n  --toc-font-size: 13px;\n  --toc-line-height: 1.35;\n\n  --toc-pad-y: 7px;\n  --toc-pad-x: 10px;\n\n  --toc-indent-0: 12px;  /* top level */\n  --toc-indent-1: 28px;  /* level 2 */\n  --toc-indent-2: 27px;  /* level 3 (this is the last \"normal\" step) */\n  --toc-indent-3: 27px;  /* level 4 (compressed) */\n  --toc-indent-4: 27px;  /* level 5 (compressed) */\n  --toc-indent-5: 27px;  /* level 6+ (compressed cap) */\n\n  /* marker spacing */\n  --toc-marker-gap: 10px;\n\n  /* colors */\n  --toc-bg-sub: #f7f7f7;\n  --toc-rail: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);\n  --toc-rail-deep: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.10);\n  --toc-hover: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.045);\n  --toc-active: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.07);\n\n  --toc-toggle-bg: #6fce74;\n  --toc-toggle-fg: #fff;\n\n  /* sublist rail placement by depth */\n  --toc-sublist-inset-1: 14px;\n  --toc-sublist-inset-2: 27px;\n  --toc-sublist-inset-3: 29px;\n\n  opacity: 0;\n  animation: showToc 0s forwards;\n  animation-delay: 0.2s;\n\n  border-left: 2px solid rgba(176, 176, 176, 0.32);\n}\n\n@keyframes showToc { to { opacity: 1; } }\n\n/* Huge TOCs: make scrollable */\n.content-toc {\n  padding: 24px 4px 24px 24px !important;\n}\n\n/* ---------------------------------------------------------\n   HARD RESET: kill ReadMe ul/li indentation & bullets\n   --------------------------------------------------------- */\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] ul,\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] li {\n  margin: 0 !important;\n  padding: 0 !important;\n  list-style: none !important;\n}\n\n/* Kill any global .content-toc ul padding rules */\n.content-toc nav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] ul {\n  padding-left: 0 !important;\n}\n\n/* ---------------------------------------------------------\n   Depth propagation: set depth by nesting level (0..5)\n   --------------------------------------------------------- */\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-children > ul { --toc-depth: 0; }\n\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-children > ul ul.toc-sublist { --toc-depth: 1; }\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-children > ul ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist { --toc-depth: 2; }\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-children > ul ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist { --toc-depth: 3; }\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-children > ul ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist { --toc-depth: 4; }\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-children > ul ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist { --toc-depth: 5; }\n\n/* Anything deeper than 5: keep it at 5 so it never becomes unusable */\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-children > ul ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist {\n  --toc-depth: 5;\n}\n\n/* ---------------------------------------------------------\n   Link layout: marker never overlaps text\n   --------------------------------------------------------- */\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-children a[href^=\"#\"]:not([href=\"#\"]) {\n  color: var(--color-text-minimum);\n  font-size: var(--toc-font-size);\n  line-height: var(--toc-line-height);\n  text-decoration: none;\n\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: flex-start;\n  gap: var(--toc-marker-gap);\n\n  padding-top: var(--toc-pad-y) !important;\n  padding-bottom: var(--toc-pad-y) !important;\n  padding-right: var(--toc-pad-x) !important;\n\n  margin-left: 0 !important;\n\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n}\n\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-children a[href^=\"#\"]:not([href=\"#\"]):hover {\n  background: var(--toc-hover);\n}\n\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-children a[href^=\"#\"]:not([href=\"#\"]):focus-visible {\n  outline: 2px solid rgba(111, 206, 116, 0.45);\n  outline-offset: 2px;\n}\n\n/* ---------------------------------------------------------\n   Markers by depth\n   --------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/* base marker */\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-children a[href^=\"#\"]:not([href=\"#\"])::before {\n  content: \"\";\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n  border-radius: 999px;\n  margin-top: 0.45em;\n  flex: 0 0 auto;\n}\n\n/* depth 0: zero-size (no visible marker) */\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-children > ul > li > a[href^=\"#\"]::before,\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-children > ul > li > .toc-item-header > a[href^=\"#\"]::before {\n  width: 0 !important;\n  height: 0 !important;\n  flex: 0 0 0 !important;\n  margin: 0 !important;\n}\n\n/* depth 1: solid (slightly smaller) */\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-children > ul ul.toc-sublist > li > a[href^=\"#\"]::before,\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-children > ul ul.toc-sublist > li > .toc-item-header > a[href^=\"#\"]::before {\n  width: 6px;\n  height: 6px;\n  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35);\n  border: none;\n  flex-basis: 6px;\n}\n\n/* depth 2: hollow */\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-children > ul ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist > li > a[href^=\"#\"]::before,\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-children > ul ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist > li > .toc-item-header > a[href^=\"#\"]::before {\n  width: 6px;\n  height: 6px;\n  background: transparent;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28);\n  flex-basis: 6px;\n}\n\n/* depth 3+: smaller hollow */\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-children > ul ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist a[href^=\"#\"]::before {\n  width: 5px;\n  height: 5px;\n  background: transparent;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22);\n  flex-basis: 5px;\n}\n\n/* deepest: tiniest hollow */\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-children > ul ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist a[href^=\"#\"]::before,\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-children > ul ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist a[href^=\"#\"]::before {\n  width: 4px;\n  height: 4px;\n  background: transparent;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18);\n  flex-basis: 4px;\n}\n\n/* Deep levels: slightly tighter vertical rhythm */\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-children > ul ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist a[href^=\"#\"]:not([href=\"#\"]) {\n  padding-top: 6px !important;\n  padding-bottom: 6px !important;\n}\n\n/* ---------------------------------------------------------\n   Collapsible rows: keep header neutral; link controls indent\n   --------------------------------------------------------- */\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-item-header {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 10px;\n  padding: 0 !important;\n  margin: 0 !important;\n}\n\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-item-header > a[href^=\"#\"] {\n  flex: 1 1 auto;\n  margin-left: 0 !important;\n}\n\n/* ReadMe sometimes injects inline padding/margins — force our layout */\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-item-header,\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-item-header > a[href^=\"#\"],\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-children a[href^=\"#\"]:not([href=\"#\"]) {\n  margin-left: 0 !important;\n}\n\n/* Toggle */\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .toc-toggle {\n  border: none;\n  background: var(--toc-toggle-bg);\n  color: var(--toc-toggle-fg);\n  cursor: pointer;\n  font-size: 1em;\n  font-weight: 800;\n  line-height: 1;\n\n  width: 18px;\n  height: 18px;\n  display: inline-flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n\n  padding: 0;\n  margin-right: 6px;\n  border-radius: 5px;\n  flex: 0 0 auto;\n}\n\n/* ---------------------------------------------------------\n   Sublist containers\n   --------------------------------------------------------- */\n\n/* depth 1 sublist */\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] ul.toc-sublist {\n  background: var(--toc-bg-sub);\n  border-left: 2px solid var(--toc-rail);\n\n  margin: 4px 0 10px var(--toc-sublist-inset-1) !important;\n  padding: 6px 0 !important;\n\n  width: calc(100% - var(--toc-sublist-inset-1));\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n}\n\n/* depth 2 sublist */\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist {\n  background: transparent;\n  border-left: 1px solid var(--toc-rail-deep);\n\n  margin: 2px 0 10px var(--toc-sublist-inset-2) !important;\n  padding: 4px 0 !important;\n\n  width: calc(100% - var(--toc-sublist-inset-2));\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n}\n\n/* depth 3+ sublists */\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist ul.toc-sublist {\n  background: transparent;\n  border-left: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);\n\n  margin: 2px 0 10px var(--toc-sublist-inset-3) !important;\n  padding: 2px 0 !important;\n\n  width: calc(100% - var(--toc-sublist-inset-3));\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n}\n\n/* ---------------------------------------------------------\n   Active link\n   --------------------------------------------------------- */\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"] .is-active-toc-link {\n  font-weight: 800 !important;\n  color: #000 !important;\n  background: var(--toc-active) !important;\n}\n\n/* ===============================================\n   GLOBAL OVERRIDE: Normalize indent for all levels\n   =============================================== */\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"]\n  .toc-children a[href^=\"#\"],\nnav[aria-label=\"Table of contents\"]\n  .toc-children .toc-item-header > a[href^=\"#\"] {\n  padding-left: 10px !important;\n}\n\n\n/* =========================================================\n   ReadMe Callouts — Figma Typography + Hosted SVG Icons\n   ========================================================= */\n\n.markdown-body blockquote.callout {\n  --rm-callout-radius: 22px;\n  --rm-callout-pad-y: 22px;\n  --rm-callout-pad-x: 24px;\n  --rm-callout-gap: 10px;\n\n  --rm-callout-bg: #f3f4f6;\n  --rm-callout-text: var(--text-primary, #414857);\n\n  --rm-icon-size: 29px;\n\n  margin: 24px 0 !important;\n  padding: var(--rm-callout-pad-y) var(--rm-callout-pad-x) !important;\n\n  background: var(--rm-callout-bg) !important;\n  border: 0 !important;\n  border-radius: var(--rm-callout-radius) !important;\n  box-shadow: none !important;\n\n  display: grid !important;\n  grid-template-columns: var(--rm-icon-size) 1fr !important;\n  column-gap: var(--rm-callout-gap) !important;\n  align-items: flex-start !important;\n}\n\n/* Hide default emoji icon */\n.markdown-body blockquote.callout > .callout-icon {\n  display: none !important;\n}\n\n/* Ensure all other content sits in column 2 */\n.markdown-body blockquote.callout > :not(.callout-icon) {\n  grid-column: 2 !important;\n}\n\n/* Title (first paragraph or h3) */\n.markdown-body blockquote.callout > :is(h3, p:first-of-type) {\n  margin: 0 !important;\n  padding: 0 !important;\n  font-family: \"Open Sans\", system-ui, -apple-system, \"Segoe UI\", Roboto, sans-serif !important;\n  font-weight: 600 !important;\n  font-size: 16px !important;\n  line-height: 22px !important;\n  color: var(--rm-callout-text) !important;\n}\n\n/* Description */\n.markdown-body blockquote.callout > p:not(:first-of-type) {\n  margin: 6px 0 0 !important;\n  font-family: \"Open Sans\", system-ui, -apple-system, \"Segoe UI\", Roboto, sans-serif !important;\n  font-weight: 400 !important;\n  font-size: 14px !important;\n  line-height: 22px !important;\n  color: var(--rm-callout-text) !important;\n}\n\n/* Lists */\n.markdown-body blockquote.callout :is(ul, ol) {\n  margin: 6px 0 0 !important;\n  padding-left: 20px !important;\n  font-family: \"Open Sans\", system-ui, -apple-system, \"Segoe UI\", Roboto, sans-serif !important;\n  font-weight: 400 !important;\n  font-size: 14px !important;\n  line-height: 22px !important;\n  color: var(--rm-callout-text) !important;\n}\n\n/* =========================================================\n   ICONS (SVGs hosted on ReadMe CDN)\n   ========================================================= */\n\n.markdown-body blockquote.callout::before {\n  content: \"\" !important;\n  grid-column: 1 !important;\n  grid-row: 1 / span 99 !important;\n  width: var(--rm-icon-size) !important;\n  height: var(--rm-icon-size) !important;\n  margin-top: -5px !important;\n  background-repeat: no-repeat !important;\n  background-position: center !important;\n  background-size: contain !important;\n}\n\n/* INFO */\n.markdown-body .callout.callout_info {\n  --rm-callout-bg: var(--background-info-secondary-light, #EEF3F8);\n}\n.markdown-body .callout.callout_info::before {\n  background-image: url(\"https://files.readme.io/47ba5590670f7d485701586b48f6b44e9dc04d8e51f01baa8e5ed307680fde53-info-circle-fill.svg\");\n}\n\n/* WARNING */\n.markdown-body .callout.callout_warn {\n  --rm-callout-bg: var(--background-warning-tertiary, #FBF1DD);\n}\n.markdown-body .callout.callout_warn::before {\n  background-image: url(\"https://files.readme.io/529ea59e672f3f76476bf63dd550833b513bb0bddad665003d7f6115b4f54bd6-caution-circle-fill.svg\");\n}\n\n.markdown-body .callout.callout_warning {\n  --rm-callout-bg: var(--background-warning-tertiary, #FBF1DD);\n}\n.markdown-body .callout.callout_warning::before {\n  background-image: url(\"https://files.readme.io/529ea59e672f3f76476bf63dd550833b513bb0bddad665003d7f6115b4f54bd6-caution-circle-fill.svg\");\n}\n\n/* ERROR */\n.markdown-body .callout.callout_error {\n  --rm-callout-bg: var(--background-danger-tertiary, #FFF1F2);\n}\n.markdown-body .callout.callout_error::before {\n  background-image: url(\"https://files.readme.io/32d7a6d08e013208976d2aef59481fa830c084861a6d86634f4d5a49f11267b6-warning-fill.svg\");\n}\n\n/* OKAY / SUCCESS */\n.markdown-body .callout.callout_okay,\n.markdown-body .callout.callout_success {\n  --rm-callout-bg: var(--background-success-tertiary, #E9F7EF);\n}\n.markdown-body .callout.callout_okay::before,\n.markdown-body .callout.callout_success::before {\n  background-image: url(\"https://files.readme.io/74ad22b8f1d0e25f9ef0f3bb2ef8a1b6928b05f836b292a417f8cfb91e5b9124-check-circle-fill.svg\");\n}\n\n/* TIP / NOTE */\n.markdown-body .callout.callout_tip,\n.markdown-body .callout.callout_note {\n  --rm-callout-bg: var(--background-tip-tertiary, #F0F7FF);\n}\n.markdown-body .callout.callout_tip::before,\n.markdown-body .callout.callout_note::before {\n  background-image: url(\"https://files.readme.io/1f0b44a3b9a57c5c7d617c9bb9a9c0a3-idea-lightbulb.svg\");\n}\n\n/* =========================================================\n   ADDITIONAL FIX (GREEN): show the existing ✅ span icon\n   - ONLY affects .callout_okay + .callout_success\n   - Does NOT touch info/warn/error/tip/note\n   ========================================================= */\n\n/* 1) Turn OFF pseudo-element icon for green ones */\n.markdown-body .callout.callout_okay::before,\n.markdown-body .callout.callout_success::before {\n  content: none !important;\n  background-image: none !important;\n}\n\n/* 2) Re-enable ReadMe's built-in \u003cspan class=\"callout-icon\">✅\u003c/span> for green ones ONLY */\n.markdown-body .callout.callout_okay > .callout-icon,\n.markdown-body .callout.callout_success > .callout-icon {\n  display: block !important;\n  grid-column: 1 !important;\n  grid-row: 1 / span 99 !important;\n  width: var(--rm-icon-size) !important;\n  height: var(--rm-icon-size) !important;\n  margin-top: -5px !important;\n  font-size: 20px !important;\n  line-height: 22px !important;\n  text-align: center !important;\n}\n\n/* 3) Keep text in column 2 */\n.markdown-body .callout.callout_okay > :not(.callout-icon),\n.markdown-body .callout.callout_success > :not(.callout-icon) {\n  grid-column: 2 !important;\n}\n\n\n\n/* =========================================================\n   Figures + Captions — Figma typography + spacing rules\n   ========================================================= */\n\n.markdown-body figure {\n  display: flex !important;\n  flex-direction: column !important;\n  align-items: center !important;\n  text-align: center !important;\n  margin: 0 !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body figure .lightbox-inner {\n  display: inline-flex !important;\n  flex-direction: column !important;\n  align-items: flex-start !important;\n  text-align: left !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body figure img {\n  display: block !important;\n  margin: 0 auto !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body figure figcaption,\n.markdown-body figcaption {\n  display: block !important;\n  max-width: 100% !important;\n\n  margin-top: 12px !important;\n  margin-bottom: 32px !important;\n\n  font-family: \"Open Sans\", system-ui, -apple-system, \"Segoe UI\", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif !important;\n  font-weight: 400 !important;\n  font-style: normal !important;\n  font-size: 14px !important;\n  line-height: 22px !important;\n  letter-spacing: 0 !important;\n\n  text-align: left !important;\n  color: var(--text-primary, #414857) !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body figure figcaption > p {\n  margin: 0 !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body figure figcaption em,\n.markdown-body figcaption em,\n.markdown-body figure figcaption i,\n.markdown-body figcaption i {\n  font-style: normal !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body figure:has(img[alt*=\"left\" i]) {\n  align-items: flex-start !important;\n  text-align: left !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body figure img[alt*=\"left\" i] {\n  margin-left: 0 !important;\n  margin-right: auto !important;\n}\n\n/* =========================================================\n   Custom Markdown Lists — match Figma bullets + vertical rhythm\n   (disc → circle → en-dash)\n   ========================================================= */\n\n.markdown-body {\n  --rm-list-font-size: 14px;\n  --rm-list-line-height: 22px;\n  --rm-list-item-gap: 12px;\n  --rm-list-nested-gap: 12px;\n  --rm-list-indent: 28px;\n  --rm-list-marker-color: #6B7280;\n}\n\n.markdown-body ul,\n.markdown-body ol {\n  margin: 0 0 var(--rm-list-nested-gap) 0 !important;\n  padding-left: var(--rm-list-indent) !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body li {\n  margin: 0 0 var(--rm-list-item-gap) 0 !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body li > p {\n  margin: 0 !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body li,\n.markdown-body li > p {\n  font-family: \"Open Sans\", system-ui, -apple-system, \"Segoe UI\", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif !important;\n  font-weight: 400 !important;\n  font-size: var(--rm-list-font-size) !important;\n  line-height: var(--rm-list-line-height) !important;\n  color: var(--text-primary, #414857) !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body li > ul,\n.markdown-body li > ol {\n  margin-top: var(--rm-list-nested-gap) !important;\n  margin-bottom: 0 !important;\n}\n\n/* Bullets by depth */\n.markdown-body ul > li {\n  list-style-type: disc !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body ul ul > li {\n  list-style-type: circle !important;\n}\n\n/* Level 3 en-dash */\n.markdown-body ul ul ul > li {\n  list-style: none !important;\n  position: relative !important;\n  padding-left: 0 !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body ul ul ul > li::before {\n  content: \"–\" !important;\n  position: absolute !important;\n  left: calc(-1 * (var(--rm-list-indent) - 6px)) !important;\n  top: 0 !important;\n  line-height: var(--rm-list-line-height) !important;\n  color: var(--rm-list-marker-color) !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body li::marker {\n  color: var(--rm-list-marker-color) !important;\n}\n\n/* =========================================================\n   Ordered Lists — match screenshot (1., a., i.) + spacing\n   ========================================================= */\n\n.markdown-body {\n  --rm-ol-font-size: 14px;\n  --rm-ol-line-height: 22px;\n  --rm-ol-item-gap: 12px;\n  --rm-ol-nested-gap: 12px;\n  --rm-ol-indent: 28px;\n  --rm-ol-marker-color: #6B7280;\n}\n\n.markdown-body ol {\n  margin: 0 0 var(--rm-ol-nested-gap) 0 !important;\n  padding-left: var(--rm-ol-indent) !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body ol > li {\n  margin: 0 0 var(--rm-ol-item-gap) 0 !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body ol > li > p {\n  margin: 0 !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body ol li,\n.markdown-body ol li > p {\n  font-family: \"Open Sans\", system-ui, -apple-system, \"Segoe UI\", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif !important;\n  font-weight: 400 !important;\n  font-size: var(--rm-ol-font-size) !important;\n  line-height: var(--rm-ol-line-height) !important;\n  color: var(--text-primary, #414857) !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body ol li::marker {\n  color: var(--rm-ol-marker-color) !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body ol li > ol {\n  margin-top: var(--rm-ol-nested-gap) !important;\n  margin-bottom: 0 !important;\n}\n\n/* Level formats: 1., a., i. */\n.markdown-body ol {\n  list-style-type: decimal !important;\n}\n.markdown-body ol ol {\n  list-style-type: lower-alpha !important;\n}\n.markdown-body ol ol ol {\n  list-style-type: lower-roman !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body ol ol,\n.markdown-body ol ol ol {\n  padding-left: var(--rm-ol-indent) !important;\n}\n\n/* =========================================================\n   ReadMe CodeTabs\n   ========================================================= */\n\n.markdown-body .CodeTabs {\n  border: 0 !important;\n  border-radius: 12px !important;\n  overflow: hidden !important;\n  background: #F6F8FC !important;\n  margin-bottom: 25px !important;\n}\n\n/* ---------- Toolbar (40px tall) ---------- */\n.markdown-body .CodeTabs .CodeTabs-toolbar {\n  background: #C9D0E3 !important;\n  height: 40px !important;\n  padding: 0 28px !important;\n  border: 0 !important;\n\n  display: flex !important;\n  align-items: center !important;\n  gap: 18px !important;\n}\n\n/* Tabs */\n.markdown-body .CodeTabs .CodeTabs-toolbar button {\n  appearance: none !important;\n  border: 0 !important;\n  background: transparent !important;\n  margin: 0 !important;\n\n  height: 40px !important;\n  padding: 0 2px !important;\n\n  font-family: \"Open Sans\", system-ui, -apple-system, \"Segoe UI\", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif !important;\n  font-weight: 600 !important;\n  font-size: 14px !important;\n  line-height: 19px !important;\n  letter-spacing: 0 !important;\n  text-align: center !important;\n\n  color: #3F4656 !important;\n  cursor: pointer !important;\n\n  position: relative !important;\n}\n\n/* Underline base — thin + flush to bottom edge */\n.markdown-body .CodeTabs .CodeTabs-toolbar button::after {\n  content: \"\" !important;\n  position: absolute !important;\n  left: 0 !important;\n  right: 0 !important;\n  bottom: 0 !important;\n  height: 2px !important;\n  border-radius: 0 !important;\n  background: transparent !important;\n}\n\n/* Active underline */\n.markdown-body .CodeTabs .CodeTabs-toolbar button.CodeTabs_active::after {\n  background: #415980 !important;\n}\n\n/* Optional: slightly dim inactive tabs */\n.markdown-body .CodeTabs .CodeTabs-toolbar button:not(.CodeTabs_active) {\n  opacity: 0.95 !important;\n}\n\n/* If ReadMe hasn't set an active tab yet, underline the first button */\n.markdown-body .CodeTabs .CodeTabs-toolbar:not(:has(button.CodeTabs_active)) button:first-child::after {\n  background: #415980 !important;\n}\n\n/* If/when ReadMe sets the active class, use it */\n.markdown-body .CodeTabs .CodeTabs-toolbar button.CodeTabs_active::after {\n  background: #415980 !important;\n}\n\n/* ---------- Code area ---------- */\n.markdown-body .CodeTabs .CodeTabs-inner {\n  background: #F6F8FC !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body .CodeTabs .CodeTabs-inner pre {\n  margin: 0 !important;\n  padding: 18px 22px 22px !important;\n  background: #F8FAFB !important;\n  border: 0 !important;\n  position: relative !important;\n  overflow: auto !important;\n}\n\n/* Code typography (keep token colors) */\n.markdown-body .CodeTabs code.rdmd-code,\n.markdown-body .CodeTabs .cm-s-neo {\n  font-family: \"Overpass Mono\", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, \"Liberation Mono\", \"Courier New\",\n    monospace !important;\n  font-weight: 400 !important;\n  font-size: 14px !important;\n  line-height: 22px !important;\n  letter-spacing: 0 !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body pre>code {\n    display: block !important;\n    overflow: auto;\n    padding: 0em;\n    max-height: 90vh;\n}\n\n/* Ensure no extra wrapper background */\n.markdown-body .CodeTabs code.rdmd-code > div,\n.markdown-body .CodeTabs .cm-s-neo {\n  background: transparent !important;\n}\n\n/* =========================================================\n   CodeTabs Copy Button — ALWAYS visible + big SVG + dim on hover\n   ========================================================= */\n\n.markdown-body .CodeTabs pre > button.rdmd-code-copy:not(.rdmd-code-copy_copied),\n.markdown-body .CodeTabs pre > button.rdmd-code-copy.rdmd-code-copy_copied {\n  opacity: 1 !important;\n  visibility: visible !important;\n  pointer-events: auto !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body .CodeTabs pre > button.rdmd-code-copy {\n  position: absolute !important;\n  top: 16px !important;\n  right: 18px !important;\n\n  width: 34px !important;\n  height: 34px !important;\n\n  border: 0 !important;\n  padding: 0 !important;\n  border-radius: 8px !important;\n\n  background-color: transparent !important;\n  background-image: url(\"https://files.readme.io/bb7898cd91039961aa2c8591b27c4d558cd18d4c7e91704f9aa582c368adecae-Frame_1000005941.svg\") !important;\n  background-repeat: no-repeat !important;\n  background-position: center !important;\n  background-size: 34px 34px !important;\n\n  outline: none !important;\n  box-shadow: none !important;\n\n  font-size: 0 !important;\n  line-height: 0 !important;\n  color: transparent !important;\n}\n\n/* Hard-kill FontAwesome glyph */\n.markdown-body .CodeTabs pre > button.rdmd-code-copy.fa::before,\n.markdown-body .CodeTabs pre > button.rdmd-code-copy::before,\n.markdown-body .CodeTabs pre > button.rdmd-code-copy::after {\n  content: \"\" !important;\n  display: none !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body .CodeTabs pre > button.rdmd-code-copy:hover {\n  opacity: 0.65 !important;\n  background-color: transparent !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body .CodeTabs pre > button.rdmd-code-copy:focus,\n.markdown-body .CodeTabs pre > button.rdmd-code-copy:focus-visible {\n  outline: none !important;\n  box-shadow: none !important;\n}\n\n\n/* Inline code only (not fenced blocks) */\n.markdown-body :is(p, ul, ol, li, table) code:not(pre code) {\n  font-weight: 400 !important;\n  font-style: normal !important;\n  font-size: 14px !important;\n  line-height: 14px !important;\n  letter-spacing: 0 !important;\n  color: #414857 !important;\n  background: #EAEEF5 !important;\n  border-radius: 4px;\n}\n\n\n.Columns {\n    display: grid;\n    gap: 30px;\n}\n\n\n/* =========================================================\n   Tables — FULL reset + rebuild (prevents double/thick borders)\n   ========================================================= */\n\n/* 1) HARD RESET: kill ReadMe/default borders/outlines everywhere */\n.markdown-body .rdmd-table,\n.markdown-body .rdmd-table-inner,\n.markdown-body table,\n.markdown-body thead,\n.markdown-body tbody,\n.markdown-body tr,\n.markdown-body th,\n.markdown-body td {\n  border: 0 !important;\n  outline: 0 !important;\n  box-shadow: none !important;\n  background-clip: padding-box !important;\n}\n\n/* 2) Table shell */\n.markdown-body .rdmd-table-inner > table,\n.markdown-body table {\n  border-collapse: separate !important;\n  border-spacing: 0 !important;\n  width: 100% !important;\n\n  border: 1px solid #E4E8F0 !important;\n  border-radius: 10px !important;\n  overflow: hidden !important;\n\n  font-family: \"Open Sans\", system-ui, -apple-system, \"Segoe UI\", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif !important;\n  font-size: 14px !important;\n  line-height: 22px !important;\n  color: #3F4656 !important;\n}\n\n/* 3) Header cells */\n.markdown-body table thead th {\n  background: #D3D9E8 !important;\n  font-weight: 600 !important;\n  text-align: left !important;\n  padding: 18px 24px !important;\n\n  border-bottom: 1px solid #E4E8F0 !important;\n  border-right: 1px solid #b4bacc73 !important;\n}\n\n/* remove right border on last header cell */\n.markdown-body table thead th:last-child {\n  border-right: 0 !important;\n}\n\n/* 4) Body cells */\n.markdown-body table tbody td {\n  background: #ffffff !important;\n  padding: 18px 24px !important;\n\n  border-bottom: 1px solid #E4E8F0 !important;\n  border-right: 1px solid #E4E8F0 !important;\n\n  vertical-align: middle !important;\n}\n\n/* remove right border on last column cells */\n.markdown-body table tbody td:last-child {\n  border-right: 0 !important;\n}\n\n/* remove bottom border on last row cells */\n.markdown-body table tbody tr:last-child td {\n  border-bottom: 0 !important;\n}\n\n/* 5) Links + inline code inside tables */\n.markdown-body table a {\n  color: #2F6FEB !important;\n  text-decoration: none !important;\n}\n.markdown-body table a:hover {\n  text-decoration: underline !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body table code {\n  background: #EAEEF5 !important;\n  color: #414857 !important;\n  border-radius: 8px !important;\n  padding: 4px 10px !important;\n  font-family: \"Overpass Mono\", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, \"Liberation Mono\", monospace !important;\n  font-size: 14px !important;\n  line-height: 22px !important;\n}\n\n/* 6) If ReadMe adds zebra striping, kill it */\n.markdown-body table tbody tr:nth-child(odd) td,\n.markdown-body table tbody tr:nth-child(even) td {\n  background: #ffffff !important;\n}\n\n/* =========================================================\n   Tabs (ReadMe TabGroup) — match Figma\n   ========================================================= */\n\n.markdown-body .TabGroup {\n  display: flex !important;\n  flex-direction: column !important;\n  align-items: flex-start !important;\n  gap: 20px !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body .TabGroup > header {\n  width: 100% !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body .TabGroup-nav {\n  position: relative !important;\n  display: flex !important;\n  flex-direction: row !important;\n  align-items: center !important;\n  gap: 24px !important;\n\n  height: 40px !important;\n  padding: 0 !important;\n  margin: 0 !important;\n\n  border-bottom: 1px solid #EAEEF5 !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body .TabGroup-nav button {\n  appearance: none !important;\n  -webkit-appearance: none !important;\n  border: 0 !important;\n  background: transparent !important;\n  margin: 0 !important;\n\n  height: 40px !important;\n  padding: 0 4px !important;\n  min-width: 28px !important;\n\n  display: flex !important;\n  align-items: center !important;\n  justify-content: center !important;\n\n  cursor: pointer !important;\n  white-space: nowrap !important;\n}\n\n/* Inactive tabs */\n.markdown-body .TabGroup-tab {\n  font-family: \"Open Sans\", system-ui, -apple-system, \"Segoe UI\", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif !important;\n  font-weight: 400 !important;\n  font-style: normal !important;\n  font-size: 14px !important;\n  line-height: 22px !important;\n  letter-spacing: 0 !important;\n  text-align: center !important;\n\n  color: #5E6D81 !important;\n}\n\n/* Active tab */\n.markdown-body .TabGroup-tab_active {\n  font-family: \"Open Sans\", system-ui, -apple-system, \"Segoe UI\", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif !important;\n  font-weight: 600 !important;\n  font-style: normal !important;\n  font-size: 14px !important;\n  line-height: 19px !important;\n  letter-spacing: 0 !important;\n  text-align: center !important;\n\n  color: #415980 !important;\n\n  box-shadow: inset 0 -2px 0 #415980 !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body .TabGroup-nav button:hover {\n  color: #415980 !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body .TabGroup-nav button:focus,\n.markdown-body .TabGroup-nav button:focus-visible {\n  outline: none !important;\n  box-shadow: inset 0 -2px 0 #415980 !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body .TabGroup section {\n  width: 100% !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body .TabGroup .TabContent > :first-child {\n  margin-top: 0 !important;\n}\n.markdown-body .TabGroup .TabContent > :last-child {\n  margin-bottom: 0 !important;\n}\n\n/* =========================================================\n   Accordion — Final version (no white slivers anywhere)\n   ========================================================= */\n\n.markdown-body details.Accordion {\n  display: block !important;\n  width: 100% !important;\n  box-sizing: border-box !important;\n  border: 1px solid #C9D0E3 !important;\n  border-radius: 12px !important;\n  background: #fff !important;\n  overflow: hidden !important;\n  margin: 0 0 16px 0 !important;\n  transition: all 0.2s ease !important;\n}\n\ni.Accordion-icon.fa-duotone.fa-solid.fa-info-circle {\n    display: none;\n}\n\n.markdown-body details.Accordion > summary.Accordion-title {\n    display: flex !important;\n    align-items: center !important;\n    gap: 12px !important;\n    width: 100% !important;\n    box-sizing: border-box !important;\n    cursor: pointer !important;\n    list-style: none !important;\n    user-select: none !important;\n    padding: 20px !important;\n    margin: 0 !important;\n    background: #fff !important;\n    border-radius: 12px !important;\n    border: none !important;\n    font-family: \"Open Sans\", system-ui, -apple-system, \"Segoe UI\", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif !important;\n    font-weight: 600 !important;\n    font-size: 18px !important;\n    line-height: 25px !important;\n    color: #414857 !important;\n    transition: background 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease !important;\n    flex-direction: row-reverse;\n    justify-content: space-between;\n}\n\n.markdown-body details.Accordion > summary.Accordion-title::-webkit-details-marker {\n  display: none !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body details.Accordion:not([open]) > summary.Accordion-title:hover {\n  background: #EAEEF5 !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body details.Accordion[open] > summary.Accordion-title {\n  background: #C9D0E3 !important;\n  border-radius: 9px 9px 0 0 !important;\n  border-bottom: 1px solid #C9D0E3 !important;\n  margin: 0 !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body details.Accordion .Accordion-toggleIcon {\n  margin-left: 0 !important;\n  width: 24px !important;\n  height: 24px !important;\n  display: inline-flex !important;\n  align-items: center !important;\n  justify-content: center !important;\n  font-size: 16px !important;\n  color: #414857 !important;\n  transform: rotate(0deg) !important;\n  transition: transform 0.2s ease !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body details.Accordion[open] .Accordion-toggleIcon {\n  transform: rotate(90deg) !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body details.Accordion .Accordion-icon {\n  width: 20px !important;\n  height: 20px !important;\n  color: #414857 !important;\n  opacity: 0.8 !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body details.Accordion > .Accordion-content {\n  background: #fff !important;\n  padding: 20px 24px 24px !important;\n  border-top: 1px solid #C9D0E3 !important;\n  border-radius: 0 0 12px 12px !important;\n\n  font-family: \"Open Sans\", system-ui, -apple-system, \"Segoe UI\", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif !important;\n  font-size: 16px !important;\n  line-height: 22px !important;\n  color: #414857 !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body details.Accordion > .Accordion-content > :first-child {\n  margin-top: 0 !important;\n}\n.markdown-body details.Accordion > .Accordion-content > :last-child {\n  margin-bottom: 0 !important;\n}\n\n.markdown-body details.Accordion[open] {\n  box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(65, 72, 87, 0.12) !important;\n}\n\n\n/* ========================================================================\n   Ask AI — Floating Button\n   ======================================================================== */\n\n:root {\n  --askai-size: 60px;\n\n  /* Figma tokens */\n  --askai-bg: var(--Navy-800, #1b2333);\n  --askai-bg-hover: var(--Navy-1000, #111821);\n\n  --askai-green: var(--color-button-primary-default, #49e28a);\n  --askai-yellow: #ffd84d;\n\n  --askai-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45);\n\n  --askai-shadow-hover:\n    0px 1px 2px #00000014,\n    0px 4px 12px #0000001F,\n    0px 12px 28px #00000026,\n    inset 0px 0px 0px #0000001A,\n    0 0 0 2px var(--askai-green);\n}\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------------\n   Escape hatch: some header parents use transform, which breaks position:fixed\n   ------------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n.rm-Header,\n.rm-Header-top,\n.rm-Header-bottom {\n  transform: none !important;\n}\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------------\n   Floating container (placement)\n   ------------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n.rm-AskAi,\n.Header-askai1MTDknILiJku.rm-AskAi {\n  position: fixed !important;\n  right: 34px !important;\n  bottom: 24px !important;\n  left: auto !important;\n  top: auto !important;\n\n  z-index: 9999 !important;\n\n  margin: 0 !important;\n  padding: 0 !important;\n  box-shadow: none !important;\n\n  display: block !important;\n  pointer-events: auto !important;\n}\n\n.rm-AskAi,\n.rm-AskAi * {\n  pointer-events: auto !important;\n}\n\n.ContentWithOwlbot-sidebar1cgUrK3uYZLh.rm-AskAi-sidebar {\n  z-index: 99999999 !important;\n}\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------------\n   Button base — circle, icon-only\n   ------------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n.rm-AskAi-button {\n  width: var(--askai-size) !important;\n  height: var(--askai-size) !important;\n  border-radius: 50% !important;\n\n  background: var(--askai-bg) !important;\n  border: none !important;\n  outline: none !important;\n\n  display: flex !important;\n  align-items: center !important;\n  justify-content: center !important;\n\n  padding: 0 !important;\n  gap: 0 !important;\n\n  box-shadow: var(--askai-shadow) !important;\n\n  cursor: pointer !important;\n  transform: none !important;\n\n  transition:\n    background 160ms ease,\n    box-shadow 160ms ease !important;\n}\n\n.rm-AskAi-button.Button_minimum,\n.rm-AskAi-button.Button_minimum_outline {\n  background: var(--askai-bg) !important;\n  border: none !important;\n  outline: none !important;\n}\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------------\n   Label — remove it completely\n   ------------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n.rm-AskAi-button .Button-label {\n  display: none !important;\n}\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------------\n   Icon sizing + colors\n   ------------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n.rm-AskAi-button svg {\n  width: 26px !important;\n  height: 26px !important;\n  display: block !important;\n  margin: 0 !important;\n}\n\n/* Default: first sparkle = yellow, others = green */\n.rm-AskAi-button svg path:nth-child(1) {\n  fill: var(--askai-yellow) !important;\n}\n.rm-AskAi-button svg path:nth-child(2),\n.rm-AskAi-button svg path:nth-child(3) {\n  fill: var(--askai-green) !important;\n}\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------------\n   Hover / focus / active\n   ------------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n.rm-AskAi-button:hover {\n  background: var(--askai-bg-hover) !important;\n  box-shadow: var(--askai-shadow-hover) !important;\n  transform: none !important;\n}\n\n/* Hover: all sparkles green */\n.rm-AskAi-button:hover svg path {\n  fill: var(--askai-green) !important;\n}\n\n.rm-AskAi-button:focus,\n.rm-AskAi-button:focus-visible,\n.rm-AskAi-button:active {\n  outline: none !important;\n  background: var(--askai-bg-hover) !important;\n  box-shadow: var(--askai-shadow-hover) !important;\n  transform: none !important;\n}\n\n@media (max-width: 1120px) {\n  .rm-AskAi,\n  .Header-askai1MTDknILiJku.rm-AskAi {\n    right: 14px !important;\n    bottom: 14px !important;\n  }\n}\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------------\n   Beta Banner — Figma-aligned version\n   ------------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n\n/* Remove default ReadMe horizontal padding so banner spans full width */\n.rm-Header {\n  padding-left: 0;\n  padding-right: 0;\n}\n\n/* Banner container */\n#rm-beta-banner {\n  width: 100%;\n  min-height: 64px;\n\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n\n  padding: 20px 16px;\n\n  background: #1e2528;\n  color: #ffffff;\n\n  font-family: \"Open Sans\", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont,\n    \"Segoe UI\", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;\n\n  font-size: 16px;\n  font-weight: 400;\n  line-height: 24px;\n\n  text-align: center;\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n\n  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);\n}\n\n#rm-beta-banner > * {\n  max-width: 900px;\n}\n\n#rm-beta-banner a {\n  color: #4da3ff;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  text-decoration: underline;\n  margin-left: 4px;\n  white-space: nowrap;\n}\n\n#rm-beta-banner a:hover {\n  text-decoration: none;\n}\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------------\n   Header offsets when banner is active\n   ------------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n\nhtml.rm-beta-banner-active #rmps-wrap {\n  top: 77px !important;\n}\n\n.Header-search_featherYsmQBn55F3d9 {\n    margin-right: 190px;\n}\n\nhtml.rm-beta-banner-active .Header-search_featherYsmQBn55F3d9 {\n    top: 85px !important;\n    margin-right: 190px;\n}\n\n.Header-logo-img3YvV4lcGKkeb {\n    margin-top: 3px;\n}\n\n/* Remove focus glow on the header logo link + image */\na.rm-Logo:focus,\na.rm-Logo:focus-visible,\na.rm-Logo:active,\na.rm-Logo:visited,\na.rm-Logo:focus-within,\na.rm-Logo img:focus,\na.rm-Logo img:focus-visible,\na.rm-Logo img:active {\n  outline: none !important;\n  box-shadow: none !important;\n\tborder:none;\n}\n/* Shared \"button\" container sizing */\n.icon-arrow-right2,\n.icon-arrow-left2{\n  display: inline-flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n\n  width: 28px;\n  height: 28px;\n\n  background: #E9F2F6;\n  border-radius: 16px;\n}\n\n/* RIGHT arrow */\n.icon-arrow-right2::before{\n  content:\"\";\n  display:block;\n\n  width: 14px;\n  height: 8.75px;\n\n  background-color: #152033;\n\n  -webkit-mask: {\n  flex-wrap: wrap !important;\n}\n\nheader.container.mx-auto.px-6.py-5.flex.justify-between.items-center.relative.z-20\n  > #rm-beta-banner {\n  flex: 0 0 100% !important;\n  order: -9999 !important;\n}\n\n.App .rm-LandingPage a:hover, .App .rm-LandingPage a:active, .App .rm-LandingPage a:focus, .App .rm-SuggestedEdits a:hover, .App .rm-SuggestedEdits a:active, .App .rm-SuggestedEdits a:focus, .App .rm-SuggestionDiff a:hover, .App .rm-SuggestionDiff a:active, .App .rm-SuggestionDiff a:focus, .App .rm-Guides a:hover, .App .rm-Guides a:active, .App .rm-Guides a:focus, .App a:hover, .App .rm-ReferenceMain a:active, .App .rm-ReferenceMain a:focus, .App .rm-Changelog a:hover, .App .rm-Changelog a:active, .App .rm-Changelog a:focus, .App .rm-Discuss a:hover, .App .rm-Discuss a:active, .App .rm-Discuss a:focus, .App .rm-CustomPage a:hover, .App .rm-CustomPage a:active, .App .rm-CustomPage a:focus {\n    text-decoration: underline;\n}\n\n/* ========================== */\n/*   PAGE FEEDBACK WIDGET     */\n/* ========================== */\n\n/* Outer container — light blue pill */\n.rm-PageThumbs.PageThumbs {\n  background-color: #c5d8e3;\n  border-radius: 12px;\n  padding: 20px 40px;\n  max-width: 482px;\n  min-height: 76px;\n  display: flex !important;\n  flex-direction: row !important;\n  align-items: center !important;\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n  margin: 0 auto 30px auto;\n}\n\n/* Inner row — label + buttons, never wraps */\n.PageThumbs-helpful {\n  display: flex !important;\n  flex-direction: row !important;\n  align-items: center !important;\n  width: 100%;\n  flex-wrap: nowrap !important;\n  white-space: nowrap;\n  font-size: 16px;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  color: #1a1a1a;\n  border: none;\n}\n\n/* Button group — 60px from label, 12px between buttons */\n.PageThumbs-cta {\n  display: flex !important;\n  flex-direction: row !important;\n  align-items: center !important;\n  gap: 12px;\n  margin-left: 60px;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n/* Yes / No buttons — dark pill, reserves border space to prevent size shift */\n.PageThumbs-button.Button,\n.PageThumbs-button.Button_secondary {\n  background-color: #1a1a1a !important;\n  color: #ffffff !important;\n  border: 1px solid transparent !important;\n  border-radius: 999px !important;\n  padding: 10px 20px !important;\n  font-size: 15px !important;\n  font-weight: 600 !important;\n  display: flex !important;\n  align-items: center !important;\n  gap: 8px !important;\n  white-space: nowrap !important;\n  box-shadow: none !important;\n  box-sizing: border-box !important;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  transition: border-color 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease !important;\n}\n\n/* Hover — green border, green text */\n.PageThumbs-button.Button:hover,\n.PageThumbs-button.Button_secondary:hover {\n  background-color: #1a1a1a !important;\n  border-color: #22c55e !important;\n  color: #22c55e !important;\n}\n\n/* Icon — default white, green on hover */\n.PageThumbs-button .icon {\n  font-size: 16px !important;\n  color: #ffffff !important;\n  transition: color 0.2s ease !important;\n}\n\n.PageThumbs-button.Button:hover .icon,\n.PageThumbs-button.Button_secondary:hover .icon {\n  color: #22c55e !important;\n}\n\n/* Dropdown wrappers */\n.PageThumbs-cta .Dropdown {\n  display: inline-flex;\n}\n\n\n/* ========================== */\n/*     PAGINATION CONTROLS    */\n/* ========================== */\n\n/* Nav row */\n.rm-Pagination {\n  display: flex !important;\n  flex-direction: row !important;\n  justify-content: space-between !important;\n  align-items: flex-start !important;\n  width: 100% !important;\n  padding: 20px 0 80px 0 !important;\n  box-sizing: border-box !important;\n}\n\n/* Both links: column layout — circle on top, title below */\n[class*=\"PaginationControls-link\"] {\n  display: inline-flex !important;\n  flex-direction: column !important;\n  gap: 10px !important;\n  text-decoration: none !important;\n  border: none !important;\n  background: none !important;\n  box-shadow: none !important;\n  color: #2d3748 !important;\n  font-weight: 600 !important;\n  font-size: 16px !important;\n  padding: 0 !important;\n  flex: 0 0 auto !important;\n  width: auto !important;\n  max-width: fit-content !important;\n  align-self: flex-start !important;\n}\n\n/* Arrow circle — soft blue-gray fill, 28x28 */\n[class*=\"PaginationControls-icon\"] {\n  display: flex !important;\n  align-items: center !important;\n  justify-content: center !important;\n  width: 28px !important;\n  height: 28px !important;\n  min-width: 28px !important;\n  max-width: 28px !important;\n  border-radius: 50% !important;\n  background-color: #dde8ee !important;\n  border: none !important;\n  color: #2d3748 !important;\n  font-size: 11px !important;\n  flex-shrink: 0 !important;\n  box-sizing: border-box !important;\n  transition: background-color 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease !important;\n}\n\n/* Hover — circle fills dark, arrow turns white */\n[class*=\"PaginationControls-link\"]:hover [class*=\"PaginationControls-icon\"] {\n  background-color: #1a1a1a !important;\n  color: #ffffff !important;\n}\n\n/* Previous (left): left-aligned, capped to circle width to prevent wide hover zone */\n[class*=\"PaginationControls-link_left\"] {\n  max-width: 28px !important;\n  display: inline-flex !important;\n  align-items: flex-start !important;\n  margin-right: auto !important;\n}\n\n[class*=\"PaginationControls-link_left\"] [class*=\"PaginationControls-icon\"] {\n  order: 0 !important;\n}\n\n[class*=\"PaginationControls-link_left\"] [class*=\"PaginationControls-text\"] {\n  order: 1 !important;\n}\n\n/* Next (right): right-aligned, margin-left: auto keeps it right even when alone */\n[class*=\"PaginationControls-link_right\"] {\n  max-width: 28px !important;\n  display: inline-flex !important;\n  align-items: flex-end !important;\n  margin-left: auto !important;\n}\n\n[class*=\"PaginationControls-link_right\"] [class*=\"PaginationControls-icon\"] {\n  order: 0 !important;\n}\n\n[class*=\"PaginationControls-link_right\"] [class*=\"PaginationControls-text\"] {\n  order: 1 !important;\n}\n\n/* Page title text — SemiBold 16px, locked width to prevent reflow */\n[class*=\"PaginationControls-text\"] {\n  font-size: 16px !important;\n  font-weight: 600 !important;\n  font-style: normal !important;\n  line-height: 16px !important;\n  letter-spacing: 0 !important;\n  color: #2d3748 !important;\n  white-space: nowrap !important;\n  display: block !important;\n  min-width: max-content !important;\n  text-rendering: geometricPrecision !important;\n  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased !important;\n}\n\n/* Fix ReadMe's built-in transform on arrow icons that causes hover shift */\n[class*=\"PaginationControls-link_right\"]:hover [class*=\"PaginationControls-icon\"],\n[class*=\"PaginationControls-link_right\"]:active [class*=\"PaginationControls-icon\"],\n[class*=\"PaginationControls-link_right\"]:focus [class*=\"PaginationControls-icon\"],\n[class*=\"PaginationControls-link_left\"]:hover [class*=\"PaginationControls-icon\"],\n[class*=\"PaginationControls-link_left\"]:active [class*=\"PaginationControls-icon\"],\n[class*=\"PaginationControls-link_left\"]:focus [class*=\"PaginationControls-icon\"] {\n  -webkit-transform: translateX(0px) !important;\n  transform: translateX(0px) !important;\ncolor:white !important;\n}\na:hover .icon-arrow-right2::before { background-color:#fff; }\na:hover .icon-arrow-left2::before { background-color:#fff; }\n/* ========================== */\n/*   TIPPY / DROPDOWN RESET   */\n/* ========================== */\n\n/* Prevent tippy root from being affected by flex layout */\n.PageThumbs-cta [data-tippy-root] {\n  display: block !important;\n  flex-direction: unset !important;\n  width: auto !important;\n  max-width: none !important;\n  position: absolute !important;\n}\n\n/* Tippy box and content — full reset */\n.PageThumbs-cta .tippy-box,\n.PageThumbs-cta .tippy-content {\n  display: block !important;\n  flex-direction: unset !important;\n  width: auto !important;\n  max-width: none !important;\n  white-space: normal !important;\n  font-weight: normal !important;\n  font-size: 14px !important;\n  color: inherit !important;\n  border: none !important;\n  background: none !important;\n  padding: 0 !important;\n}\n\n/* Dropdown content inside tippy — reset everything */\n.PageThumbs-cta .Dropdown-content {\n  display: block !important;\n  flex-direction: unset !important;\n  width: auto !important;\n  white-space: normal !important;\n}\n\n/* Comment box inside tippy — reset layout */\n.PageThumbs-cta .PageThumbs-comment_box {\n  display: block !important;\n  flex-direction: unset !important;\n  width: auto !important;\n\n}\n\n/* Comment body and footer — normal stacked layout */\n.PageThumbs-cta .PageThumbs-comment-body {\n  display: block !important;\n  width: 95% !important;\n}\n\n.PageThumbs-cta .PageThumbs-comment-footer {\n  display: flex !important;\n\n  margin-top: 8px !important;\n}\n\n/* Vote submit button inside tippy — restore default button style */\n.PageThumbs-cta .PageThumbs-comment_submit {\n  background-color: #1a1a1a !important;\n  color: #ffffff !important;\n  border: none !important;\n  border-radius: 6px !important;\n  padding: 8px 16px !important;\n  font-size: 14px !important;\n  font-weight: 600 !important;\n  cursor: pointer !important;\n  white-space: nowrap !important;\n}\n\n.rm-Pagination a:hover {text-decoration:underline !important;}\n\n/* ========================== */\n/*   MOBILE FIXES (RESPONSIVE) */\n/* ========================== */\n\n@media (max-width: 768px) {\n  /* -------- Page feedback widget -------- */\n  .rm-PageThumbs.PageThumbs {\n    max-width: calc(100% - 32px) !important;\n    width: calc(100% - 32px) !important;\n    padding: 16px 18px !important;\n    min-height: auto !important;\n    border-radius: 14px !important;\n    margin: 0 auto 30px auto !important; /* ensure outer box stays centered */\n  }\n\n  .PageThumbs-helpful {\n    display: flex !important;\n    flex-direction: column !important;\n    align-items: center !important;   /* center children */\n    justify-content: center !important;\n    gap: 14px !important;\n    width: 100% !important;\n    white-space: normal !important;   /* allow wrapping */\n    text-align: center !important;    /* center text */\n    font-size: 14px !important;\n    line-height: 1.35 !important;\n  }\n\n  /* In case the \"Did this page help you?\" text is in a child span/div */\n  .PageThumbs-helpful > *:first-child {\n    white-space: normal !important;\n    max-width: 100% !important;\n    width: 100% !important;\n    text-align: center !important;\n    margin: 0 !important;\n  }\n\n  .PageThumbs-cta {\n    margin-left: 0 !important;        /* remove desktop spacing */\n    width: 100% !important;\n    gap: 10px !important;\n    justify-content: center !important; /* center button row */\n    align-items: center !important;\n    flex-wrap: wrap !important;       /* allows wrapping if needed */\n  }\n\n  .PageThumbs-button.Button,\n  .PageThumbs-button.Button_secondary {\n    padding: 9px 16px !important;\n    font-size: 14px !important;\n    min-height: 44px !important;      /* better tap target */\n    line-height: 1 !important;\n  }\n\n  .PageThumbs-button .icon {\n    font-size: 15px !important;\n  }\n\n  /* Optional: equal-ish width Yes/No buttons on mobile */\n  .PageThumbs-cta .PageThumbs-button {\n    min-width: 92px !important;\n    justify-content: center !important;\n  }\n\n  /* -------- Pagination controls -------- */\n  .rm-Pagination {\n    padding: 12px 0 36px 0 !important;\n    align-items: flex-start !important;\n    gap: 12px !important;\n  }\n\n  /* Let links use more than 28px width on mobile so text can fit */\n  [class*=\"PaginationControls-link_left\"],\n  [class*=\"PaginationControls-link_right\"] {\n    max-width: none !important;\n  }\n\n  [class*=\"PaginationControls-link\"] {\n    gap: 8px !important;\n    max-width: 46% !important; /* keep left/right from colliding */\n  }\n\n  [class*=\"PaginationControls-link_left\"] {\n    align-items: flex-start !important;\n    text-align: left !important;\n  }\n\n  [class*=\"PaginationControls-link_right\"] {\n    align-items: flex-end !important;\n    text-align: right !important;\n  }\n\n  [class*=\"PaginationControls-text\"] {\n    white-space: normal !important;   /* allow wrapping on mobile */\n    line-height: 1.2 !important;\n    font-size: 14px !important;\n    min-width: 0 !important;\n    word-break: break-word !important;\n  }\n}\n\n/* Replace the desktop left/right max-width rules */\n\n[class*=\"PaginationControls-link_left\"] {\n  max-width: 40% !important;          /* was 28px — allows text to show without overlap */\n  display: inline-flex !important;\n  align-items: flex-start !important;\n  margin-right: auto !important;\n}\n\n[class*=\"PaginationControls-link_right\"] {\n  max-width: 40% !important;          /* was 28px */\n  display: inline-flex !important;\n  align-items: flex-end !important;\n  margin-left: auto !important;\n}\n\n/* Allow text to wrap on desktop too */\n[class*=\"PaginationControls-text\"] {\n  white-space: normal !important;     /* was nowrap */\n  min-width: 0 !important;            /* was max-content — critical, kills overflow */\n  word-break: break-word !important;\n  line-height: 1.3 images inside ReadMe-rendered tables (.rdmd-table) that are lightbox-enabled (.img.lightbox)\n * - When the image is clicked, it navigates to the ONLY non-lightbox link in the same \u003ctd>\n *   (Guardrail: if there are 0 links or multiple links in that cell, it does nothing)\n * - Prevents the lightbox from opening by intercepting clicks in the CAPTURE phase\n * - Hides the hover \"magnifying glass\" affordance in tables by injecting scoped CSS\n * - Re-applies cursor + CSS on SPA navigation (pageLoad) and a couple delayed passes\n */\n(function () {\n  'use strict';\n\n  var STYLE_ID = 'rm-no-lightbox-magnifier';\n\n  function getSingleLinkForLightbox(lightboxEl) {\n    var td = lightboxEl.closest('td');\n    if (!td) return null;\n\n    // Only consider links in the same \u003ctd> that are NOT inside the lightbox wrapper.\n    var links = Array.prototype.slice.call(td.querySelectorAll('a[href]')).filter(function (a) {\n      return !a.closest('.img.lightbox');\n    });\n\n    // Guardrail: if the cell has 0 or >1 links (e.g., bullet list), do nothing.\n    if (links.length !== 1) return null;\n\n    return links[0];\n  }\n\n  function applyPointerCursor() {\n    var imgs = document.querySelectorAll('.rdmd-table .img.lightbox img');\n    for (var i = 0; i \u003c imgs.length; i++) {\n      imgs[i].style.cursor = 'pointer';\n    }\n  }\n\n  function injectNoMagnifierCSS() {\n    if (document.getElementById(STYLE_ID)) return;\n\n    var style = document.createElement('style');\n    style.id = STYLE_ID;\n    style.type = 'text/css';\n    style.appendChild(\n      document.createTextNode(\n        [\n          // Kill the hover overlay/icon (commonly pseudo-elements) — table-only\n          '.rdmd-table .img.lightbox::before,',\n          '.rdmd-table .img.lightbox::after,',\n          '.rdmd-table .img.lightbox .lightbox-inner::before,',\n          '.rdmd-table .img.lightbox .lightbox-inner::after {',\n          '  content: none !important;',\n          '  display: none !important;',\n          '  background: none !important;',\n          '}',\n\n          // Sometimes the icon is implemented as a background-image — table-only\n          '.rdmd-table .img.lightbox,',\n          '.rdmd-table .img.lightbox .lightbox-inner {',\n          '  background-image: none !important;',\n          '  background: none !important;',\n          '}',\n\n          // Ensure pointer cursor within tables\n          '.rdmd-table .img.lightbox img { cursor: pointer !important; }'\n        ].join('\\n')\n      )\n    );\n\n    document.head.appendChild(style);\n  }\n\n  function handleActivate(e) {\n    // Only intercept lightbox images inside tables\n    var lightbox =\n      e.target && e.target.closest\n        ? e.target.closest('.rdmd-table .img.lightbox')\n        : null;\n\n    if (!lightbox) return;\n\n    var link = getSingleLinkForLightbox(lightbox);\n    if (!link) return;\n\n    // Stop the lightbox before it sees the event\n    e.preventDefault();\n    e.stopPropagation();\n    if (e.stopImmediatePropagation) e.stopImmediatePropagation();\n\n    var href = link.getAttribute('href');\n    if (!href) return;\n\n    // Respect ctrl/cmd click behavior + target=_blank\n    var openNewTab =\n      (e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey) ||\n      (link.getAttribute('target') === '_blank');\n\n    if (openNewTab) {\n      window.open(href, '_blank', 'noopener,noreferrer');\n      return;\n    }\n\n    window.location.href = href;\n  }\n\n  function boot() {\n    injectNoMagnifierCSS();\n    applyPointerCursor();\n  }\n\n  // Capture phase is key: it runs before ReadMe's delegated lightbox handlers\n  document.addEventListener('click', handleActivate, true);\n\n  // Keyboard support + PLACEHOLDER_FONT_SIZE + '; }',\n        '#AppSearch input[type=\"search\"]::-moz-placeholder { color: ' + PLACEHOLDER_COLOR + '; font-size: ' + PLACEHOLDER_FONT_SIZE + '; opacity: 1; }',\n document.head.appendChild(style);\n  }\n\n  function applyPlaceholder() {\n    var input = getSearchInput();\n    if (!input) return;\n\n    ensurePlaceholderStyle();\n\n    // Only set if (pref) return String(pref).trim();\n\n    if (p) return getProjectDisplayLabel(p);\n\n    return DEFAULT_TRIGGER_LABEL;\n  }\n\n  function getCurrentProject() {\n    var rawPath = location.pathname || stroke-linejoin=\"round\"/>' +\n      '\u003c/svg>'\n    );\n  }\n\n  function ensureWrap() {\n    var wrap = document.getElementById(WRAP_ID);\n\n    function mountIntoHeader(el) {\n      var left = return;\n      }\n\n      // last resort\n      if (el.parentNode !== document.body) document.body.appendChild(el);\n    }\n\n    if (wrap) {\n      // key: if it was created before header existed, move it now\n      mountIntoHeader(wrap);\n      return wrap;\n    }\n\n    wrap = document.createElement('div');\n    wrap.id = WRAP_ID;\n\n    var p = getCurrentProject();\n    var label = ensureMenu() {\n    var menu = document.getElementById(MENU_ID);\n    if (menu) return menu;\n\n    menu = document.createElement('div');\n    menu.id = MENU_ID;\n    menu.setAttribute('role', 'menu');\n    menu.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Project navigation');\n\n    var html = '\u003cdiv class=\"rmps-spacer rmps-spacer-top\">\u003c/div>';\n\n    for (var i = 0; i \u003c PROJECTS.length; || document.body).appendChild(menu);\n\n    syncMenuVisibility();\n    return menu;\n  }\n\n  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // Sync + positioning\n  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n  function syncTrigger() {\n    var btn = document.getElementById(TRIGGER_ID);\n    if (!btn) return;\n\n    var p = getCurrentProject();\n    var label = getTriggerLabel(p);\n    var iconUrl = p ? p.iconUrl : DEFAULT_TRIGGER_ICON_URL;\n\n    var iconEl = btn.querySelector('.rmps-trigger-icon img');\n    var labelEl = btn.querySelector('.rmps-label');\n\n    // Only mutate our own trigger elements\n    if (iconEl && iconEl.getAttribute('src') !== iconUrl) iconEl.setAttribute('src', iconUrl);\n    if (labelEl && labelEl.textContent !== label) labelEl.textContent = label;\n  }\n\n  function syncMenuVisibility() {\n    var menu = document.getElementById(MENU_ID);\n    if (!menu) return;\n\n    var p = getCurrentProject();\n    var activeId = p ? p.id : null;\n\n    var items = menu.querySelectorAll('a.rmps-item');\n    for (var i = 0; i \u003c items.length; i++) {\n      var a = items[i];\n      var id = a.getAttribute('data-id');\n      if (activeId && id === activeId) a.classList.add(HIDDEN_CLASS);\n      else a.classList.remove(HIDDEN_CLASS);\n    }\n  }\n\n  function positionTriggerMobile(header, wrap) {\n    var trigger = document.getElementById(TRIGGER_ID);\n    if (!header || !wrap || !trigger) return;\n\n    var headerRect = header.getBoundingClientRect();\n    var th = trigger.getBoundingClientRect().height || 56;\n\n    // Safe mobile placement: full-width-ish bar inside header, left aligned\n    var left = 8;\n    var top = 8;\n\n    // If header is taller, center-ish vertically while keeping a minimum top padding\n    if (headerRect.height > th + 12) {\n      top = Math.max(6, Math.round((headerRect.height - th) / 2));\n    }\n\n    wrap.classList.add('rmps-visible');\n    wrap.style.left = left + 'px';\n    wrap.style.top = top + 'px';\n\n    if (state.open) positionMenu();\n  }\n\n  function positionTriggerToLogo() {\n    var wrap = ensureWrap();\n    ensureMenu();\n\n    syncTrigger();\n    syncMenuVisibility();\n\n    // Keep this branch for compatibility, but HIDE_BELOW_PX=0 means never hides in practice.\n    if (window.innerWidth \u003c HIDE_BELOW_PX) {\n      wrap.classList.remove('rmps-visible');\n      closeMenu();\n      return;\n    }\n\n    var header = getHeader();\n    if (!header) {\n      wrap.classList.remove('rmps-visible');\n      closeMenu();\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // MOBILE MODE: do NOT depend on logo visibility\n    if (isMobileLayout()) {\n      positionTriggerMobile(header, wrap);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    var logo = getLogo();\n\n    if (!logo || !isElementVisible(logo)) {\n      wrap.classList.remove('rmps-visible');\n      closeMenu();\n      return;\n    }\n\n    var headerRect = header.getBoundingClientRect();\n    var logoRect = logo.getBoundingClientRect();\n\n    wrap.classList.add('rmps-visible');\n\n    var trigger = document.getElementById(TRIGGER_ID);\n    var th = trigger ? trigger.getBoundingClientRect().height : 56;\n\n    var left = Math.round(logoRect.right - headerRect.left + OFFSET_X);\n    var top = Math.round(logoRect.top - headerRect.top + (logoRect.height - th) / 2 + OFFSET_Y);\n    if (top \u003c 0) top = 0;\n\n    wrap.style.left = left + 'px';\n    wrap.style.top = top + 'px';\n\n    if (state.open) positionMenu();\n  }\n\n  function positionMenu() {\n    var header = getHeader();\n    var trigger = document.getElementById(TRIGGER_ID);\n    var menu = document.getElementById(MENU_ID);\n    if (!header || !trigger || !menu) return;\n\n    var headerRect = header.getBoundingClientRect();\n    var r = trigger.getBoundingClientRect();\n    var margin = 8;\n\n    menu.style.left = '0px';\n    menu.style.top = '0px';\n\n    var top = Math.round(r.bottom - headerRect.top + margin);\n    var left = Math.round(r.left - headerRect.left);\n\n    menu.classList.add(OPEN_CLASS);\n\n    var mw = menu.offsetWidth || 340;\n    var mh = menu.offsetHeight || 300;\n\n    var maxLeft = Math.max(12, window.innerWidth - mw - 12);\n    var leftAbs = Math.round(r.left);\n    if (leftAbs > maxLeft) left = maxLeft - headerRect.left;\n    if (left \u003c 12 - headerRect.left) left = 12 - headerRect.left;\n\n    var topViewport = Math.round(r.bottom + margin);\n    var maxTopBelow = window.innerHeight - mh - 12;\n    if (topViewport > maxTopBelow && r.top > mh + 12) {\n      top = Math.round(r.top - headerRect.top - mh - margin);\n    }\n    if (top \u003c 12 - headerRect.top) top = 12 - headerRect.top;\n\n    menu.style.left = left + 'px';\n    menu.style.top = top + 'px';\n  }\n\n  function scheduleReposition() {\n    if (scheduled) return;\n    scheduled = true;\n    requestAnimationFrame(function () {\n      scheduled = false;\n      positionTriggerToLogo();\n    });\n  }\n\n  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // Open/close behavior (scoped listeners)\n  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n  function openMenu() {\n    var trigger = document.getElementById(TRIGGER_ID);\n    var menu = ensureMenu();\n\n    state.open = true;\n    menu.classList.add(OPEN_CLASS);\n    if (trigger) trigger.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');\n\n    syncTrigger();\n    syncMenuVisibility();\n    positionMenu();\n\n    setTimeout(function () {\n      var first = menu.querySelector('.rmps-item:not(.' + HIDDEN_CLASS + ')') || null;\n      if (first) first.focus();\n    }, 0);\n\n    document.addEventListener('mousedown', onDocMouseDown, true);\n    document.addEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown, true);\n  }\n\n  function closeMenu() {\n    var trigger = document.getElementById(TRIGGER_ID);\n    var menu = document.getElementById(MENU_ID);\n\n    state.open = false;\n    if (menu) menu.classList.remove(OPEN_CLASS);\n    if (trigger) trigger.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');\n\n    document.removeEventListener('mousedown', onDocMouseDown, true);\n    document.removeEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown, true);\n  }\n\n  function toggleMenu() {\n    if (state.open) closeMenu();\n    else openMenu();\n  }\n\n  function onDocMouseDown(e) {\n    if (!state.open) return;\n    var trigger = document.getElementById(TRIGGER_ID);\n    var menu = document.getElementById(MENU_ID);\n\n    if (menu && menu.contains(e.target)) return;\n    if (trigger && trigger.contains(e.target)) return;\n    closeMenu();\n  }\n\n  function onKeyDown(e) {\n    if (!state.open) return;\n\n    if (e.key === 'Escape') {\n      e.preventDefault();\n      closeMenu();\n      var trigger2 = document.getElementById(TRIGGER_ID);\n      if (trigger2) trigger2.focus();\n      return;\n    }\n\n    var menu = document.getElementById(MENU_ID);\n    if (!menu) return;\n\n    var itemsAll = menu.querySelectorAll('.rmps-item:not(.' + HIDDEN_CLASS + ')');\n    if (!itemsAll.length) return;\n\n    var idx = -1;\n    for (var i = 0; i \u003c itemsAll.length; i++) {\n      if (document.activeElement === itemsAll[i]) {\n        idx = i;\n        break;\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') {\n      e.preventDefault();\n      var next = itemsAll[Math.min(itemsAll.length - 1, idx + 1)];\n      if (next) next.focus();\n    } else if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') {\n      e.preventDefault();\n      var prev = itemsAll[Math.max(0, idx - 1)];\n      if (prev) prev.focus();\n    }\n  }\n\n  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // SPA hooks (safer)\n  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n  function onRouteOrPageLoad() {\n    // Close menu on navigation (prevents stuck open state across mounts)\n activeLink;\n    while (el && el !== document.body) {\n      if (el.tagName === \"LI\") ensureLiParentOpen(el);\n      if (el.classList && el.classList.contains(\"rm-Sidebar-section\")) {\n        ensureSectionOpen(el);\n      }\n      el = el.parentElement;\n    }\n  }\n\n  function getActiveKey() {\n    const a =\n      document.querySelector(\".rm-Sidebar-link[aria-current='page']\") ||\n enforceOpenForAllActives() {\n    const currentKey = getActiveKey();\n\n    // Only reset collapse flags after delay AND if key really changed\n    if (currentKey && currentKey !== i\")\n      .forEach((n) => n.remove());\n\n    return (clone.textContent || \"\").replace(/\\s+/g, \" \").trim();\n  }\n\n  function captureExpandedState(tocNav) {\n    const expandedById = {};\n    tocNav.querySelectorAll(\".toc-item-header\").forEach((header) => {\n      const a = header.querySelector('a[href*=\"#\"]');\n      const t = header.querySelector(\".toc-toggle\");\n      if (!a || !t contentRoot = getContentRoot();\n    const anchors = Array.from(contentRoot.querySelectorAll(\".heading-anchor[id]\"));\n    if (!anchors.length) return [];\n\n    const headings = anchors\n h.id, level: h.level });\n    });\n\n    return headings;\n  }\n\n  // ------------------------------------\n  // Render: replace TOC children UL with ordered tree\n  // ------------------------------------\n  function renderTocFromHeadings(tocNav, headings, restoreState) {\n    const rootUl = tocNav.querySelector(\".toc-children > ul\");\n    if (!rootUl) return;\n\n
