  \u003ca href=\"#\" class=\"vote-btn\" onclick=\"if(window.Appcues) Appcues.track('Survey click', { location: 'project page' }); return false;\">\n            \u003cspan class=\"vote-label\">Share Feedback\u003c/span>\n            \u003csvg class=\"vote-chevron\" width=\"14\" height=\"14\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\">\n              \u003cpolyline points=\"9,5 17,12 9,19\" stroke=\"#3DD068\" stroke-width=\"2.5\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"/>\n            \u003c/svg>\n          \u003c/a>\n        \u003c/div>\n      \u003c/div>\n    \u003c/div>\n  `;\n\n  function inject() {\n    const nav = document.querySelector('section.content-toc nav');\n    if (!nav) return;\n\n    const existing = document.getElementById(WIDGET_ID);\n    if (existing) existing.remove();\n\n    observer.disconnect();\n    nav.insertAdjacentHTML('afterend', widgetHTML);\n    const w = document.getElementById(WIDGET_ID);\n    if (w) w.style.cssText += 'opacity: 1;';\n    observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });\n  }\n\n  let timer;\n  const observer = new MutationObserver(() => { clearTimeout(timer); timer = setTimeout(inject, 50); });\n  observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });\n\n  inject();\n})();\n\n\n// ── Mobile drawer survey widget ──────────────────────────────────────────────\n\nfunction injectSurveyWidget() {\n  if (document.getElementById('jf-imh-survey')) return;\n  const isHomepage = location.pathname === '/' || location.pathname === '';\n  const linksWrap = isHomepage\n    ? document.querySelector('.jf-drawer-links-wrap')\n    : document.querySelector('.jf-imh-links-wrap');\n  if (!linksWrap) return;\n\n  if (!document.getElementById('jf-imh-survey-styles')) {\n    const style = document.createElement('style');\n    style.id = 'jf-imh-survey-styles';\n    style.textContent = `\n      #jf-imh-survey {\n        margin: 24px 0 8px;\n        background: #CCD8F1;\n        border-radius: 12px;\n        padding: 20px;\n        display: flex;\n        flex-direction: column;\n        gap: 16px;\n        box-sizing: border-box;\n        width: 100%;\n        box-shadow: 0px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);\n      }\n      #jf-imh-survey .jf-sv-title {\n        font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif !important;\n        font-weight: 600 !important;\n        font-size: 16px !important;\n        line-height: 22px !important;\n        color: #000 !important;\n        margin: 0 !important;\n        padding: 0 !important;\n        white-space: normal !important;\n        word-break: normal !important;\n      }\n      #jf-imh-survey .jf-sv-subtitle {\n        font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif !important;\n        font-weight: 400 !important;\n        font-size: 13px !important;\n        line-height: 20px !important;\n        color: #414857 !important;\n        margin: 4px 0 0 !important;\n        padding: 0 !important;\n      }\n      #jf-imh-survey .jf-sv-btn-wrap {\n        display: flex !important;\n        justify-content: center !important;\n        width: 100% !important;\n      }\n      #jf-imh-survey .jf-sv-btn {\n        display: inline-flex !important;\n        align-items: center !important;\n        justify-content: center !important;\n        width: auto !important;\n        max-width: 100% !important;\n        height: 44px !important;\n        padding: 12px 32px !important;\n        background: #111821 !important;\n        border: 1px solid #111821 !important;\n        border-radius: 50px !important;\n        font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif !important;\n        font-weight: 700 !important;\n        font-size: 15px !important;\n        line-height: 20px !important;\n        color: #fff !important;\n        text-align: center !important;\n        text-decoration: none !important;\n        cursor: pointer !important;\n        white-space: nowrap !important;\n        box-sizing: border-box !important;\n        transition: border-color 0.2s !important;\n        flex-shrink: 0 !important;\n      }\n      #jf-imh-survey .jf-sv-btn:hover {\n        border-color: #3DD068 !important;\n      }\n    `;\n    document.head.appendChild(style);\n  }\n\n  const locationLabel = isHomepage ? 'home' : 'mobile menu';\n\n  linksWrap.insertAdjacentHTML('afterend', `\n    \u003cdiv id=\"jf-imh-survey\">\n      \u003cdiv>\n        \u003cp class=\"jf-sv-title\">How satisfied are you with JFrog's Help Center?\u003c/p>\n        \u003cp class=\"jf-sv-subtitle\">Take 1 minute to help us improve\u003c/p>\n      \u003c/div>\n      \u003cdiv class=\"jf-sv-btn-wrap\">\u003ca href=\"#\" class=\"jf-sv-btn\" onclick=\"if(window.Appcues) Appcues.track('Survey click', { location: '${locationLabel}' }); return false;\">Share Feedback\u003c/a>\u003c/div>\n    \u003c/div>\n  `);\n}\n\nif (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', injectSurveyWidget);\n} else {\n  injectSurveyWidget();\n}\n\n// Re-inject on SPA route changes + hamburger click\n(function () {\n  let lastUrl = location.pathname + location.search + location.hash;\n  setInterval(function () {\n    const now = location.pathname + location.search + location.hash;\n    if (now !== lastUrl) {\n      lastUrl = now;\n      document.getElementById('jf-imh-survey')?.remove();\n      injectSurveyWidget();\n    }\n  }, 300);\n\n  document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {\n    if (e.target.closest('#jf-imh-menu-btn, #jf-mobile-menu-btn, #jf-mobile-drawer-open, [aria-label=\"Open menu\"]')) {\n      setTimeout(injectSurveyWidget, 50);\n    }\n  });\n})();","html_promo":"","html_body":"","html_footer":"\u003c!-- ==========================\n     JFrog Global Footer Content\n========================== -->\n\n\n\u003c!-- TOP SECTION (Columns + End Google Tag Manager -->\n\n\u003cscript>\n    (function () {\n        // Only run on the absolute root of the portal\n        var isRoot = location.pathname === \"/\" && !location.search && !location.hash;\n        if (!isRoot) return;\n\n        var d = document.documentElement;\n\n        // Hide immediately (before paint)\n        d.classList.add(\"rm-root-prehide\");\n\n        // Reveal after 0.5s\n        window.setTimeout(function () {\n            d.classList.add(\"rm-root-ready\");\n            d.classList.remove(\"rm-root-prehide\");\n        }, 300);\n    })();\n\u003c/script>\n\n\u003cstyle>\n    /* ROOT-only prehide (gated by class) */\n    html.rm-root-prehide,\n    html.rm-root-prehide body {\n        background: #000 !important;\n    }\n\n    html.rm-root-prehide body {\n        opacity: 0 !important;\n    }\n\n    /* Fade in once ready */\n    html.rm-root-ready body {\n        animation: rmRootFadeIn 260ms ease forwards;\n    }\n\n    @keyframes rmRootFadeIn {\n        to {\n            opacity: 1;\n        }\n    }\n\u003c/style>\n\n\u003c!-- JFrog Interior Mobile Header (all pages) -->\n\u003cdiv id=\"jf-imh-header\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n\u003cpath fill-rule=\"evenodd\" clip-rule=\"evenodd\" d=\"M18.9384 16.8223C21.0134 13.8494 20.7244 9.72779 18.0715 7.07489C15.0943 4.09768 10.2673 4.09768 class=\"jf-imh-try-btn\"\n        href=\"https://jfrog.com/start-free/\"\n        target=\"_blank\"\n        rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"\n      >\n        Try JFrog\n      \u003c/a>\n\n      \u003cbutton\n        id=\"jf-imh-menu-btn\"\n        class=\"jf-imh-menu-btn\"\n        type=\"button\"\n        aria-label=\"Open menu\"\n        aria-expanded=\"false\"\n        aria-controls=\"jf-imh-drawer\"\n      >\n        \u003cspan class=\"jf-imh-menu-circle\" aria-hidden=\"true\">\n          \u003csvg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2.2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\">\n            \u003cpath d=\"M4 7h16\">\u003c/path>\n            \u003cpath d=\"M4 12h16\">\u003c/path>\n            \u003cpath d=\"M4 version) -->\n\u003cdiv id=\"jf-imh-overlay\" aria-hidden=\"true\">\n  \u003cdiv id=\"jf-imh-backdrop\">\u003c/div>\n\n  \u003cdiv id=\"jf-imh-drawer\" role=\"dialog\" aria-modal=\"true\" aria-label=\"Mobile menu\">\n    \u003cbutton id=\"jf-imh-close\" aria-label=\"Close menu\">\n      \u003csvg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\">\n        \u003cpath stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" d=\"M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12\">\u003c/path>\n      \u003c/svg>\n    \u003c/button>\n\n    \u003cdiv class=\"jf-imh-links-wrap\">\n      \u003ca href=\"https://support.jfrog.com/s/create-ticket\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" class=\"jf-imh-drawer-link\">\n        Contact Support\n      \u003c/a>\n\n      \u003chr class=\"jf-imh-divider\" />\n\n      \u003ca href=\"https://jfrog.com/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" class=\"jf-imh-drawer-link\">\n        JFrog.com\n      \u003c/a>\n    \u003c/div>\n  \u003c/div>\n\u003c/div>\n\n\u003cscript>\n(function () {\n  const TAG = \"__jfInteriorMobileHeader_identicalMenu_withSearchProxy_v1\";\n  if (window[TAG]) return;\n  window[TAG] = true;\n\n  function getReadMeSearchToggle() {\n    return (\n      document.querySelector(\".rm-Header .rm-SearchToggle\") ||\n      document.querySelector(\".rm-SearchToggle\")\n    );\n  }\n\n  function openReadMeSearch() {\n    const nativeSearchBtn = getReadMeSearchToggle();\n\n    if (nativeSearchBtn) {\n      nativeSearchBtn.click();\n      return true;\n    }\n\n    // Fallback if ReadMe binds shortcut listeners instead of button behavior\n    const isMac = /Mac|iPhone|iPad|iPod/.test(navigator.platform);\n    const evt = new KeyboardEvent(\"keydown\", {\n      key: \"k\",\n      code: \"KeyK\",\n      metaKey: isMac,\n      ctrlKey: !isMac,\n      bubbles: true,\n      cancelable: true\n    });\n    document.dispatchEvent(evt);\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  function initSearchProxy() {\n    const searchBtn = document.getElementById(\"jf-imh-search-btn\");\n    if (!searchBtn || searchBtn.__jfBound) return;\n\n    searchBtn.addEventListener(\"click\", function (e) {\n      e.preventDefault();\n !overlay) return;\n\n    function openDrawer() {\n      overlay.classList.add(\"jf-open\");\n      overlay.setAttribute(\"aria-hidden\", \"false\");\n      menuBtn.setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\", \"true\");\n      document.documentElement.classList.add(\"jf-imh-lock-scroll\");\n    }\n\n    function closeDrawer() {\n      overlay.classList.remove(\"jf-open\");\n      overlay.setAttribute(\"aria-hidden\", \"true\");\n      menuBtn.setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\", \"false\");\n      document.documentElement.classList.remove(\"jf-imh-lock-scroll\");\n    }\n\n    if closeBtn.addEventListener(\"click\", closeDrawer);\n      closeBtn.__jfBound = true;\n    }\n\n    if (backdrop && !backdrop.__jfBound) {\n      backdrop.addEventListener(\"click\", closeDrawer);\n \"/\").split(\"#\")[0].split(\"?\")[0];\n    path = path.replace(/\\/+$/, \"\");\n    return path || \"/\";\n  }\n\n  function getMain() {\n    /* Guides OR API Reference */\n    return (\n var parts = path.split(\"/\").filter(Boolean);\n\n    /* Expected:\n       /artifactory/docs/...\n       /artifactory/reference/...\n       -> base = /artifactory\n    */\n    if (!parts.length) return \"\";\n\n    // Optional guard: if first segment is docs/reference at root, don't use it as project\n    if (parts[0] === \"docs\" || parts[0] === \"reference\") return \"\";\n\n    return \"/\" + parts[0];\n  }\n\n  function buildTabs() {\n    var wrap = document.createElement(\"div\");\n    wrap.id = \"jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs\";\n    wrap.setAttribute(\"role\", \"navigation\");\n    wrap.setAttribute(\"aria-label\", \"Section navigation\");\n\n    var guides = document.createElement(\"a\");\n    guides.className = \"jf-mobile-top-tab\";\n    guides.setAttribute(\"data-kind\", \"guides\");\n    guides.textContent = \"Guides\";\n\n    var api = document.createElement(\"a\");\n    api.className = \"jf-mobile-top-tab\";\n    api.setAttribute(\"data-kind\", \"api\");\n    api.textContent = \"API Reference\";\n\n    wrap.appendChild(guides);\n    wrap.appendChild(api);\n    return wrap;\n  }\n\n  function getOrCreateTabs() {\n    var tabs = document.getElementById(\"jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs\");\n    if (!tabs) tabs = buildTabs();\n    return tabs;\n  }\n\n  function updateTabLinks() {\n    var tabs = document.getElementById(\"jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs\");\n    if (!tabs) return;\n\n    var base = getProjectBase(); // \"/artifactory\"\n    var guidesHref = (base || \"\") + \"/docs\";\n    var apiHref = (base || \"\") + \"/reference\";\n\n    var guides = tabs.querySelector('[data-kind=\"guides\"]');\n    var api = tabs.querySelector('[data-kind=\"api\"]');\n\n    if (guides) guides.setAttribute(\"href\", guidesHref);\n    if (api) api.setAttribute(\"href\", apiHref);\n  }\n\n  function setActive() {\n    var tabs = document.getElementById(\"jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs\");\n    if (!tabs) return;\n\n    var current = normalizePath(window.location.pathname);\n    var links = tabs.querySelectorAll(\".jf-mobile-top-tab\");\n    for (var i = 0; i \u003c links.length; i++) {\n      links[i].classList.remove(\"is-active\");\n      links[i].removeAttribute(\"aria-current\");\n    }\n\n    var active;\n    if (/\\/reference(\\/|$)/.test(current)) {\n      active = tabs.querySelector('[data-kind=\"api\"]');\n    } else {\n      active = tabs.querySelector('[data-kind=\"guides\"]');\n    }\n\n    if (active) {\n      active.classList.add(\"is-active\");\n      active.setAttribute(\"aria-current\", \"page\");\n    }\n  }\n\n  function ensureInserted() {\n    var existing = document.getElementById(\"jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs\");\n\n    if (!isMobile()) {\n      if (existing && existing.parentNode) existing.parentNode.removeChild(existing);\n      return false;\n    }\n\n    var main = getMain();\n    if (!main) return false;\n\n    var tabs = existing || getOrCreateTabs();\n\n    // Insert as first child of main (works for both Guides and Reference mains)\n    if (main.firstElementChild !== tabs) {\n      main.insertBefore(tabs, main.firstChild);\n 20px;\n    padding: 10px;\n    margin: 5px;\n\n\n\n    box-sizing: border-box;\n  }\n\n  /* Dark mode safety (covers common patterns) */\n  html.dark .rm-ai-disclaimer,\n  html[data-color-mode=\"dark\"] .rm-ai-disclaimer,\n  body.dark .rm-ai-disclaimer {\n    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);\n    border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18);\n  }\n\n  /* Messages area scroll */\n  .rm-AskAi-chat .ChatInterface-emptyChat30Oe0OpCASL2,\n  .rm-AskAi-chat .ChatInterface-chat30Oe0OpCASL2,\n  .rm-AskAi-chat [class^=\"ChatInterface-emptyChat\"],\n  .rm-AskAi-chat [class^=\"ChatInterface-chat\"] {\n    flex: 1 1 auto;\n    min-height: 0;\n    overflow: auto;\n    background: #fff;\n  }\n\n  @media (max-width: 680px) {\n    /* ✅ IMPORTANT: stop absolute positioning so it can sit under the input */\n    .rm-ai-disclaimer {\n      position: static !important;\n      bottom: auto !important;\n      margin: 10px 12px 0;\n    }\n\n    /* Undo prior mobile hacks that fight \"under the search/input\" */\n    div[class^=\"ChatInterface-inputArea\"] {\n      margin-top: 0 !important;\n    }\n\n    div[class^=\"EmptyChatOptions-inputWrapper\"] {\n      position: static !important;\n      bottom: auto !important;\n    }\n\n    /* Existing specific selector + a prefix-based fallback */\n    .ContentWithOwlbot_with-sidebar2GrCj6YAOyV6 .ContentWithOwlbot-sidebar1cgUrK3uYZLh,\n    [class^=\"ContentWithOwlbot_with-sidebar\"] [class^=\"ContentWithOwlbot-sidebar\"] {\n      border: 0;\n      border-radius: 0;\n      -webkit-box-shadow: none;\n      box-shadow: none;\n      -webkit-box-flex: 0;\n      -ms-flex: 0 0 100%;\n      flex: 0 0 100%;\n      position: relative;\n      right: 0;\n      top: 30px;\n      width: 100%;\n    }\n  }\n\u003c/style>\n\n\u003cscript>\n  // =========================================================\n  // Ask AI disclaimer injection (SPA-safe + placed UNDER input)\n  // - Inserts directly after the Ask AI input wrapper (empty state)\n  // - Also handles chat state (input area)\n  // - Moves existing disclaimer if it ended up elsewhere\n  // =========================================================\n  (function () {\n    \"use strict\";\n\n    // Idempotent guard\n    if (window.__rmAskAiDisclaimerV3) return;\n    window.__rmAskAiDisclaimerV3 = true;\n\n    var DISCLAIMER_ID = \"rm-ai-disclaimer\";\n\n    var disclaimerText =\n      \"AI can get things wrong, so double check any info or code. You're responsible for verifying results are accurate and fit your needs before taking action. Do not input sensitive information.\";\n\n    function getAskAiRoot() {\n      return document.querySelector(\".rm-AskAi-chat\");\n    }\n\n    function findInsertionAnchor(root) {\n      if (!root) return null;\n\n      // ✅ Empty state input wrapper (your screenshot shows this)\n      var emptyInput =\n        root.querySelector(\".EmptyChatOptions-inputWrapper1QdyF__AmKN8\") ||\n        root.querySelector('[class^=\"EmptyChatOptions-inputWrapper\"]');\n\n      if (emptyInput) return emptyInput;\n\n      // ✅ Chat state input area\n      var chatInput =\n        root.querySelector('[class^=\"ChatInterface-inputArea\"]') ||\n        root.querySelector('[class*=\"ChatInterface-inputArea\"]');\n\n      if (chatInput) return chatInput;\n\n      return null;\n    }\n\n    function ensureDisclaimer() {\n      var root = getAskAiRoot();\n      if (!root) return;\n\n      var anchor = findInsertionAnchor(root);\n      if (!anchor || !anchor.parentNode) return;\n\n      var el = document.getElementById(DISCLAIMER_ID);\n\n      if (!el) {\n        el = document.createElement(\"div\");\n        el.id = DISCLAIMER_ID;\n        el.className = \"rm-ai-disclaimer\";\n        el.textContent = disclaimerText;\n      }\n\n      // Already immediately after the anchor => done\n      if (anchor.nextSibling === el) return;\n\n      // Insert directly under the input/search block\n      anchor.parentNode.insertBefore(el, anchor.nextSibling);\n    }\n\n    // Throttle observer callbacks (avoid hammering during SPA hydration)\n    var scheduled = false;\n    function scheduleEnsure() {\n      if (scheduled) return;\n      scheduled = true;\n      requestAnimationFrame(function () {\n        scheduled = false;\n        ensureDisclaimer();\n      });\n    }\n\n    // Initial attempt\n    if (document.readyState === \"loading\") {\n      document.addEventListener(\"DOMContentLoaded\", scheduleEnsure);\n    } else {\n      scheduleEnsure();\n    }\n\n    // Observe ONLY body (not documentElement) to detect Ask AI mount/unmount\n    var bodyObserver = new MutationObserver(function () {\n      scheduleEnsure();\n    });\n\n    // If body isn't ready yet, wait a tick\n    function startObserver() {\n      if (!document.body) return setTimeout(startObserver, 50);\n      bodyObserver.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });\n    }\n    startObserver();\n  })();\n\u003c/script>\n\n\u003cstyle>\n  /* PNG icon swap (default -> hover) */\n  #rm-scroll-top-btn .rm-stt-icon {\n    position: relative;\n    width: 21px;\n    height: 24px;\n    display: block;\n  }\n  #rm-scroll-top-btn .rm-stt-icon img {\n    position: absolute;\n    inset: 0;\n    width: 21px;\n    height: 24px;\n    display: block;\n    user-select: none;\n    pointer-events: none;\n  }\n  #rm-scroll-top-btn .rm-stt-icon .rm-stt-hover {\n    opacity: 0;\n    transition: opacity 120ms ease;\n  }\n  #rm-scroll-top-btn:hover .rm-stt-icon .rm-stt-hover { opacity: 1; }\n  #rm-scroll-top-btn:hover .rm-stt-icon .rm-stt-default { opacity: 0; }\n\u003c/style>\n\n\u003cscript>\n/**\n * Scroll-to-top button (ReadMe Refactored / transform-scroll safe)\n * ---------------------------------------------------------------\n * ✅ Hidden on load\n * ✅ Shows after FIRST scroll intent (wheel/touch/keys)\n * ✅ Hides again when user returns to TOP (using moving content marker baseline)\n * ✅ Click scrolls to TOP OF ENTIRE PAGE (tries parent/top too) + hides + resets\n * ✅ SPA-safe (re-injects if React removes)\n * ✅ Mobile-safe: detects inner scroll container + guards against scroll-persist fighting back\n */\n(function () {\n  \"use strict\";\n\n  if (window.__rmScrollTopWorkingV3) return;\n  window.__rmScrollTopWorkingV3 = true;\n\n  var BTN_ID = \"rm-scroll-top-btn\";\n  var STYLE_ID = \"rm-scroll-top-btn-style\";\n\n  // ===== CONFIG =====\n  var RIGHT_PX = 34;\n  var BOTTOM_PX = 110; // adjust to sit above Ask AI\n  var SIZE_PX = 64;\n  var Z_INDEX = 999999;\n\n  // How close to \"baseline top\" counts as being back at top\n  var TOP_TOLERANCE_PX = 6;\n\n  // How long after an input we keep checking (covers inertial scroll)\n  var CHECK_WINDOW_MS = 1400;\n  // ==================\n\n  // Remove prior injected button/style (prevents duplicates across edits)\n  try {\n    var oldBtn = document.getElementById(BTN_ID);\n    if (oldBtn && oldBtn.parentNode) oldBtn.parentNode.removeChild(oldBtn);\n    var oldStyle = document.getElementById(STYLE_ID);\n    if (oldStyle && oldStyle.parentNode) oldStyle.parentNode.removeChild(oldStyle);\n  } catch (e) {}\n\n  function ensureStyles() {\n    if (document.getElementById(STYLE_ID)) return;\n\n    var css = \"\"\n      + \"#\" + BTN_ID + \"{\"\n      + \"  position: fixed;\"\n      + \"  right: \" + RIGHT_PX + \"px;\"\n      + \"  bottom: \" + BOTTOM_PX + \"px;\"\n      + \"  width: \" + SIZE_PX + \"px;\"\n      + \"  height: \" + SIZE_PX + \"px;\"\n      + \"  border-radius: 9999px;\"\n      + \"  border: 1px solid #EAEEF5;\"\n      + \"  cursor: pointer;\"\n      + \"  display: inline-flex;\"\n      + \"  align-items: center;\"\n      + \"  justify-content: center;\"\n      + \"  z-index: \" + Z_INDEX + \";\"\n      + \"  background: #F2F5F5;\"\n      + \"  box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);\"\n      + \"  opacity: 0;\"\n      + \"  transform: translateY(10px) scale(0.98);\"\n      + \"  pointer-events: none;\"\n      + \"  transition: opacity 180ms ease, transform 180ms ease, background-color 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease;\"\n      + \"}\"\n      + \"#\" + BTN_ID + \".rm-visible{\"\n      + \"  opacity: 1;\"\n      + \"  transform: translateY(0) scale(1);\"\n      + \"  pointer-events: auto;\"\n      + \"}\"\n      + \"#\" + BTN_ID + \":hover{\"\n      + \"  background: #E1F7E1;\"\n      + \"  border-color: #7CCF83;\"\n      + \"  box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);\"\n      + \"}\"\n      + \"#\" + BTN_ID + \":active{\"\n      + \"  transform: translateY(0) scale(0.98);\"\n      + \"}\"\n      + \"#\" + BTN_ID + \" .rm-stt-icon{\"\n      + \"  position: relative;\"\n      + \"  width: 21px;\"\n      + \"  height: 24px;\"\n      + \"  display: block;\"\n      + \"}\"\n      + \"#\" + BTN_ID + \" .rm-stt-icon img{\"\n      + \"  position: absolute;\"\n      + \"  inset: 0;\"\n      + \"  width: 21px;\"\n      + \"  height: 24px;\"\n      + \"  display: block;\"\n      + \"  user-select: none;\"\n      + \"  pointer-events: none;\"\n      + \"}\"\n      + \"#\" + BTN_ID + \" .rm-stt-icon .rm-stt-hover{\"\n      + \"  opacity: 0;\"\n      + \"  transition: opacity 120ms ease;\"\n      + \"}\"\n      + \"#\" + BTN_ID + \":hover .rm-stt-icon .rm-stt-hover{ opacity: 1; }\"\n      + \"#\" + BTN_ID + \":hover .rm-stt-icon .rm-stt-default{ opacity: 0; }\"\n      + \"@media (max-width: 680px){\"\n      + \"  #\" + BTN_ID + \"{ width: 58px; height: 58px; right: 16px; bottom: \" + (BOTTOM_PX - 10) + \"px; }\"\n      + \"}\";\n\n    var style = document.createElement(\"style\");\n    style.id = STYLE_ID;\n    style.appendChild(document.createTextNode(css));\n    (document.head || document.documentElement).appendChild(style);\n  }\n\n  function ensureButton() {\n    var btn = document.getElementById(BTN_ID);\n    if (btn) return btn;\n\n    btn = document.createElement(\"button\");\n    btn.id = BTN_ID;\n    btn.type = \"button\";\n    btn.setAttribute(\"aria-label\", \"Scroll to top\");\n\n    btn.innerHTML =\n      '\u003cspan class=\"rm-stt-icon\" aria-hidden=\"true\">'\n    +   '\u003cimg class=\"rm-stt-default\" alt=\"\" src=\"https://files.readme.io/0bbf3e525b8281fda28a473882453e61b7c7985256bd41edbe6a699445760daf-ScollTop_default.png\" />'\n    +   '\u003cimg class=\"rm-stt-hover\" alt=\"\" src=\"https://files.readme.io/2029662fcad677ec72ff5a5505d8a2c125aa11b84b08e917e377e583d5d15701-ScrollTop_hover.png\" />'\n    + '\u003c/span>';\n\n    btn.addEventListener(\"click\", function () {\n      // Signal to scroll-persist (Additional.js) not to fight us\n      window.__rmScrollToTopInProgress = true;\n\n      goToTopEveryWay();\n      hide();\n      hasScrollIntent = false;\n\n      // Clear the flag after all restore timers in Additional.js will have fired\n      setTimeout(function () {\n        window.__rmScrollToTopInProgress = false;\n      }, 2000);\n    });\n\n    document.body.appendChild(btn);\n    return btn;\n  }\n\n  function show() { ensureButton().classList.add(\"rm-visible\"); }\n  function hide() { ensureButton().classList.remove(\"rm-visible\"); }\n\n  // ===== Detect the actual scrolling container (mobile fix) =====\n  function getScrollContainer() {\n    var candidates = [\n      document.querySelector('[data-testid=\"RDMD\"]'),\n      document.querySelector(\".rm-Markdown\"),\n      document.querySelector(\".content-body\"),\n      document.querySelector(\"main\"),\n      document.body\n    ];\n    for (var i = 0; i \u003c candidates.length; i++) {\n      var el = candidates[i];\n      if (!el) continue;\n      var parent = el.parentElement;\n      while (parent && parent !== document.documentElement) {\n        var style = window.getComputedStyle(parent);\n        var overflow = style.overflow + style.overflowY;\n        if (/auto|scroll/.test(overflow) && parent.scrollHeight > parent.clientHeight) {\n          return parent;\n        }\n        parent = parent.parentElement;\n      }\n      break;\n    }\n    var se = document.scrollingElement || document.documentElement;\n    return (se && se.scrollTop > 0) ? se : window;\n  }\n\n  // ===== Reliable \"top\" detection (NO scrollTop) =====\n  var baselineTop = null;\n\n  function getMarkerEl() {\n    return (\n      document.querySelector('[data-testid=\"RDMD\"]') ||\n      document.querySelector(\".rm-Markdown[data-testid]\") ||\n      document.querySelector(\".rm-Markdown\") ||\n      document.querySelector(\".content-body\") ||\n      document.querySelector(\"#content-container\") ||\n      document.querySelector(\".rm-Article\") ||\n      document.querySelector(\"main\")\n    );\n  }\n\n  function ensureBaseline() {\n    if (baselineTop != null) return;\n    var m = getMarkerEl();\n    if (!m || !m.getBoundingClientRect) return;\n    baselineTop = m.getBoundingClientRect().top;\n  }\n\n  function isAtTop() {\n    ensureBaseline();\n    if (baselineTop == null) return false;\n\n    var m = getMarkerEl();\n    if (!m || !m.getBoundingClientRect) return false;\n\n    var curTop = m.getBoundingClientRect().top;\n    return curTop >= (baselineTop - TOP_TOLERANCE_PX);\n  }\n\n  // ===== Scroll intent → show/hide logic =====\n  var hasScrollIntent = false;\n\n  function updateVisibility() {\n    if (!hasScrollIntent) { hide(); return; }\n    if (isAtTop()) hide();\n    else show();\n  }\n\n  var rafActive = false;\n  var rafUntil = 0;\n\n  function tick() {\n    if (!rafActive) return;\n    updateVisibility();\n    if (Date.now() \u003c rafUntil) requestAnimationFrame(tick);\n    else rafActive = false;\n  }\n\n  function onScrollIntent() {\n    hasScrollIntent = true;\n    rafUntil = Date.now() + CHECK_WINDOW_MS;\n    if (!rafActive) { rafActive = true; requestAnimationFrame(tick); }\n    updateVisibility();\n  }\n\n  function isScrollKey(e) {\n    var k = e && (e.key || e.keyCode);\n    return (\n      k === \"ArrowDown\" || k === \"ArrowUp\" ||\n      k === \"PageDown\" || k === \"PageUp\" ||\n      k === \"Home\" || k === \"End\" ||\n      k === \" \" ||\n      k === 32 || k === 33 || k === 34 || k === 35 || k === 36 ||\n      k === 38 || k === 40\n    );\n  }\n\n  // ===== \"Go to top\" — try everything including inner scroll container =====\n  function goToTopEveryWay() {\n    var sc = getScrollContainer();\n\n    // Scroll the detected inner container first (mobile fix)\n    try {\n      if (sc && sc !== window && typeof sc.scrollTo === \"function\") {\n        sc.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: \"smooth\" });\n        sc.scrollTop = 0;\n      }\n    } catch (e) {}\n\n    // Desktop fallbacks (preserved from original)\n    try { window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: \"smooth\" }); } catch (e) {}\n    try { window.top.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: \"smooth\" }); } catch (e) {}\n    try { window.parent.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: \"smooth\" }); } catch (e) {}\n\n    try {\n      var se = document.scrollingElement || document.documentElement || document.body;\n      if (se && se.scrollTo) se.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: \"smooth\" });\n      if (se) se.scrollTop = 0;\n    } catch (e) {}\n\n    try {\n      var header =\n        document.querySelector(\".rm-Header\") ||\n        document.querySelector(\"[class*='rm-Header']\") ||\n        document.querySelector(\"header\");\n      if (header && header.scrollIntoView) header.scrollIntoView({ behavior: \"smooth\", block: \"start\" });\n    } catch (e) {}\n\n    try { window.scrollTo(0, 0); } catch (e) {}\n  }\n\n  function init() {\n    ensureStyles();\n    ensureButton();\n    hide();\n    ensureBaseline();\n\n    // Desktop listeners (window-level)\n    window.addEventListener(\"wheel\",      onScrollIntent, { passive: true, capture: true });\n    window.addEventListener(\"touchmove\",  onScrollIntent, { passive: true, capture: true });\n    window.addEventListener(\"touchstart\", onScrollIntent, { passive: true, capture: true });\n    window.addEventListener(\"keydown\", function (e) { if (isScrollKey(e)) onScrollIntent(); }, true);\n\n    // Mobile fix: also listen on the inner scroll container if it differs from window\n    var sc = getScrollContainer();\n    if (sc && sc !== window) {\n      sc.addEventListener(\"scroll\",    onScrollIntent, { passive: true });\n      sc.addEventListener(\"touchmove\", onScrollIntent, { passive: true });\n    }\n\n    // SPA-safe: if React swaps content and baseline changes, refresh baseline\n    var mo = new MutationObserver(function () {\n      ensureStyles();\n      ensureButton();\n      baselineTop = null;\n      ensureBaseline();\n      updateVisibility();\n    });\n    mo.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });\n  }\n\n  if (document.readyState === \"loading\") {\n    document.addEventListener(\"DOMContentLoaded\", init, { once: true });\n  } else {\n    init();\n  }\n})();\n\u003c/script>\n\n\n\u003cscript>\n  /**************************************\n   * Async Consent (Transcend Airgap)\n   * - SPA-safe \"Cookie Settings\" click handler (event delegation)\n   * - Idempotent guards\n   * - Exposes: window.jfrogConsent.addAirgapCallback(fn) + window.jfrogConsent.getConsent()\n   *\n   * Patch (prevents \"random\" image/src stripping):\n   * - Sets data-unknown-request-policy=\"allow\" so unclassified asset hosts (e.g., images/CDN)\n   *   don't get request-regulated and have src/srcset neutered.\n   * - Optional: hard-disable request regulation via data-protect=\"off\" (commented).\n   **************************************/\n  (function () {\n    \"use strict\";\n\n    window.jfrogConsent = window.jfrogConsent || {};\n    window.jfrogConsent.callbacks = window.jfrogConsent.callbacks || [];\n\n    // Register callbacks that run once airgap is ready\n    window.jfrogConsent.addAirgapCallback = function (callback) {\n      if (typeof callback !== \"function\") {\n        try { console.warn(\"Provided callback is not a function:\", callback); } catch (e) {}\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (window.airgap && typeof window.airgap.getConsent === \"function\") {\n        callback();\n        return;\n      }\n\n      window.jfrogConsent.callbacks.push(callback);\n    };\n\n    // Preview/iframe guard (keeps production behavior, reduces preview flakiness)\n    var isFramePreview = (location.search || \"\").indexOf(\"isFramePreview=true\") !== -1;\n    var isInIframe = false;\n    try { isInIframe = window.self !== window.top; } catch (e) { isInIframe = true; }\n\n    var BUNDLE_ID = \"f0071674-c641-4cf3-9d31-303ec0c86b1b\";\n\n    function defineGetConsent() {\n      window.jfrogConsent.getConsent = function () {\n        if (window.airgap && typeof window.airgap.getConsent === \"function\") {\n          var consent = window.airgap.getConsent() || {};\n          var purposes = consent.purposes || {};\n          return {\n            functional: purposes.Functional === true,\n            analytics: purposes.Analytics === true,\n            advertising: purposes.Advertising === true,\n            saleOfInfo: purposes.SaleOfInfo === true\n          };\n        }\n\n        try { console.warn(\"airgap.getConsent is not available.\"); } catch (e) {}\n        return {\n          functional: false,\n          analytics: false,\n          advertising: false,\n          saleOfInfo: false\n        };\n      };\n    }\n\n    // Ensure a stable shape even before airgap loads\n    if (typeof window.jfrogConsent.getConsent !== \"function\") defineGetConsent();\n\n    function runCallbacks() {\n      var list = window.jfrogConsent.callbacks || [];\n      for (var i = 0; i \u003c list.length; i++) {\n        try { if (typeof list[i] === \"function\") list[i](); } catch (e) {}\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Load airgap.js (idempotent)\n    function loadAirgap() {\n      if (document.getElementById(\"__jfrog_airgap_script\")) return;\n\n      var script = document.createElement(\"script\");\n      script.id = \"__jfrog_airgap_script\";\n      script.type = \"text/javascript\";\n      script.src = \"https://transcend-cdn.com/cm/\" + BUNDLE_ID + \"/airgap.js\";\n      script.async = true;\n      script.defer = true;\n\n      // Cloudflare directive\n      script.setAttribute(\"data-cfasync\", \"false\");\n\n      // IMPORTANT: prevent \"unknown host\" request regulation from stripping image src/srcset\n      // (best long-term fix is still classifying your image/CDN domains in Transcend,\n      //  but this stops the breakage immediately.)\n      script.setAttribute(\"data-unknown-request-policy\", \"allow\");\n\n      // Optional emergency hammer (NOT recommended unless you must):\n      // Disables request regulation entirely (stops DOM URL stripping, but weakens enforcement)\n      // script.setAttribute(\"data-protect\", \"off\");\n\n      // Overrides + language\n      script.dataset.trackerOverrides =\n        \"GoogleConsentMode:security_storage=on;ad_storage=SaleOfInfo,Advertising;ad_user_data=SaleOfInfo,Advertising;ad_personalization=SaleOfInfo,Advertising;analytics_storage=Analytics,SaleOfInfo;functionality_storage=Functional,SaleOfInfo;personalization_storage=Functional,SaleOfInfo\";\n      script.dataset.languages = \"en\";\n\n      script.addEventListener(\"error\", function (evt) {\n        try { console.error(\"Failed to load airgap.js:\", evt); } catch (e) {}\n      });\n\n      (document.head || document.documentElement).appendChild(script);\n    }\n\n    // Stub airgap.ready queue if not present (so callbacks can register)\n    if (!window.airgap || typeof window.airgap.ready !== \"function\") {\n      window.airgap = window.airgap || {};\n      window.airgap.readyQueue = window.airgap.readyQueue || [];\n      window.airgap.ready = function (cb) {\n        window.airgap.readyQueue.push(cb);\n      };\n    }\n\n    // If we're in iframe preview, skip loading the external script (optional safety)\n    // Cookie settings click handler below still works when transcend is available.\n    if (!(isFramePreview || isInIframe)) {\n      loadAirgap();\n    }\n\n    // When airgap becomes ready, define consent helper + run callbacks\n    try {\n      window.airgap.ready(function () {\n        defineGetConsent();\n        runCallbacks();\n      });\n    } catch (e) {}\n\n    // SPA-safe Cookie Settings handler (event delegation) — bind once\n    if (!window.__jfrogCookieSettingsBound) {\n      window.__jfrogCookieSettingsBound = true;\n\n      document.addEventListener(\n        \"click\",\n        function (e) {\n          var link = e.target && e.target.closest ? e.target.closest(\"#cookie_settings\") : null;\n          if (!link) return;\n\n          // Prevent \"#\" jump / URL mutation\n          e.preventDefault();\n\n          if (window.transcend && typeof window.transcend.showConsentManager === \"function\") {\n            window.transcend.showConsentManager({ viewState: \"CompleteOptions\" });\n            return;\n (min-width: 768px) and (max-width: 1320px) {\n  .rm-Header-search .rm-SearchToggle {\n    width: 100px !important;\n    padding: 0 14px !important;\n    gap: 8px !important;\n    height: 40px !important;\n  }\n\n.rm-Header-search .rm-SearchToggle-placeholder::after {\n        content: \"Search\";\n        position: absolute;\n        left: 0;\n        top: 0;\n        color: #111111 !important;\n        font-weight: 400 !important;\n  }\n\nbutton#rmps-trigger {\n    max-width: 200px !important;\n\n  }\n  }\n\n@media (max-width: 1120px) {\n    .Header-leftADQdGVqx1wqU {\n JFrog Brand Colors -->\n\u003cscript>\n    tailwind.config = {\n        darkMode: \"class\",\n        theme: {\n            extend: {\n                fontFamily: {\n                    sans: [\"Inter\", \"sans-serif\"],\n                },\n                colors: {\n                    jfrog: {\n                        green: \"#40be46\",\n                        greenHover: \"#36a33b\",\n                        dark: \"#0e1622\",\n                        panel: \"#15202b\",\n                        card: \"#1e293b\",\n                        text: \"#cbd5e1\",\n                        light: \"#f8fafc\",\n                    },\n                },\n                boxShadow: {\n                    glow: \"0 0 15px rgba(64, 190, 70, 0.3)\",\n                    \"card-light\":\n                        \"0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05), 0 2px 4px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03)\",\n                },\n                backgroundImage: {\n                    \"hero-pattern\":\n                        \"url('data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width=\\\\'100%\\\\' height=\\\\'100%\\\\' viewBox=\\\\'0 0 1200 800\\\\' xmlns=\\\\'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\\\\'%3E%3Cg fill=\\\\'none\\\\' stroke=\\\\'rgba(64, 190, 70, 0.15)\\\\' stroke-width=\\\\'1\\\\'%3E%3Cpath d=\\\\'M0 600 C 300 700, 600 400, 1200 200\\\\' /%3E%3Cpath d=\\\\'M0 620 C 310 720, 610 420, 1200 220\\\\' /%3E%3Cpath d=\\\\'M0 640 C 320 740, 620 440, 1200 240\\\\' /%3E%3Cpath d=\\\\'M0 660 C 330 760, 630 460, 1200 260\\\\' /%3E%3Cpath d=\\\\'M0 680 C 340 780, 640 480, 1200 280\\\\' /%3E%3Cpath d=\\\\'M0 500 C 400 400, 700 700, 1200 300\\\\' stroke-opacity=\\\\'0.1\\\\' /%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E')\",\n                },\n            },\n        },\n    };\n\u003c/script>\n\n\u003cstyle>\n /* Hide interior mobile header */\n  #jf-imh-header {display:none !important;}\n\n    /* =============================================================================\n    TABLE OF CONTENTS\n    0) ReadMe platform overrides (hide/collapse native header chrome)\n    1) Layout constraints (container widths / z-index / gutters)\n    2) Global scope, variables, and utilities\n    3) Hero section (bg, header CTAs, search, quick links)\n    4) Main category cards (light grid)\n    5) Deep-dive section (dark grid)\n    6) Support links section (bottom light strip)\n    7) Responsive overrides (mobile, extra small, large-screen gutters)\n    8) Mobile hamburger menu\n  ============================================================================= */\n\n    /* =============================================================================\n    0) ReadMe platform overrides\n  ============================================================================= */\n\n    @media (min-width: 768px) {\n\n        .rm-Header-top.Header-topuTMpygDG4e1V.Header-top_classic3g7Q6zoBy8zh {\n            display: none;\n        }\n\n        .rm-Header,\n        .rm-Header-top,\n        .rm-Header-bottom {\n            height: 0 !important;\n            min-height: 0 !important;\n            padding: 0 !important;\n            margin: 0 !important;\n            border: 0 !important;\n        }\n\n        .rm-Header-top,\n        .rm-Header-bottom {\n            overflow: hidden !important;\n        }\n\n        .rm-Header-search,\n        nav[aria-label=\"Primary navigation\"],\n        .rm-ProjectPicker,\n        #theme-toggle {\n            display: none !important;\n        }\n\n        header.container.mx-auto.px-6.py-5.flex.justify-between.items-center.relative.z-20 {\n            max-width: 1940px !important;\n        }\n\n        @media (min-width: 1036px) {\n            .container {\n                max-width: 1356px;\n            }\n        }\n\n        #app-root .container {\n            margin: 0 auto;\n        }\n\n        #app-root header {\n            z-index: 40;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /* --- MOBILE: hide ReadMe native header entirely --- */\n    @media (max-width: 767px) {\n        .rm-Header,\n        .rm-Header-top,\n        .rm-Header-bottom,\n        header.Header3zzata9F_ZPQ.rm-Header_classic,\n        .Header3zzata9F_ZPQ {\n            display: none !important;\n            height: 0 !important;\n            min-height: 0 !important;\n            overflow: hidden !important;\n            padding: 0 !important;\n            margin: 0 !important;\n            border: 0 !important;\n        }\n\n        #rmps-menu,\n        #rmps-wrap,\n        #rmps-trigger {\n            display: none !important;\n        }\n\n        #rm-beta-banner {\n            display: none !important;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /* =============================================================================\n    2) Global scope, variables, and utilities\n  ============================================================================= */\n\n    #app-root {\n        font-family: \"Inter\", sans-serif;\n        --bg-primary: #ffffff;\n        --text-primary: #0f172a;\n        --text-secondary: #475569;\n        --border-color: #e2e8f0;\n        width: 100%;\n        min-height: 100vh;\n        line-height: 1.5;\n        -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;\n    }\n\n    #app-root.dark {\n        --bg-primary: #0e1622;\n        --text-primary: #f8fafc;\n        --text-secondary: #94a3b8;\n        --border-color: #1e293b;\n    }\n\n    .glass-panel {\n        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);\n        backdrop-filter: blur(10px);\n        border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);\n    }\n\n    * {\n        transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1),\n            box-shadow 0.2s ease,\n            border-color 0.2s ease;\n    }\n\n    .hover-lift:hover {\n        transform: translateY(-4px);\n        box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1),\n            0 4px 6px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);\n    }\n\n    #app-root ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 8px; }\n    #app-root ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #0e1622; }\n    #app-root ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #40be46; border-radius: 4px; }\n\n    /* =============================================================================\n    3) Hero section\n  ============================================================================= */\n\n    #app-root .hero-section {\n        height: 482px;\n        background-image: url(\"https://files.readme.io/e2e979165718cf79a25a49f334c0e346c250942308006136c255204613b690b6-562kb_720.png\");\n        background-size: cover;\n        background-position: center;\n        background-repeat: no-repeat;\n    }\n\n    #app-root .hero-section .bg-hero-pattern,\n    #app-root .hero-section .bg-gradient-to-b {\n        display: none;\n    }\n\n    #app-root .hero-cta-group {\n        display: flex;\n        align-items: center;\n        gap: 24px;\n    }\n\n    #app-root .hero-cta {\n        position: relative;\n        min-width: 100px;\n        box-sizing: border-box;\n        display: inline-flex;\n        flex-direction: row;\n        justify-content: center;\n        align-items: center;\n        padding: 12px 40px;\n        height: 44px;\n        border-radius: 50px;\n        border-width: 1px;\n        border-style: solid;\n        font-family: \"Open Sans\";\n        font-weight: 700;\n        font-size: 18px;\n        line-height: 24px;\n        text-align: center;\n        white-space: nowrap;\n        text-decoration: none;\n        transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;\n    }\n\n    #app-root .hero-cta:hover { padding: 12px 28px; }\n\n    #app-root .hero-cta svg {\n        width: 0;\n        top: 1px;\n        display: inline-block !important;\n        opacity: 0;\n        visibility: hidden;\n        transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;\n    }\n\n    #app-root .hero-cta:hover svg {\n        width: 24px;\n        padding-left: 6px;\n        opacity: 1;\n        visibility: visible;\n    }\n\n    #app-root .hero-cta-outline {\n        background: transparent;\n        color: #ffffff;\n    }\n\n    #app-root .hero-cta-outline:hover {\n        background: #09101b4d;\n        border-color: #40be46;\n        color: #40be46;\n    }\n\n    #app-root .hero-cta-solid {\n        border-color: #36a13b;\n        background: #36a13b;\n        color: #ffffff;\n    }\n\n    #app-root .hero-cta-solid:hover {\n        background: #40be46;\n        border-color: #40be46;\n    }\n\n    #app-root .hero-title {\n        font-family: \"Open Sans\", sans-serif;\n        font-style: normal;\n        font-weight: 700;\n        font-size: 40px;\n        line-height: 48px;\n        letter-spacing: -0.02em;\n        color: #ffffff;\n        text-align: center;\n        margin: 0 0 32px 0;\n    }\n\n    #app-root .hero-search { max-width: 874px; margin: 0 auto; }\n    #app-root .hero-search-inner { position: relative; }\n\n    #app-root .hero-search-icon-wrapper {\n        position: absolute;\n        top: 50%;\n        left: 24px;\n        transform: translateY(-50%);\n        display: flex;\n        align-items: center;\n        pointer-events: none;\n    }\n\n    #app-root .hero-search-icon { width: 24px; height: 24px; color: #36a13b; }\n\n    #app-root .hero-search-input {\n        width: 100%;\n        box-sizing: border-box;\n        border: none;\n        outline: none;\n        padding: 20px 32px 20px 72px;\n        border-radius: 12px;\n        background: #ffffff;\n        font-family: \"Inter\", sans-serif;\n        font-weight: 400;\n        font-size: 16px;\n        line-height: 24px;\n        color: #111827;\n        box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.04);\n    }\n\n    #app-root .hero-search-input::placeholder { color: #9ca3af; }\n\n    #app-root .hero-quick-links {\n        margin-top: 40px;\n        display: flex;\n        flex-wrap: wrap;\n        justify-content: center;\n        gap: 28px;\n    }\n\n    #app-root .hero-quick-link {\n        font-family: \"Inter\", sans-serif;\n        font-style: normal;\n        font-weight: 300;\n        font-size: 16px;\n        line-height: 24px;\n        color: #ffffff;\n        text-decoration: underline;\n        text-underline-offset: 4px;\n    }\n\n    #app-root .hero-quick-link:hover { color: #40be46; }\n\n    /* =============================================================================\n    4) Main category cards — horizontal layout\n  ============================================================================= */\n\n    #app-root .card-group-heading {\n        font-family: \"Open Sans\", sans-serif;\n        font-weight: 600;\n        font-size: 24px;\n        line-height: 32px;\n        color: #40be46;\n        text-align: center;\n        margin-bottom: 24px;\n    }\n\n    #app-root .card-group {\n        margin-bottom: 48px;\n    }\n\n    .hp-card {\n        width: 100%;\n        padding: 24px !important;\n        border: 1px solid #D8E6ED;\n        border-radius: 12px;\n        box-sizing: border-box;\n        background: #ffffff;\n        transition: border-color 0.18s ease,\n            background-color 0.18s ease,\n            box-shadow 0.18s ease;\n    }\n\n    .hp-card:hover {\n        border-color: #40be46;\n        box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.06);\n    }\n\n    #app-root .hp-card-inner {\n        display: flex;\n        align-items: flex-start;\n        gap: 12px;\n    }\n\n    #app-root .hp-card-icon-wrap {\n        flex: 0 0 auto;\n        width: 40px;\n        height: 40px;\n        background: transparent;\n        border-radius: 0;\n        display: flex;\n        align-items: center;\n        justify-content: center;\n    }\n\n    #app-root .hp-card-icon-wrap img {\n        width: 40px;\n        height: 40px;\n        object-fit: contain;\n    }\n\n    #app-root .hp-card-text { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }\n\n    #app-root .hp-card-text h3 {\n        font-family: \"Open Sans\", sans-serif;\n        font-weight: 700;\n        font-size: 20px;\n        line-height: 28px;\n        letter-spacing: -0.02em;\n        color: #414857;\n        margin: 0 0 6px 0;\n    }\n\n    #app-root .hp-card-text p {\n        font-family: \"Open Sans\", sans-serif;\n        font-weight: 400;\n        font-size: 16px;\n        line-height: 24px;\n        color: #5E6D81;\n        margin: 0;\n    }\n\n    /* =============================================================================\n    5) Deep-dive section (dark grid)\n  ============================================================================= */\n\n    #app-root .binary-links-section { padding: 40px 0; }\n\n    #app-root .deep-dive-icon { height: 32px; width: auto; display: block; }\n\n    #app-root .deep-dive-card {\n        background-color: #2a323c;\n        border-radius: 12px;\n        border: 1px solid #324152;\n        padding: 20px;\n        min-height: unset;\n        width: 310px;\n        flex: 0 0 310px;\n        box-sizing: border-box;\n        transition: border-color 0.18s ease,\n            background-color 0.18s ease,\n            box-shadow 0.18s ease;\n    }\n\n    #app-root .deep-dive-card:hover {\n        border-color: #40be46;\n        box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.04);\n    }\n\n    #app-root .deep-dive-card p {\n        color: #f8fafb !important;\n        font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif !important;\n        font-size: 16px !important;\n        line-height: 24px !important;\n        font-weight: 400 !important;\n    }\n\n    #app-root .binary-links-section .grid {\n        display: flex;\n        flex-wrap: wrap;\n        gap: 20px;\n    }\n\n    @media (max-width: 767px) {\n        #app-root .deep-dive-card {\n            width: 100% !important;\n            flex: 0 0 100% !important;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /* =============================================================================\n    6) Support links section\n  ============================================================================= */\n\n    #app-root .support-links-section {\n        background-color: #ffffff;\n        padding: 100px 0px;\n    }\n\n    .support-links-section .hp-card:hover { border-color: #40be46; }\n\n    .support-links-section h3 {\n        font-family: \"Open Sans\";\n        font-weight: 700;\n        font-size: 24px;\n        line-height: 32px;\n        color: #1f1f24;\n    }\n\n    .support-links-section .leading-relaxed {\n        font-family: \"Inter\";\n        font-weight: 400;\n        font-size: 18px;\n        line-height: 28px;\n        color: #5c5e6c;\n    }\n\n    #app-root .support-links-grid {\n        display: grid;\n        grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n        row-gap: 64px;\n    }\n\n    @media (min-width: 768px) {\n        #app-root .support-links-grid {\n            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));\n            column-gap: 120px;\n            row-gap: 0;\n        }\n    }\n\n    #app-root .support-link { max-width: 420px; }\n\n    #app-root .support-link-icon {\n        display: block;\n        width: 74px;\n        height: 74px;\n        margin-bottom: 2px;\n    }\n\n    #app-root .support-link-title {\n        font-family: \"Open Sans\", sans-serif;\n        font-weight: 700;\n        font-size: 24px !important;\n        line-height: 32px;\n        letter-spacing: -0.02em;\n        color: #1f1f24;\n        margin: 0 0 16px 0;\n    }\n\n    #app-root .support-link-text {\n        font-family: \"Inter\", sans-serif;\n        font-weight: 400;\n        font-size: 18px !important;\n        line-height: 28px;\n        color: #5c5e6c;\n        margin: 0;\n    }\n\n    .py-20 { padding-top: 2rem; padding-bottom: 2rem; }\n    .mb-6 { margin-bottom: 1rem; }\n\n    .text-xl {\n        font-family: \"Open Sans\", sans-serif !important;\n        font-size: 24px !important;\n        line-height: 33px !important;\n        font-weight: 600 !important;\n        margin-left: 1px !important;\n    }\n\n    /* =============================================================================\n    7) Responsive overrides\n  ============================================================================= */\n\n    @media (max-width: 767px) {\n        html, body { overflow-x: hidden !important; }\n\n        #app-root .container {\n            max-width: 100% !important;\n            padding-left: 16px !important;\n            padding-right: 16px !important;\n        }\n\n        #app-root .hero-section header.container.mx-auto {\n            padding: 12px 16px !important;\n            display: flex !important;\n            align-items: center !important;\n            justify-content: space-between !important;\n            gap: 12px !important;\n            flex-wrap: nowrap !important;\n            overflow: visible !important;\n        }\n\n        #app-root .hero-section header.container.mx-auto>div:first-child {\n            flex: 0 0 auto !important;\n            min-width: 0 !important;\n        }\n\n        #app-root .hero-section header.container.mx-auto img {\n            max-width: 120px !important;\n            width: 120px !important;\n            height: auto !important;\n            display: block !important;\n        }\n\n        #app-root .hero-section header.container.mx-auto .hero-cta-group {\n            display: none !important;\n        }\n\n        #app-root .hero-mobile-controls {\n            display: flex !important;\n            align-items: center !important;\n            gap: 12px !important;\n            margin-left: auto !important;\n        }\n\n        #app-root .hero-mobile-try-btn {\n            display: inline-flex !important;\n            align-items: center;\n            justify-content: center;\n            padding: 8px 20px;\n            border-radius: 50px;\n            background: #36a13b;\n            border: 1px solid #36a13b;\n            color: #ffffff;\n            font-family: \"Open Sans\", sans-serif;\n            font-weight: 700;\n            font-size: 14px;\n            line-height: 20px;\n            text-decoration: none;\n            white-space: nowrap;\n        }\n\n        #app-root .hero-mobile-hamburger {\n            display: flex !important;\n            align-items: center;\n            justify-content: center;\n            width: 44px;\n            height: 44px;\n            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);\n            border: 1.5px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25);\n            border-radius: 50%;\n            cursor: pointer;\n            padding: 0;\n        }\n\n        #app-root .hero-mobile-hamburger svg {\n            width: 22px;\n            height: 22px;\n            color: #ffffff;\n            opacity: 1 !important;\n            visibility: visible !important;\n        }\n\n        #app-root .hero-section .hero-header-divider {\n            display: block !important;\n            width: 100%;\n            border: none;\n            border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);\n            margin: 0;\n            padding: 0;\n        }\n\n        #app-root .hero-section {\n            height: auto !important;\n            min-height: 0 !important;\n            padding-bottom: 18px !important;\n        }\n\n        #app-root .hero-section .container.mx-auto.px-6.pt-16.pb-24 {\n            padding-top: 18px !important;\n            padding-bottom: 18px !important;\n            padding-left: 16px !important;\n            padding-right: 16px !important;\n        }\n\n        #app-root .hero-title {\n            font-size: 30px !important;\n            line-height: 36px !important;\n            margin: 6px 0 14px 0 !important;\n        }\n\n        #app-root .hero-search { max-width: 100% !important; margin: 0 auto !important; }\n\n        #app-root .hero-search-input {\n            padding: 16px 16px 16px 54px !important;\n            border-radius: 12px !important;\n        }\n\n        #app-root .hero-search-icon-wrapper { left: 16px !important; }\n\n        #app-root .hero-quick-links {\n            margin-top: 14px !important;\n            gap: 12px !important;\n            row-gap: 10px !important;\n        }\n\n        section.bg-white.py-20.border-b.border-gray-100 {\n            padding-top: 28px !important;\n            padding-bottom: 28px !important;\n        }\n\n        section.bg-white.py-20.border-b.border-gray-100 .hp-card {\n            padding: 16px !important;\n            max-width: 560px !important;\n            margin-left: auto !important;\n            margin-right: auto !important;\n        }\n\n        #app-root .binary-links-section { padding: 28px 16px !important; }\n\n        #app-root .binary-links-section h2.text-xl { margin-bottom: 12px !important; }\n\n        #app-root .binary-links-section .grid {\n            display: grid !important;\n            grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;\n            gap: 14px !important;\n            justify-items: center !important;\n            align-items: stretch !important;\n        }\n\n        #app-root .deep-dive-card {\n            width: 100% !important;\n            max-width: 560px !important;\n            margin-left: auto !important;\n            margin-right: auto !important;\n            padding: 18px !important;\n        }\n\n        #app-root .deep-dive-icon { height: 28px !important; }\n\n        #app-root .support-links-section { padding: 28px 16px !important; }\n\n        #app-root .support-links-section .grid { row-gap: 22px !important; }\n\n        #app-root .support-links-section .hp-card {\n            max-width: 560px !important;\n            margin-left: auto !important;\n            margin-right: auto !important;\n            padding: 18px !important;\n        }\n    }\n\n    @media (max-width: 420px) {\n        #app-root .hero-section header.container.mx-auto img {\n            max-width: 110px !important;\n            width: 110px !important;\n        }\n\n        #app-root .hero-mobile-try-btn {\n            padding: 6px 16px !important;\n            font-size: 13px !important;\n        }\n\n        #app-root .hero-title {\n            font-size: 28px !important;\n            line-height: 34px !important;\n        }\n\n        section.bg-white.py-20.border-b.border-gray-100 .hp-card,\n        #app-root .deep-dive-card,\n        #app-root .support-links-section .hp-card {\n            padding: 16px !important;\n        }\n    }\n\n    @media (min-width: 1024px) {\n        #app-root .container {\n            max-width: 1388px !important;\n            margin-left: auto !important;\n            margin-right: auto padding-left: 16px !important;\n            padding-right: 16px !important;\n        }\n    }\n\n    @media (max-width: 768px) {\n        .hp-card {\n            border-radius: 12px !important;\n            border: 1px solid #EAEEF5;\n        }\n    }\n\n    header.container.mx-auto.px-6.py-5.flex.justify-between.items-center.relative.z-20 {\n        height: 75px;\n    }\n\n    #app-root .hero-mobile-controls {\n        display: none;\n    }\n    #app-root .hero-header-divider {\n        display: none;\n    }\n\n    /* =============================================================================\n    8) Mobile hamburger drawer overlay\n  ============================================================================= */\n\n    #jf-mobile-drawer-overlay {\n        position: fixed;\n        inset: 0;\n        z-index: 9999;\n        display: none;\n    }\n\n    #jf-mobile-drawer-overlay.jf-drawer-open {\n        display: flex;\n    }\n\n    #jf-mobile-drawer-backdrop {\n        position: absolute;\n        inset: 0;\n        background: rgba(14, 22, 34, 0.75);\n    }\n\n    #jf-mobile-drawer {\n        position: relative;\n        margin-left: auto;\n        width: 370px;\n        max-width: 80vw;\n        background: #111821;\n        min-height: 100vh;\n        display: flex;\n        flex-direction: column;\n        padding: 20px 24px;\n        box-sizing: border-box;\n    }\n\n    #jf-mobile-drawer-close {\n        align-self: flex-start;\n        background: none;\n        border: none;\n        cursor: pointer;\n        padding: 4px;\n        margin-bottom: 24px;\n    }\n\n    #jf-mobile-drawer-close svg {\n        width: 24px;\n        height: 24px;\n        color: #ffffff;\n    }\n\n    .jf-drawer-links-wrap {\n        display: flex;\n        flex-direction: column;\n        align-items: center;\n        width: 100%;\n    }\n\n    .jf-drawer-link {\n        display: inline-block;\n        box-sizing: border-box;\n        text-align: center;\n        padding: 14px 40px;\n        border-radius: 50px;\n        border: 1.5px solid #40be46;\n        color: #ffffff;\n        font-family: \"Open Sans\", sans-serif;\n        font-weight: 600;\n        font-size: 16px;\n        line-height: 22px;\n        text-decoration: none;\n        transition: background-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease;\n        white-space: nowrap;\n    }\n\n    .jf-drawer-link:hover {\n        background: rgba(64, 190, 70, 0.1);\n    }\n\n    .jf-drawer-divider {\n        width: 100%;\n        border: none;\n        border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);\n        margin: 24px 0;\n    }\n\n    @media (min-width: 768px) {\n        #jf-mobile-drawer-overlay {\n            display: none !important;\n        }\n    }\n\u003c/style>\n\n\u003cscript>\n    (function () {\n        const TAG = \"__jfrogAskAiProxyInstalled_v2\";\n        if (window[TAG]) return;\n        window[TAG] = true;\n\n        const ORIGINAL_CLASS = \"rm-AskAi-original\";\n        const PROXY_CLASS = \"rm-AskAi-proxy\";\n        const PROXY_ATTR = \"data-askai-proxy\";\n\n        let obs = null;\n        let scheduled = false;\n\n        function findOriginal() {\n            const root = document.querySelector(\".rm-AskAi\");\n            if (!root) return null;\n            const btn =\n                root.querySelector(\"button\") ||\n                root.querySelector('[role=\"button\"]') ||\n                root.querySelector(\"a\");\n            if (!btn) return null;\n            return { root, btn };\n        }\n\n        function getProxy() {\n            return document.querySelector(`.rm-AskAi.${PROXY_CLASS}[${PROXY_ATTR}=\"true\"]`);\n        }\n\n        function proxyIsGood(proxy) {\n            if (!proxy) return false;\n            return proxy.parentElement === document.body;\n        }\n\n        function ensureProxy() {\n            const original = findOriginal();\n            if (!original) return false;\n            const { root, btn } = original;\n            if (!root.classList.contains(ORIGINAL_CLASS)) root.classList.add(ORIGINAL_CLASS);\n            const existing = getProxy();\n            if (proxyIsGood(existing)) {\n                existing.__askAiTargetBtn = btn;\n                return true;\n            }\n            const proxy = root.cloneNode(true);\n            proxy.setAttribute(PROXY_ATTR, \"true\");\n            proxy.classList.remove(ORIGINAL_CLASS);\n            proxy.classList.add(PROXY_CLASS);\n            proxy.__askAiTargetBtn = btn;\n            const forward = e => {\n                e.preventDefault();\n                e.stopPropagation();\n                const targetBtn = proxy.__askAiTargetBtn;\n                if (targetBtn) targetBtn.click();\n            };\n            proxy.addEventListener(\"click\", forward, true);\n            proxy.addEventListener(\"keydown\", e => {\n                if (e.key === \"Enter\" || e.key === \" \" || e.key === \"Spacebar\") forward(e);\n            }, true);\n            if (obs) obs.disconnect();\n            document.body.appendChild(proxy);\n            if (obs) obs.observe(document.documentElement, { childList: true, subtree: true });\n            return true;\n        }\n\n        function scheduleEnsure() {\n            if (scheduled) return;\n            scheduled = true;\n            requestAnimationFrame(() => { scheduled = false; ensureProxy(); });\n        }\n\n        function boot() {\n            let tries = 0;\n            const interval = setInterval(() => {\n                ensureProxy();\n                tries += 1;\n                if (tries >= 80) clearInterval(interval);\n            }, 100);\n            obs = new MutationObserver(() => scheduleEnsure());\n            obs.observe(document.documentElement, { childList: true, subtree: true });\n            window.addEventListener(\"popstate\", scheduleEnsure);\n            window.addEventListener(\"hashchange\", scheduleEnsure);\n            window.addEventListener(\"resize\", scheduleEnsure, { passive: true });\n            ensureProxy();\n        }\n\n        if (document.readyState === \"loading\") {\n            document.addEventListener(\"DOMContentLoaded\", boot);\n        } else {\n            boot();\n        }\n    })();\n\u003c/script>\n\n\u003cbody>\n    \u003cdiv id=\"app-root\">\n        \u003c!-- Mobile Drawer Overlay (hamburger menu) -->\n        \u003cdiv id=\"jf-mobile-drawer-overlay\">\n            \u003cdiv id=\"jf-mobile-drawer-backdrop\">\u003c/div>\n            \u003cdiv id=\"jf-mobile-drawer\">\n                \u003cbutton id=\"jf-mobile-drawer-close\" aria-label=\"Close menu\">\n                    \u003csvg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\">\n                        \u003cpath stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" d=\"M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12\" />\n                    \u003c/svg>\n                \u003c/button>\n                \u003cdiv class=\"jf-drawer-links-wrap\">\n                    \u003ca href=\"https://support.jfrog.com/s/create-ticket\" target=\"_blank\" class=\"jf-drawer-link\">Contact Support\u003c/a>\n                    \u003chr class=\"jf-drawer-divider\" />\n                    \u003ca href=\"https://jfrog.com/\" target=\"_blank\" 160px;\n    padding: 40px clamp(16px, 5vw, 310px);  /* shrinks with viewport */\n    box-sizing: border-box;\n    margin-bottom: -1px;\n}\n.jf-survey-inner {\n    max-width: 1300px;\n    margin: 0 auto;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: row;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    gap: clamp(24px, 5vw, 547px);  /* shrinks with viewport */\n}\n.jf-survey-text {\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n    .jf-survey-text-heading {\n        font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif;\n        font-weight: 600;\n        font-size: 24px;\n        line-height: 32px;\n        color: #000000;\n        margin: 0 0 12px 0;\n    }\n    .jf-survey-text-sub {\n        font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif;\n        font-weight: 400;\n        font-size: 24px;\n        line-height: 36px;\n        color: #414857;\n        margin: 0;\n    }\n    .jf-survey-btn {\n        display: inline-flex;\n        align-items: center;\n        justify-content: center;\n        position: relative;\n        padding: 16px 64px;\n        min-width: 202px;\n        height: 58px;\n        background: #111821;\n        border: 1px solid #111821;\n        border-radius: 50px;\n        text-decoration: none;\n        font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif;\n        font-weight: 700;\n        font-size: 18px;\n        line-height: 26px;\n        color: #ffffff;\n        white-space: nowrap;\n        flex-shrink: 0;\n        box-sizing: border-box;\n        transition: border-color 0.2s;\n    }\n    .jf-survey-btn:hover {\n        border-color: #3DD068;\n    }\n    .jf-survey-btn-label {\n        color: #ffffff;\n        transition: transform 0.2s, color 0.2s;\n    }\n    .jf-survey-btn:hover .jf-survey-btn-label {\n        transform: translateX(-8px);\n        color: #3DD068;\n    }\n    .jf-survey-btn-chevron {\n        position: absolute;\n        right: 36px;\n        top: 50%;\n        transform: translateY(-50%);\n        opacity: 0;\n        width: 14px;\n        height: 14px;\n        transition: opacity 0.2s;\n    }\n    .jf-survey-btn:hover .jf-survey-btn-chevron {\n        opacity: 1;\n    }\n    .jf-survey-btn-chevron polyline {\n        stroke: #3DD068;\n        stroke-width: 2.5;\n        stroke-linecap: round;\n        stroke-linejoin: round;\n        fill: none;\n    }\n@media (max-width: 768px) {\n    .jf-survey-banner {\n        display: none;\n    }\n}\n\u003c/style>\n\n\u003c!-- SURVEY BANNER -->\n\u003cdiv class=\"jf-survey-banner\">\n    \u003cdiv class=\"jf-survey-inner\">\n        \u003cdiv class=\"jf-survey-text\">\n            \u003cp class=\"jf-survey-text-heading\">How satisfied are you with JFrog Docs?\u003c/p>\n            \u003cp class=\"jf-survey-text-sub\">Take 1 minute to help us improve\u003c/p>\n        \u003c/div>\n        \u003ca class=\"jf-survey-btn\" href=\"#\" onclick=\"if(window.Appcues) Appcues.track('Survey click', { location: 'home' }); return false;\">\n            \u003cspan class=\"jf-survey-btn-label\">Share Feedback\u003c/span>\n            \u003csvg class=\"jf-survey-btn-chevron\" viewBox=\"0 0 14 14\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n                \u003cpolyline points=\"4,2 10,7 4,12\"/>\n            \u003c/svg>\n        \u003c/a>\n    \u003c/div>\n\u003c/div>\n\n    \u003cscript>\n        document.addEventListener(\"DOMContentLoaded\", () => {\n            console.log(\"JFrog Theme Loaded\");\n\n            const hamburgerBtn = document.getElementById(\"jf-mobile-hamburger-btn\");\n            const overlay = document.getElementById(\"jf-mobile-drawer-overlay\");\n            const backdrop = document.getElementById(\"jf-mobile-drawer-backdrop\");\n            const closeBtn = document.getElementById(\"jf-mobile-drawer-close\");\n\n            function openDrawer() {\n                if (overlay) overlay.classList.add(\"jf-drawer-open\");\n                document.body.style.overflow = \"hidden\";\n            }\n            function closeDrawer() {\n                if (overlay) overlay.classList.remove(\"jf-drawer-open\");\n                document.body.style.overflow = \"\";\n            }\n\n            if (hamburgerBtn) hamburgerBtn.addEventListener(\"click\", openDrawer);\n            if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener(\"click\", closeDrawer);\n            if (backdrop) backdrop.addEventListener(\"click\", closeDrawer);\n        });\n    \u003c/script>\n\u003c/body>","redirect":""},"html_hidelinks":false,"showBreadcrumbs":false,"showPageIcons":true,"showVersion":true,"hideTableOfContents":false,"nextStepsLabel":"","ai_dropdown":"disabled","ai_options":{"ask_ai":"disabled","chatgpt":"enabled","claude":"enabled","clipboard":"enabled","copilot":"disabled","view_as_markdown":"enabled"},"collapsibleCategories":false},"custom_domain":"docs.jfrog.com","childrenProjects":[{"_id":"69c23f852af5383f10a56c43","accessRules":{"branch_approve":{"admin":true,"editor":true},"branch_merge":{"admin":true,"editor":false}},"ai":{"chat":{"knowledge":{"custom_knowledge":null,"use_project_knowledge":false},"models":[]}},"appearance":{"theme":"solid","colors":{"main":"#111821","highlight":"","main_alt":"","header_text":"","body_highlight":"#018ef5","body_highlight_dark":"","custom_login_link_color":""},"logo":["https://files.readme.io/78c0423275c4523bdc724f648729b20369d60f9c77a33c709750efb11f4a9a8a-2d348bececcc56ac275bbb3d079752c068f22717e344a261bc3c512f4771cb0b-logo_versionDefault.png","78c0423275c4523bdc724f648729b20369d60f9c77a33c709750efb11f4a9a8a-2d348bececcc56ac275bbb3d079752c068f22717e344a261bc3c512f4771cb0b-logo_versionDefault.png",1086,647,"#44bc44",null,"69c69383de222af3b9a55df2"],"ai_dropdown":"enabled","allowApiExplorerJsonEditor":false,"changelog":{"layoutExpanded":false,"showAuthor":true,"showExactDate":false},"referenceSimpleMode":true,"referenceLayout":"row","methodBadgeStyle":"modern","showMethodInSidebar":true,"link_logo_to_url":false,"colorScheme":"system","overlay":"triangles","landing":true,"sticky":false,"hide_logo":false,"childrenAsPills":false,"subheaderStyle":"links","splitReferenceDocs":true,"showMetricsInReference":true,"rdmd":{"callouts":{"useIconFont":false},"theme":{"background":"","border":"","markdownEdge":"","markdownFont":"","markdownFontSize":"","markdownLineHeight":"","markdownRadius":"","markdownText":"","markdownTitle":"","markdownTitleFont":"","mdCodeBackground":"","mdCodeFont":"","mdC
