|| document.body).appendChild(menu);\n\n    syncMenuVisibility();\n    return menu;\n  }\n\n  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // Sync + positioning\n  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n  function syncTrigger() {\n    var btn = document.getElementById(TRIGGER_ID);\n    if (!btn) return;\n\n    var p = getCurrentProject();\n    var label = getTriggerLabel(p);\n    var iconUrl = p ? p.iconUrl : DEFAULT_TRIGGER_ICON_URL;\n\n    var iconEl = btn.querySelector('.rmps-trigger-icon img');\n    var labelEl = btn.querySelector('.rmps-label');\n\n    // Only mutate our own trigger elements\n    if (iconEl && iconEl.getAttribute('src') !== iconUrl) iconEl.setAttribute('src', iconUrl);\n    if (labelEl && labelEl.textContent !== label) labelEl.textContent = label;\n  }\n\n  function syncMenuVisibility() {\n    var menu = document.getElementById(MENU_ID);\n    if (!menu) return;\n\n    var p = getCurrentProject();\n    var activeId = p ? p.id : null;\n\n    var items = menu.querySelectorAll('a.rmps-item');\n    for (var i = 0; i \u003c items.length; i++) {\n      var a = items[i];\n      var id = a.getAttribute('data-id');\n      if (activeId && id === activeId) a.classList.add(HIDDEN_CLASS);\n      else a.classList.remove(HIDDEN_CLASS);\n    }\n  }\n\n  function positionTriggerMobile(header, wrap) {\n    var trigger = document.getElementById(TRIGGER_ID);\n    if (!header || !wrap || !trigger) return;\n\n    var headerRect = header.getBoundingClientRect();\n    var th = trigger.getBoundingClientRect().height || 56;\n\n    // Safe mobile placement: full-width-ish bar inside header, left aligned\n    var left = 8;\n    var top = 8;\n\n    // If header is taller, center-ish vertically while keeping a minimum top padding\n    if (headerRect.height > th + 12) {\n      top = Math.max(6, Math.round((headerRect.height - th) / 2));\n    }\n\n    wrap.classList.add('rmps-visible');\n    wrap.style.left = left + 'px';\n    wrap.style.top = top + 'px';\n\n    if (state.open) positionMenu();\n  }\n\n  function positionTriggerToLogo() {\n    var wrap = ensureWrap();\n    ensureMenu();\n\n    syncTrigger();\n    syncMenuVisibility();\n\n    // Keep this branch for compatibility, but HIDE_BELOW_PX=0 means never hides in practice.\n    if (window.innerWidth \u003c HIDE_BELOW_PX) {\n      wrap.classList.remove('rmps-visible');\n      closeMenu();\n      return;\n    }\n\n    var header = getHeader();\n    if (!header) {\n      wrap.classList.remove('rmps-visible');\n      closeMenu();\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // MOBILE MODE: do NOT depend on logo visibility\n    if (isMobileLayout()) {\n      positionTriggerMobile(header, wrap);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    var logo = getLogo();\n\n    if (!logo || !isElementVisible(logo)) {\n      wrap.classList.remove('rmps-visible');\n ───────────────────────────────────────────────\n(function () {\n  const WIDGET_ID = 'jfrog-survey-widget';\n\n  const css = `\n    #${WIDGET_ID} {\n      all: revert;\n      display: block;\n      margin-top: 24px;\n    }\n    #${WIDGET_ID} * {\n      all: revert;\n      box-sizing: border-box;\n    }\n    #${WIDGET_ID} .survey-widget {\n      display: flex !important;\n      flex-direction: column !important;\n      align-items: flex-start !important;\n      padding: 20px !important;\n      width: 100% !important;\n      height: auto !important;\n      background: #D8E6ED !important;\n   transition: transform 0.2s !important;\n    }\n    #${WIDGET_ID} .vote-btn:hover .vote-label {\n      transform: translateX(-4px) !important;\n      color: #3DD068 !important;\n    }\n    #${WIDGET_ID} .vote-btn:hover {\n      border-color: #3DD068 !important;\n    }\n    #${WIDGET_ID} .vote-btn:hover .vote-label {\n      color: #3DD068 !important;\n    }\n    #${WIDGET_ID} !important;\n    }\n    #${WIDGET_ID} .vote-chevron {\n      position: absolute !important;\n      right: 16px !important;\n      top: 52% !important;\n      transform: translateY(-50%) !important;\n .vote-btn:hover .vote-chevron {\n      opacity: 1 !important;\n    }\n    #${WIDGET_ID} .vote-chevron polyline {\n      stroke: #3DD068 !important;\n      stroke-width: 2.5 !important;\n      stroke-linecap: round !important;\n      stroke-linejoin: round !important;\n      fill: none !important;\n    }\n  `;\n\n  const widgetHTML = `\n    \u003cdiv id=\"${WIDGET_ID}\">\n      \u003cstyle>${css}\u003c/style>\n      \u003cdiv class=\"survey-widget\">\n        \u003cdiv class=\"survey-inner\">\n          \u003cdiv class=\"survey-text\">\n            \u003cp class=\"survey-title\">How satisfied are you with JFrog's Help Center?\u003c/p>\n            \u003cp class=\"survey-subtitle\">Take 1 minute to help us improve\u003c/p>\n          \u003c/div>\n stroke=\"#3DD068\" stroke-width=\"2.5\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"/>\n            \u003c/svg>\n          \u003c/a>\n        \u003c/div>\n      \u003c/div>\n    \u003c/div>\n  `;\n\n  function inject() {\n    const nav = document.querySelector('section.content-toc nav');\n    if (!nav) return;\n\n    const existing = document.getElementById(WIDGET_ID);\n    if (existing) existing.remove();\n\n    observer.disconnect();\n    nav.insertAdjacentHTML('afterend', widgetHTML);\n    const w = document.getElementById(WIDGET_ID);\n    if (w) w.style.cssText += 'opacity: 1;';\n    observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });\n  }\n\n  let timer;\n  const observer = new MutationObserver(() => { clearTimeout(timer); timer = setTimeout(inject, 50); });\n     text-align: center !important;\n        text-decoration: none !important;\n        cursor: pointer !important;\n        white-space: nowrap !important;\n        box-sizing: border-box 'home' : 'mobile menu';\n\n  linksWrap.insertAdjacentHTML('afterend', `\n    \u003cdiv id=\"jf-imh-survey\">\n      \u003cdiv>\n        \u003cp class=\"jf-sv-title\">How satisfied are you with JFrog's aria-label=\"Mobile menu\">\n    \u003cbutton id=\"jf-imh-close\" aria-label=\"Close menu\">\n      \u003csvg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\">\n        \u003cpath stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" d=\"M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12\">\u003c/path>\n      \u003c/svg>\n    \u003c/button>\n\n    \u003cdiv class=\"jf-imh-links-wrap\">\n      \u003ca href=\"https://support.jfrog.com/s/create-ticket\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" class=\"jf-imh-drawer-link\">\n        Contact Support\n      \u003c/a>\n\n      \u003chr class=\"jf-imh-divider\" />\n\n      \u003ca href=\"https://jfrog.com/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" class=\"jf-imh-drawer-link\">\n        JFrog.com\n      \u003c/a>\n    \u003c/div>\n  \u003c/div>\n\u003c/div>\n\n\u003cscript>\n(function () {\n  const TAG = \"__jfInteriorMobileHeader_identicalMenu_withSearchProxy_v1\";\n  if (window[TAG]) return;\n  window[TAG] = true;\n\n  function getReadMeSearchToggle() {\n    return (\n      document.querySelector(\".rm-Header .rm-SearchToggle\") ||\n      document.querySelector(\".rm-SearchToggle\")\n    );\n  }\n\n  function openReadMeSearch() {\n    const nativeSearchBtn = getReadMeSearchToggle();\n\n    if (nativeSearchBtn) {\n      nativeSearchBtn.click();\n      return true;\n    }\n\n    // Fallback if ReadMe binds shortcut listeners instead of button behavior\n    const isMac = /Mac|iPhone|iPad|iPod/.test(navigator.platform);\n    const evt = new KeyboardEvent(\"keydown\", {\n      key: \"k\",\n      code: \"KeyK\",\n      metaKey: isMac,\n      ctrlKey: !isMac,\n      bubbles: true,\n      cancelable: true\n    });\n    document.dispatchEvent(evt);\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  function initSearchProxy() {\n    const searchBtn = document.getElementById(\"jf-imh-search-btn\");\n    if (!searchBtn || searchBtn.__jfBound) return;\n\n    searchBtn.addEventListener(\"click\", function (e) {\n      e.preventDefault();\n      openReadMeSearch();\n    });\n\n    searchBtn.__jfBound = true;\n  }\n\n  function initDrawer() {\n    const menuBtn = document.getElementById(\"jf-imh-menu-btn\");\n    const closeBtn = document.getElementById(\"jf-imh-close\");\n    const overlay = document.getElementById(\"jf-imh-overlay\");\n    const backdrop = document.getElementById(\"jf-imh-backdrop\");\n\n    if (!menuBtn || !overlay) return;\n\n    function openDrawer() {\n      overlay.classList.add(\"jf-open\");\n      overlay.setAttribute(\"aria-hidden\", \"false\");\n      menuBtn.setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\", \"true\");\n      document.documentElement.classList.add(\"jf-imh-lock-scroll\");\n    }\n\n    function closeDrawer() {\n      overlay.classList.remove(\"jf-open\");\n      overlay.setAttribute(\"aria-hidden\", \"true\");\n      menuBtn.setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\", \"false\");\n      document.documentElement.classList.remove(\"jf-imh-lock-scroll\");\n    }\n\n    if (!menuBtn.__jfBound) {\n      menuBtn.addEventListener(\"click\", openDrawer);\n      menuBtn.__jfBound = true;\n    }\n\n    if (closeBtn && !closeBtn.__jfBound) {\n      closeBtn.addEventListener(\"click\", closeDrawer);\n      closeBtn.__jfBound = true;\n    }\n\n    if (backdrop && !backdrop.__jfBound) {\n      backdrop.addEventListener(\"click\", closeDrawer);\n      backdrop.__jfBound = true;\n    }\n\n    if (!document.__jfEscBound) {\n      document.addEventListener(\"keydown\", function (e) {\n        if (e.key === \"Escape\") closeDrawer();\n      });\n      document.__jfEscBound = true;\n    }\n\n    if (!overlay.__jfLinkCloseBound) {\n      overlay.addEventListener(\"click\", function (e) {\n        const link = e.target.closest(\".jf-imh-drawer-link\");\n        if (link) closeDrawer();\n      });\n      overlay.__jfLinkCloseBound = true;\n    }\n\n    window.__jfInteriorMobileHeader = { openDrawer, closeDrawer, openReadMeSearch };\n  }\n\n  function boot() {\n    initDrawer();\n    initSearchProxy();\n  }\n\n  if (document.readyState === \"loading\") {\n    document.addEventListener(\"DOMContentLoaded\", boot);\n  } else {\n    boot();\n  }\n\n  /* Re-init for ReadMe SPA route changes */\n  let lastUrl = location.pathname + location.search + location.hash;\n  setInterval(function () {\n    const now = location.pathname + location.search + location.hash;\n    if (now !== lastUrl) {\n      lastUrl = now;\n      initDrawer();\n      initSearchProxy();\n    }\n  }, 250);\n})();\n\u003c/script>\n\n\u003cstyle>\n/* Mobile only */\n@media (max-width: 1120px) {\n  .rm-Header,\n  .rm-Header-top,\n  .rm-Header-bottom,\n  header.Header3zzata9F_ZPQ.rm-Header_classic,\n  .Header3zzata9F_ZPQ {\n    min-height: 0 !important;\n    padding: 0 !important;\n    margin: 0 !important;\n    border: 0 !important;\n    background: transparent !important;\n    box-shadow: none !important;\n  }\n\n  /* Keep native ReadMe search button functional but visually hidden (so custom button can trigger it) */\n  .rm-Header .rm-Header-search {\n    position: absolute !important;\n    width: 1px !important;\n    height: 1px !important;\n    overflow: hidden !important;\n    clip: rect(0 0 0 0) !important;\n    clip-path: inset(50%) !important;\n    white-space: nowrap !important;\n    opacity: 0 !important;\n    pointer-events: none !important;\n  }\n\n  /* Top bar */\n  #jf-imh-header {\n    position: sticky;\n    top: 0;\n    z-index: 10030;\n    width: 100%;\n    display: block;\n  }\n\n  .jf-imh-bar {\n    height: 76px;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    gap: 12px;\n    padding: 0 12px;\n    box-sizing: border-box;\n    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);\n    background: #111821;\n  }\n\n  .jf-imh-logo {\n    display: inline-flex;\n contain;\n  }\n\n  .jf-imh-actions {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 20px;\n    margin-left: auto;\n    flex: 0 0 auto;\n  }\n\n  /* Search button (icon only) */\n  .jf-imh-search-btn {\n    display: inline-flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    background: transparent;\n    border: 0;\n    padding: 0;\n    margin: 0;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    color: #ffffff;\n    -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;\n  }\n\n  .jf-imh-search-circle {\n    width: auto !important;\n    height: auto !important;\n    min-width: 0 !important;\n    min-height: 0 !important;\n    border-radius: 0 !important;\n    display: inline-flex !important;\n    align-items: center !important;\n    justify-content: center !important;\n    background: transparent !important;\n    border: 0 !important;\n  }\n\n  .jf-imh-search-btn svg {\n    width: 28px;\n    height: 28px;\n    display: block;\n    color: #ffffff;\n  }\n\n  .jf-imh-search-btn svg path {\n    fill: #ffffff;\n  }\n\n  .jf-imh-try-btn {\n    display: inline-flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    height: 44px;\n    padding: 0 22px;\n    border-radius: 999px;\n    background: #36a13b;\n    border: 1px solid #36a13b;\n    color: #fff !important;\n    text-decoration: none !important;\n    font-family: \"Open Sans\", Inter, sans-serif;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    font-size: 14px;\n    line-height: 1;\n    white-space: nowrap;\n  }\n\n  .jf-imh-try-btn:hover,\n  .jf-imh-try-btn:focus-visible {\n    background: #40be46;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    padding: 20px 24px;\n    box-sizing: border-box;\n    background: #111821;\n    transform: translateX(100%);\n    transition: transform 0.2s ease;\n  }\n\n (max-width: 1120px) {\n    #jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      gap: 18px;\n      width: 100%;\n      box-sizing: border-box;\n      padding: 10px 16px 8px;\n      margin: 0;\n      background: #111418; /* dark bar */\n      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);\n      position: relative;\n      z-index: 5;\n    }\n\n    /* If inserted into rm-ReferenceMain or rm-Guides main, keep it full width */\n    main#content > #jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs,\n    main#Explorer > #jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs {\n      margin-left: 0;\n      margin-right: 0;\n    }\n\n    #jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs .jf-mobile-top-tab {\n      appearance: none;\n      -webkit-appearance: none;\n      display: inline-flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      justify-content: center;\n      padding: 6px 0 10px;\n      margin: 0;\n      border: 0;\n      background: transparent !important;\n      box-shadow: none !important;\n      border-radius: 0 !important;\n      color: rgba(255,255,255,.88) !important;\n      text-decoration: none !important;\n      font-size: 14px;\n      line-height: 1.2;\n      font-weight: 600;\n      white-space: nowrap;\n      position: relative;\n    }\n\n    #jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs .jf-mobile-top-tab:hover,\n    #jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs .jf-mobile-top-tab:focus,\n    #jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs .jf-mobile-top-tab:active {\n      color: #fff !important;\n      text-decoration: none !important;\n      background: transparent !important;\n      box-shadow: none !important;\n      outline: none;\n    }\n\n    #jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs .jf-mobile-top-tab.is-active {\n      color: #40be46 !important;\n    }\n\n    /* green underline / active indicator */\n    #jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs .jf-mobile-top-tab.is-active::after {\n      content: \"\";\n      position: absolute;\n      left: 0;\n      right: 0;\n      bottom: 0;\n      height: 3px;\n      border-radius: 999px;\n      background: #22c55e;\n    }\n  }\n\u003c/style>\n\n\u003cscript>\n(function () {\n  var KEY = \"__jf_mobile_guides_api_tabs_v7\";\n  if (window[KEY]) return;\n  window[KEY] = true;\n\n  function isMobile() {\n    return window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia(\"(max-width: 1120px)\").matches;\n  }\n\n  function normalizePath(path) {\n    path = String(path || \"/\").split(\"#\")[0].split(\"?\")[0];\n    path = path.replace(/\\/+$/, \"\");\n    return path || \"/\";\n  }\n\n  function getMain() {\n    /* Guides OR API Reference */\n    return (\n      document.querySelector(\"main#content\") ||\n      document.querySelector(\"main#Explorer\")\n    );\n  }\n\n  function getProjectBase() {\n    var path = normalizePath(window.location.pathname);\n    var parts = path.split(\"/\").filter(Boolean);\n\n    /* Expected:\n       /artifactory/docs/...\n       /artifactory/reference/...\n       -> base = /artifactory\n    */\n    if (!parts.length) return \"\";\n\n    // Optional guard: if first segment is docs/reference at root, don't use it as project\n    if (parts[0] === \"docs\" || parts[0] === \"reference\") return \"\";\n\n    return \"/\" + parts[0];\n  }\n\n  function buildTabs() {\n    var wrap = document.createElement(\"div\");\n    wrap.id = \"jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs\";\n    wrap.setAttribute(\"role\", \"navigation\");\n    wrap.setAttribute(\"aria-label\", \"Section navigation\");\n\n    var guides = document.createElement(\"a\");\n    guides.className = \"jf-mobile-top-tab\";\n    guides.setAttribute(\"data-kind\", \"guides\");\n    guides.textContent = \"Guides\";\n\n    var api = document.createElement(\"a\");\n    api.className = \"jf-mobile-top-tab\";\n    api.setAttribute(\"data-kind\", \"api\");\n    api.textContent = \"API Reference\";\n\n    wrap.appendChild(guides);\n    wrap.appendChild(api);\n    return wrap;\n  }\n\n  function getOrCreateTabs() {\n    var tabs = document.getElementById(\"jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs\");\n    if (!tabs) tabs = buildTabs();\n    return tabs;\n  }\n\n  function updateTabLinks() {\n    var tabs = document.getElementById(\"jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs\");\n    if (!tabs) return;\n\n    var base = getProjectBase(); // \"/artifactory\"\n    var guidesHref = (base || \"\") + \"/docs\";\n    var apiHref = (base || \"\") + \"/reference\";\n\n    var guides = tabs.querySelector('[data-kind=\"guides\"]');\n    var api = tabs.querySelector('[data-kind=\"api\"]');\n\n    if (guides) guides.setAttribute(\"href\", guidesHref);\n    if (api) api.setAttribute(\"href\", apiHref);\n  }\n\n  function setActive() {\n    var tabs = document.getElementById(\"jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs\");\n    if (!tabs) return;\n\n    var current = normalizePath(window.location.pathname);\n    var links = tabs.querySelectorAll(\".jf-mobile-top-tab\");\n    for (var i = 0; i \u003c links.length; i++) {\n      links[i].classList.remove(\"is-active\");\n      links[i].removeAttribute(\"aria-current\");\n    }\n\n    var active;\n    if (/\\/reference(\\/|$)/.test(current)) {\n      active = tabs.querySelector('[data-kind=\"api\"]');\n    } else {\n      active = tabs.querySelector('[data-kind=\"guides\"]');\n    }\n\n    if (active) {\n      active.classList.add(\"is-active\");\n      active.setAttribute(\"aria-current\", \"page\");\n    }\n  }\n\n  function ensureInserted() {\n    var existing = document.getElementById(\"jf-mobile-guides-api-tabs\");\n\n    if (!isMobile()) {\n      if (existing && existing.parentNode) existing.parentNode.removeChild(existing);\n      return false;\n    }\n\n    var main = getMain();\n    if (!main) return false;\n\n    var tabs = existing || getOrCreateTabs();\n\n    // Insert as first child of main (works for both Guides and Reference mains)\n    if (main.firstElementChild !== tabs) {\n      main.insertBefore(tabs, main.firstChild);\n    }\n\n    updateTabLinks();\n    setActive();\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  function kickInsertLoop() {\n    var count = 0;\n    var max = 80;\n    var t = setInterval(function () {\n      count++;\n      ensureInserted();\n      if (count >= max) clearInterval(t);\n    }, 250);\n  }\n\n  function onRouteChangeLike() {\n    setTimeout(ensureInserted, 50);\n    setTimeout(ensureInserted, 250);\n    setTimeout(ensureInserted, 700);\n    setTimeout(ensureInserted, 1400);\n    setTimeout(ensureInserted, 2200);\n    kickInsertLoop();\n  }\n\n  var observer = new MutationObserver(function () {\n    ensureInserted();\n  });\n\n  function startObserver() {\n    observer.observe(document.documentElement, {\n      childList: true,\n      subtree: true\n    });\n  }\n\n  (function patchHistory() {\n    var push = history.pushState;\n    var replace = history.replaceState;\n\n    history.pushState = function () {\n      var ret = push.apply(this, arguments);\n      onRouteChangeLike();\n      return ret;\n    };\n\n    history.replaceState = function () {\n      var ret = replace.apply(this, arguments);\n      onRouteChangeLike();\n      return ret;\n    };\n\n    window.addEventListener(\"popstate\", onRouteChangeLike);\n    window.addEventListener(\"hashchange\", onRouteChangeLike);\n    window.addEventListener(\"resize\", ensureInserted);\n    window.addEventListener(\"orientationchange\", ensureInserted);\n  })();\n\n  startObserver();\n  onRouteChangeLike();\n})();\n\u003c/script>","home_footer":"\u003c!-- ==========================\n =========================================================\n     Ask AI chat: layout + disclaimer (UNDER search/input)\n     - Uses both exact classnames (current) + prefix selectors (future-proof)\n     ========================================================= */\n\n  /* Make the whole chat area a column (safe default) */\n  .rm-AskAi-chat .ChatInterface1-QcH4OG4Jqd,\n  .rm-AskAi-chat .ChatInterface-container1efYRxivTO2b,\n  .rm-AskAi-chat [class^=\"ChatInterface1-\"],\n  .rm-AskAi-chat [class^=\"ChatInterface-container\"] {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    height: 100%;\n    min-height: 0;\n  }\n\n  /* Disclaimer (now styled + naturally placed under the input) */\n  .rm-ai-disclaimer {\n    font-weight: 400;\n    font-size: 14px;\n    line-height: 20px;\n    padding: 10px;\n    margin: 5px;\n\n\n\n    box-sizing: border-box;\n  }\n\n  /* Dark mode safety (covers common patterns) */\n  html.dark .rm-ai-disclaimer,\n  html[data-color-mode=\"dark\"] .rm-ai-disclaimer,\n  body.dark .rm-ai-disclaimer {\n    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);\n    border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18);\n  }\n\n  /* Messages area scroll */\n  .rm-AskAi-chat .ChatInterface-emptyChat30Oe0OpCASL2,\n  .rm-AskAi-chat .ChatInterface-chat30Oe0OpCASL2,\n  .rm-AskAi-chat [class^=\"ChatInterface-emptyChat\"],\n  .rm-AskAi-chat [class^=\"ChatInterface-chat\"] {\n    flex: 1 1 auto;\n    min-height: 0;\n    overflow: auto;\n    background: #fff;\n  }\n\n  @media (max-width: 680px) {\n    /* ✅ IMPORTANT: stop absolute positioning so it can sit under the input */\n    .rm-ai-disclaimer {\n      position: static !important;\n      bottom: auto !important;\n      margin: 10px 12px 0;\n    }\n\n    /* Undo prior mobile hacks that fight \"under the search/input\" */\n    div[class^=\"ChatInterface-inputArea\"] {\n      margin-top: 0 !important;\n    }\n\n    div[class^=\"EmptyChatOptions-inputWrapper\"] {\n      position: static !important;\n      bottom: auto !important;\n    }\n\n    /* Existing specific selector + a prefix-based fallback */\n    .ContentWithOwlbot_with-sidebar2GrCj6YAOyV6 .ContentWithOwlbot-sidebar1cgUrK3uYZLh,\n    [class^=\"ContentWithOwlbot_with-sidebar\"] [class^=\"ContentWithOwlbot-sidebar\"] {\n      border: 0;\n      border-radius: 0;\n      -webkit-box-shadow: none;\n      box-shadow: none;\n      -webkit-box-flex: 0;\n      -ms-flex: 0 0 100%;\n      flex: 0 0 100%;\n      position: relative;\n      right: 0;\n      top: 30px;\n      width: 100%;\n    }\n  }\n\u003c/style>\n\n\u003cscript>\n  // =========================================================\n  // Ask AI disclaimer injection (SPA-safe + placed UNDER input)\n  // - Inserts directly after the Ask AI input wrapper (empty state)\n  // - Also handles chat state (input area)\n  // - Moves existing disclaimer if it ended up elsewhere\n  // =========================================================\n  (function () {\n    \"use strict\";\n\n    // Idempotent guard\n    if (window.__rmAskAiDisclaimerV3) return;\n    window.__rmAskAiDisclaimerV3 = true;\n\n    var DISCLAIMER_ID = \"rm-ai-disclaimer\";\n\n    var disclaimerText =\n      \"AI can get things wrong, so double check any info or code. You're responsible for verifying results are accurate and fit your needs before taking action. Do not input sensitive information.\";\n\n    function getAskAiRoot() {\n      return document.querySelector(\".rm-AskAi-chat\");\n    }\n\n    function findInsertionAnchor(root) {\n      if (!root) return null;\n\n      // ✅ Empty state input wrapper (your screenshot shows this)\n      var emptyInput =\n        root.querySelector(\".EmptyChatOptions-inputWrapper1QdyF__AmKN8\") ||\n        root.querySelector('[class^=\"EmptyChatOptions-inputWrapper\"]');\n\n      if (emptyInput) return emptyInput;\n\n      // ✅ Chat state input area\n      var chatInput =\n        root.querySelector('[class^=\"ChatInterface-inputArea\"]') ||\n        root.querySelector('[class*=\"ChatInterface-inputArea\"]');\n\n      if (chatInput) return chatInput;\n\n      return null;\n    }\n\n    function ensureDisclaimer() {\n      var root = getAskAiRoot();\n      if (!root) return;\n\n      var anchor = findInsertionAnchor(root);\n      if (!anchor || !anchor.parentNode) return;\n\n      var el = document.getElementById(DISCLAIMER_ID);\n\n      if (!el) {\n        el = document.createElement(\"div\");\n        el.id = DISCLAIMER_ID;\n        el.className = \"rm-ai-disclaimer\";\n        el.textContent = disclaimerText;\n      }\n\n      // Already immediately after the anchor => done\n      if (anchor.nextSibling === el) return;\n\n      // Insert directly under the input/search block\n      anchor.parentNode.insertBefore(el, anchor.nextSibling);\n    }\n\n    // Throttle observer callbacks (avoid hammering during SPA hydration)\n    var scheduled = false;\n    function scheduleEnsure() {\n      if (scheduled) return;\n      scheduled = true;\n      requestAnimationFrame(function () {\n        scheduled = false;\n        ensureDisclaimer();\n      });\n    }\n\n    // Initial attempt\n    if (document.readyState === \"loading\") {\n      document.addEventListener(\"DOMContentLoaded\", scheduleEnsure);\n    } else {\n      scheduleEnsure();\n    }\n\n    // Observe ONLY body (not documentElement) to detect Ask AI mount/unmount\n    var bodyObserver = new MutationObserver(function () {\n      scheduleEnsure();\n    });\n\n    // If body isn't ready yet, wait a tick\n    function startObserver() {\n      if (!document.body) return setTimeout(startObserver, 50);\n      bodyObserver.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });\n    }\n    startObserver();\n  })();\n\u003c/script>\n\n\u003cstyle>\n  /* PNG icon swap (default -> hover) */\n  #rm-scroll-top-btn .rm-stt-icon {\n    position: relative;\n    width: 21px;\n    height: 24px;\n    display: block;\n  }\n  #rm-scroll-top-btn .rm-stt-icon img {\n    position: absolute;\n    inset: 0;\n    width: 21px;\n    height: 24px;\n    display: block;\n    user-select: none;\n    pointer-events: none;\n  }\n  #rm-scroll-top-btn .rm-stt-icon .rm-stt-hover {\n    opacity: 0;\n    transition: opacity 120ms ease;\n  }\n  #rm-scroll-top-btn:hover .rm-stt-icon .rm-stt-hover { opacity: 1; }\n  #rm-scroll-top-btn:hover .rm-stt-icon .rm-stt-default { opacity: 0; }\n\u003c/style>\n\n\u003cscript>\n/**\n * Scroll-to-top button (ReadMe Refactored / transform-scroll safe)\n * ---------------------------------------------------------------\n * ✅ Hidden on load\n * ✅ Shows after FIRST scroll intent (wheel/touch/keys)\n * ✅ Hides again when user returns to TOP (using moving content marker baseline)\n * ✅ Click scrolls to TOP OF ENTIRE PAGE (tries parent/top too) + hides + resets\n * ✅ SPA-safe (re-injects if React removes)\n * ✅ Mobile-safe: detects inner scroll container + guards against scroll-persist fighting back\n */\n(function () {\n  \"use strict\";\n\n  if (window.__rmScrollTopWorkingV3) return;\n  window.__rmScrollTopWorkingV3 = true;\n\n  var BTN_ID = \"rm-scroll-top-btn\";\n  var STYLE_ID = \"rm-scroll-top-btn-style\";\n\n  // ===== CONFIG =====\n  var RIGHT_PX = 34;\n  var BOTTOM_PX = 110; // adjust to sit above Ask AI\n  var SIZE_PX = 64;\n  var Z_INDEX = 999999;\n\n  // How close to \"baseline top\" counts as being back at top\n  var TOP_TOLERANCE_PX = 6;\n\n  // How long after an input we keep checking (covers inertial scroll)\n  var CHECK_WINDOW_MS = 1400;\n  // ==================\n\n  // Remove prior injected button/style (prevents duplicates across edits)\n  try {\n    var oldBtn = document.getElementById(BTN_ID);\n    if (oldBtn && oldBtn.parentNode) oldBtn.parentNode.removeChild(oldBtn);\n    var oldStyle = document.getElementById(STYLE_ID);\n    if (oldStyle && oldStyle.parentNode) oldStyle.parentNode.removeChild(oldStyle);\n  } catch (e) {}\n\n  function ensureStyles() {\n    if (document.getElementById(STYLE_ID)) return;\n\n    var css = \"\"\n      + \"#\" + BTN_ID + \"{\"\n      + \"  position: fixed;\"\n      + \"  right: \" + RIGHT_PX + \"px;\"\n      + \"  bottom: \" + BOTTOM_PX + \"px;\"\n      + \"  width: \" + SIZE_PX + \"px;\"\n      + \"  height: \" + SIZE_PX + \"px;\"\n      + \"  border-radius: 9999px;\"\n      + \"  border: 1px solid #EAEEF5;\"\n      + \"  cursor: pointer;\"\n      + \"  display: inline-flex;\"\n      + \"  align-items: center;\"\n      + \"  justify-content: center;\"\n      + \"  z-index: \" + Z_INDEX + \";\"\n      + \"  background: #F2F5F5;\"\n      + \"  box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);\"\n      + \"  opacity: 0;\"\n      + \"  transform: translateY(10px) scale(0.98);\"\n      + \"  pointer-events: none;\"\n      + \"  transition: opacity 180ms ease, transform 180ms ease, background-color 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease;\"\n      + \"}\"\n      + \"#\" + BTN_ID + \".rm-visible{\"\n      + \"  opacity: 1;\"\n      + \"  transform: translateY(0) scale(1);\"\n      + \"  pointer-events: auto;\"\n      + \"}\"\n      + \"#\" + BTN_ID + \":hover{\"\n      + \"  background: #E1F7E1;\"\n      + \"  border-color: #7CCF83;\"\n      + \"  box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);\"\n      + \"}\"\n      + \"#\" + BTN_ID + \":active{\"\n      + \"  transform: translateY(0) scale(0.98);\"\n      + \"}\"\n      + \"#\" + BTN_ID + \" .rm-stt-icon{\"\n      + \"  position: relative;\"\n      + \"  width: 21px;\"\n      + \"  height: 24px;\"\n      + \"  display: block;\"\n      + \"}\"\n      + \"#\" + BTN_ID + \" .rm-stt-icon img{\"\n      + \"  position: absolute;\"\n      + \"  inset: 0;\"\n      + \"  width: 21px;\"\n      + \"  height: 24px;\"\n      + \"  display: block;\"\n      + \"  user-select: none;\"\n      + \"  pointer-events: none;\"\n      + \"}\"\n      + \"#\" + BTN_ID + \" .rm-stt-icon .rm-stt-hover{\"\n      + \"  opacity: 0;\"\n      + \"  transition: opacity 120ms ease;\"\n      + \"}\"\n      + \"#\" + BTN_ID + \":hover .rm-stt-icon .rm-stt-hover{ opacity: 1; }\"\n      + \"#\" + BTN_ID + \":hover .rm-stt-icon .rm-stt-default{ opacity: 0; }\"\n      + \"@media (max-width: 680px){\"\n      + \"  #\" + BTN_ID + \"{ width: 58px; height: 58px; right: 16px; bottom: \" + (BOTTOM_PX - 10) + \"px; }\"\n      + \"}\";\n\n    var style = document.createElement(\"style\");\n    style.id = STYLE_ID;\n    style.appendChild(document.createTextNode(css));\n    (document.head || document.documentElement).appendChild(style);\n  }\n\n  function ensureButton() {\n    var btn = document.getElementById(BTN_ID);\n    if (btn) return btn;\n\n    btn = document.createElement(\"button\");\n    btn.id = BTN_ID;\n    btn.type = \"button\";\n    btn.setAttribute(\"aria-label\", \"Scroll to top\");\n\n    btn.innerHTML =\n      '\u003cspan class=\"rm-stt-icon\" aria-hidden=\"true\">'\n    +   '\u003cimg class=\"rm-stt-default\" alt=\"\" src=\"https://files.readme.io/0bbf3e525b8281fda28a473882453e61b7c7985256bd41edbe6a699445760daf-ScollTop_default.png\" />'\n    +   '\u003cimg class=\"rm-stt-hover\" alt=\"\" src=\"https://files.readme.io/2029662fcad677ec72ff5a5505d8a2c125aa11b84b08e917e377e583d5d15701-ScrollTop_hover.png\" />'\n    + '\u003c/span>';\n\n    btn.addEventListener(\"click\", function () {\n      // Signal to scroll-persist (Additional.js) not to fight us\n      window.__rmScrollToTopInProgress = true;\n\n      goToTopEveryWay();\n      hide();\n      hasScrollIntent = false;\n\n      // Clear the flag after all restore timers in Additional.js will have fired\n      setTimeout(function () {\n        window.__rmScrollToTopInProgress = false;\n      }, 2000);\n    });\n\n    document.body.appendChild(btn);\n    return btn;\n  }\n\n  function show() { ensureButton().classList.add(\"rm-visible\"); }\n  function hide() { ensureButton().classList.remove(\"rm-visible\"); }\n\n  // ===== Detect the actual scrolling container (mobile fix) =====\n  function getScrollContainer() {\n    var candidates = [\n      document.querySelector('[data-testid=\"RDMD\"]'),\n      document.querySelector(\".rm-Markdown\"),\n      document.querySelector(\".content-body\"),\n      document.querySelector(\"main\"),\n      document.body\n    ];\n    for (var i = 0; i \u003c candidates.length; i++) {\n      var el = candidates[i];\n      if (!el) continue;\n      var parent = el.parentElement;\n      while (parent && parent !== document.documentElement) {\n        var style = window.getComputedStyle(parent);\n        var overflow = style.overflow + style.overflowY;\n        if (/auto|scroll/.test(overflow) && parent.scrollHeight > parent.clientHeight) {\n          return parent;\n        }\n        parent = parent.parentElement;\n      }\n      break;\n    }\n    var se = document.scrollingElement || document.documentElement;\n    return (se && se.scrollTop > 0) ? se : window;\n  }\n\n  // ===== Reliable \"top\" detection (NO scrollTop) =====\n  var baselineTop = null;\n\n  function getMarkerEl() {\n    return (\n      document.querySelector('[data-testid=\"RDMD\"]') ||\n      document.querySelector(\".rm-Markdown[data-testid]\") ||\n      document.querySelector(\".rm-Markdown\") ||\n      document.querySelector(\".content-body\") ||\n      document.querySelector(\"#content-container\") ||\n      document.querySelector(\".rm-Article\") ||\n      document.querySelector(\"main\")\n    );\n  }\n\n  function ensureBaseline() {\n    if (baselineTop != null) return;\n    var m = getMarkerEl();\n    if (!m || !m.getBoundingClientRect) return;\n    baselineTop = m.getBoundingClientRect().top;\n  }\n\n  function isAtTop() {\n    ensureBaseline();\n    if (baselineTop == null) return false;\n\n    var m = getMarkerEl();\n    if (!m || !m.getBoundingClientRect) return false;\n\n    var curTop = m.getBoundingClientRect().top;\n    return curTop >= (baselineTop - TOP_TOLERANCE_PX);\n  }\n\n  // ===== Scroll intent → show/hide logic =====\n  var hasScrollIntent = false;\n\n  function updateVisibility() {\n    if (!hasScrollIntent) { hide(); return; }\n    if (isAtTop()) hide();\n    else show();\n  }\n\n  var rafActive = false;\n  var rafUntil = 0;\n\n  function tick() {\n    if (!rafActive) return;\n    updateVisibility();\n    if (Date.now() \u003c rafUntil) requestAnimationFrame(tick);\n    else rafActive = false;\n  }\n\n  function onScrollIntent() {\n    hasScrollIntent = true;\n    rafUntil = Date.now() + CHECK_WINDOW_MS;\n    if (!rafActive) { rafActive = true; requestAnimationFrame(tick); }\n    updateVisibility();\n  }\n\n  function isScrollKey(e) {\n    var k = e && (e.key || e.keyCode);\n    return (\n      k === \"ArrowDown\" || k === \"ArrowUp\" ||\n      k === \"PageDown\" || k === \"PageUp\" ||\n      k === \"Home\" || k === \"End\" ||\n      k === \" \" ||\n      k === 32 || k === 33 || k === 34 || k === 35 || k === 36 ||\n      k === 38 || k === 40\n    );\n  }\n\n  // ===== \"Go to top\" — try everything including inner scroll container =====\n  function goToTopEveryWay() {\n    var sc = getScrollContainer();\n\n    // Scroll the detected inner container first (mobile fix)\n    try {\n      if (sc && sc !== window && typeof sc.scrollTo === \"function\") {\n        sc.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: \"smooth\" });\n        sc.scrollTop = 0;\n      }\n    } catch (e) {}\n\n    // Desktop fallbacks (preserved from original)\n    try { window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: \"smooth\" }); } catch (e) {}\n    try { window.top.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: \"smooth\" }); } catch (e) {}\n    try { window.parent.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: \"smooth\" }); } catch (e) {}\n\n    try {\n      var se = document.scrollingElement || document.documentElement || document.body;\n      if (se && se.scrollTo) se.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: \"smooth\" });\n      if (se) se.scrollTop = 0;\n    } catch (e) {}\n\n    try {\n      var header =\n        document.querySelector(\".rm-Header\") ||\n        document.querySelector(\"[class*='rm-Header']\") ||\n        document.querySelector(\"header\");\n      if (header && header.scrollIntoView) header.scrollIntoView({ behavior: \"smooth\", block: \"start\" });\n    } catch (e) {}\n\n    try { window.scrollTo(0, 0); } catch (e) {}\n  }\n\n  function init() {\n    ensureStyles();\n    ensureButton();\n    hide();\n    ensureBaseline();\n\n    // Desktop listeners (window-level)\n    window.addEventListener(\"wheel\",      onScrollIntent, { passive: true, capture: true });\n    window.addEventListener(\"touchmove\",  onScrollIntent, { passive: true, capture: true });\n    window.addEventListener(\"touchstart\", onScrollIntent, { passive: true, capture: true });\n    window.addEventListener(\"keydown\", function (e) { if (isScrollKey(e)) onScrollIntent(); }, true);\n\n    // Mobile fix: also listen on the inner scroll container if it differs from window\n    var sc = getScrollContainer();\n    if (sc && sc !== window) {\n      sc.addEventListener(\"scroll\",    onScrollIntent, { passive: true });\n      sc.addEventListener(\"touchmove\", onScrollIntent, { passive: true });\n    }\n\n    // SPA-safe: if React swaps content and baseline changes, refresh baseline\n    var mo = new MutationObserver(function () {\n      ensureStyles();\n      ensureButton();\n      baselineTop = null;\n      ensureBaseline();\n      updateVisibility();\n    });\n    mo.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });\n  }\n\n  if (document.readyState === \"loading\") {\n    document.addEventListener(\"DOMContentLoaded\", init, { once: true });\n  } else {\n    init();\n  }\n})();\n\u003c/script>\n\n\n\u003cscript>\n  /**************************************\n   * Async Consent (Transcend Airgap)\n   * - SPA-safe \"Cookie Settings\" click handler (event delegation)\n   * - Idempotent guards\n   * - Exposes: window.jfrogConsent.addAirgapCallback(fn) + window.jfrogConsent.getConsent()\n   *\n   * Patch (prevents \"random\" image/src stripping):\n   * - Sets data-unknown-request-policy=\"allow\" so unclassified asset hosts (e.g., images/CDN)\n   *   don't get request-regulated and have src/srcset neutered.\n   * - Optional: hard-disable request regulation via data-protect=\"off\" (commented).\n   **************************************/\n  (function () {\n    \"use strict\";\n\n    window.jfrogConsent = window.jfrogConsent || {};\n    window.jfrogConsent.callbacks = window.jfrogConsent.callbacks || [];\n\n    // Register callbacks that run once airgap is ready\n    window.jfrogConsent.addAirgapCallback = function (callback) {\n      if (typeof callback !== \"function\") {\n        try { console.warn(\"Provided callback is not a function:\", callback); } catch (e) {}\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (window.airgap && typeof window.airgap.getConsent === \"function\") {\n        callback();\n        return;\n      }\n\n      window.jfrogConsent.callbacks.push(callback);\n    };\n\n    // Preview/iframe guard (keeps production behavior, reduces preview flakiness)\n    var isFramePreview = (location.search || \"\").indexOf(\"isFramePreview=true\") !== -1;\n    var isInIframe = false;\n    try { isInIframe = window.self !== window.top; } catch (e) { isInIframe = true; }\n\n    var BUNDLE_ID = \"f0071674-c641-4cf3-9d31-303ec0c86b1b\";\n\n    function defineGetConsent() {\n      window.jfrogConsent.getConsent = function () {\n        if (window.airgap && typeof window.airgap.getConsent === \"function\") {\n          var consent = window.airgap.getConsent() || {};\n          var purposes = consent.purposes || {};\n          return {\n            functional: purposes.Functional === true,\n            analytics: purposes.Analytics === true,\n            advertising: purposes.Advertising === true,\n            saleOfInfo: purposes.SaleOfInfo === true\n          };\n        }\n\n        try { console.warn(\"airgap.getConsent is not available.\"); } catch (e) {}\n        return {\n          functional: false,\n          analytics: false,\n          advertising: false,\n          saleOfInfo: false\n        };\n      };\n    }\n\n    // Ensure a stable shape even before airgap loads\n    if (typeof window.jfrogConsent.getConsent !== \"function\") defineGetConsent();\n\n    function runCallbacks() {\n      var list = window.jfrogConsent.callbacks || [];\n      for (var i = 0; i \u003c list.length; i++) {\n        try { if (typeof list[i] === \"function\") list[i](); } catch (e) {}\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Load airgap.js (idempotent)\n    function loadAirgap() {\n      if (document.getElementById(\"__jfrog_airgap_script\")) return;\n\n      var script = document.createElement(\"script\");\n      script.id = \"__jfrog_airgap_script\";\n      script.type = \"text/javascript\";\n      script.src = \"https://transcend-cdn.com/cm/\" + BUNDLE_ID + \"/airgap.js\";\n      script.async = true;\n      script.defer = true;\n\n      // Cloudflare directive\n      script.setAttribute(\"data-cfasync\", \"false\");\n\n      // IMPORTANT: prevent \"unknown host\" request regulation from stripping image src/srcset\n      // (best long-term fix is still classifying your image/CDN domains in Transcend,\n      //  but this stops the breakage immediately.)\n      script.setAttribute(\"data-unknown-request-policy\", \"allow\");\n\n      // Optional emergency hammer (NOT recommended unless you must):\n      // Disables request regulation entirely (stops DOM URL stripping, but weakens enforcement)\n      // script.setAttribute(\"data-protect\", \"off\");\n\n      // Overrides + language\n      script.dataset.trackerOverrides =\n        \"GoogleConsentMode:security_storage=on;ad_storage=SaleOfInfo,Advertising;ad_user_data=SaleOfInfo,Advertising;ad_personalization=SaleOfInfo,Advertising;analytics_storage=Analytics,SaleOfInfo;functionality_storage=Functional,SaleOfInfo;personalization_storage=Functional,SaleOfInfo\";\n // Appcues + FullStory (JFrog)
// ----------------------------
(function () {
  // If a ReadMe staff member is logged in (HubMe exposes their email), do NOT run.
  try {
    var hubMeEl = document.getElementById("hub-me");
    if (hubMeEl && hubMeEl.dataset && hubMeEl.dataset.json) {
      var hubMe = JSON.parse(hubMeEl.dataset.json);
      var email =
        hubMe &&
        hubMe.loggedIn === true &&
        hubMe.user &&
        typeof hubMe.user.email === "string"
          ? hubMe.user.email
          : "";

      if (
        email &&
        (email.toLowerCase().endsWith("@readme.io") ||
          email.toLowerCase().endsWith("@readme.com"))
      ) {
        return;
      }
    }
  } catch (e) {}

  // Prevent double-initialization (ReadMe is an SPA; custom JS can re-run in some cases)
  if (window.__jfrog_appcues_fullstory_init) return;
  window.__jfrog_appcues_fullstory_init = true;

  // ----------------------------
  // Appcues
  // ----------------------------
  window.AppcuesSettings = { enableURLDetection: true };

  // Optional: auto-pick staging vs prod by hostname (edit if your staging hostname differs)
  var isStaging =
    location.hostname.includes("readmepreview.com") ||
    location.hostname.includes("staging");

  var appcuesAccountId = isStaging ? "106584" : "106479";

  // Load Appcues
  (function loadAppcues() {
    if (document.querySelector('script[data-jfrog-appcues="true"]')) return;
    var s = document.createElement("script");
    s.setAttribute("data-jfrog-appcues", "true");
    s.src = "https://fast.appcues.com/" + appcuesAccountId + ".js";
    s.async = true;
    document.head.appendChild(s);
  })();

  // Ensure Appcues has a user context (public docs site => anonymous visitors)
  (function ensureAppcuesIdentified() {
    if (window.__jfrog_appcues_anon_set) return;
    window.__jfrog_appcues_anon_set = true;

    var tries = 0;
    var t = setInterval(function () {
      tries++;

      if (window.Appcues && typeof window.Appcues.anonymous === "function") {
        clearInterval(t);

        try {
          // Call ONCE per page load
          window.Appcues.anonymous();

          // Optional: re-evaluate targeting after identifying
          if (typeof window.Appcues.page === "function") {
            window.Appcues.page();
          }
        } catch (e) {}
      }

      if (tries > 50) clearInterval(t); // ~10s max
    }, 200);
  })();

  // If ReadMe fires a SPA navigation event, tell Appcues about "page changes".
  // (This is safe even if Appcues isn't loaded yet.)
  function notifyAppcuesPage() {
    try {
      if (window.Appcues && typeof window.Appcues.page === "function") {
        window.Appcues.page();
      }
    } catch (e) {}
  }

  window.addEventListener("pageLoad", notifyAppcuesPage);
  notifyAppcuesPage();

  // ----------------------------
  // FullStory
  // ----------------------------
  window._fs_host = "fullstory.com";
  window._fs_script = "edge.fullstory.com/s/fs.js";
  window._fs_org = "o-24BXMG-na1"; // JFrog Docs org ID
  window._fs_namespace = "FS";

  !function (m, n, e, t, l, o, g, y) {
    var s, f, a = function (h) {
      return !(h in m) || (m.console && m.console.log && m.console.log('FullStory namespace conflict. Please set window["_fs_namespace"].'), !1);
    }(e);

      var h, d = [];
      function j() {
        h && (d.forEach((function (b) {
          var d;
          try { d = b[h[0]] && b[h[0]](h[1]); }

        })), d.length = 0);
      }

      };
    }

      var b = function (b, d, j, r) {
        function i(i, c) { h(b, d, j, i, c, r); }
        r = r || 2;
        var c, u = /Async$/;
        return u.test(b) ? (b = b.replace(u, ""), "function" == typeof Promise ? new Promise(i) : p(i)) : h(b, d, j, c, c, r);
      };
      function h(h, d, j, r, i, c) { return b._api ? b._api(h, d, j, r, i, c) : (b.q && b.q.push([h, d, j, r, i, c]), null); }
      return b.q = [], b;
    }(), y = function (b) {
      function h(h) { "function" == typeof h[4] && h[4](new Error(b)); }
      var d = g.q;
      if (d) { for (var j = 0; j < d.length; j++) h(d[j]); d.length = 0, d.push = h; }
    }, function () {
      (o = n.createElement(t)).async = !0, o.crossOrigin = "anonymous", o.src = "https://" + l, o.onerror = function () { y("Error loading " + l); };
      var b = n.getElementsByTagName(t)[0];
      b && b.parentNode ? b.parentNode.insertBefore(o, b) : n.head.appendChild(o);

      }, g.anonymize = function () { r(!1); }, g.shutdown = function () { h("shutdown"); }, g.restart = function () { h("restart"); },
        g.log = function (b, d) { h("log", { level: b, msg: d }); }, g.consent = function (b) { h("setIdentity", { consent: !arguments.length || b }); };
    }(), s = "fetch", f = "XMLHttpRequest", g._w = {}, g._w[f] = m[f], g._w[s] = m[s],
      m[s] && (m[s] = function () { return g._w[s].apply(this, arguments); }), g._v = "2.0.0");
  }(window, document, window._fs_namespace, "script", window._fs_script);
})();


// Ensure Fullstory is ready before trying to grab session data
// - Fires "Fullstory Session Started" to Appcues ONCE per browser session (sessionStorage gate)
// - Also listens for Fullstory Rage Click events and forwards them to Appcues
(function () {
  var FS_SESSION_FLAG = "fs_session_tracked";
  var MAX_TRIES = 50; // ~10s

  function safeAppcuesTrack(eventName, props) {
    var tries = 0;
    var t = setInterval(function () {
      tries++;

      if (window.Appcues && typeof window.Appcues.track === "function") {
        clearInterval(t);
        try {
          window.Appcues.track(eventName, props || {});
        } catch (e) {}
        return;
      }

      if (tries >= MAX_TRIES) clearInterval(t);
    }, 200);
  }

  window._fs_ready = function () {
    // 1) Check if we have already tracked the session start in this browser session
    var hasTrackedSession = null;
    try {
      hasTrackedSession = sessionStorage.getItem(FS_SESSION_FLAG);
    } catch (e) {}

    if (hasTrackedSession) return;

    // 2) Get the current Fullstory Session URL (recommended)
    var fsSessionUrl = "";
    try {
      if (window.FS && typeof window.FS.getCurrentSessionURL === "function") {
        fsSessionUrl = window.FS.getCurrentSessionURL() || "";
      }
    } catch (e) {}

    // 3) Trigger the event in Appcues
    safeAppcuesTrack("Fullstory Session Started", {
      fullstory_session_url: fsSessionUrl
    });

    // 4) Set the flag so it won't fire again until the tab/window is closed
    try {
      sessionStorage.setItem(FS_SESSION_FLAG, "true");
    } catch (e) {}
  };

  // Fullstory Rage Click → Appcues event trigger
  // Note: this relies on Fullstory "Client-Side Ragehooks" being enabled in Fullstory settings.
  // It emits a CustomEvent: "fullstory/rageclick". See Fullstory docs for details.
  window.addEventListener("fullstory/rageclick", function (e) {
    var d = (e && e.detail) ? e.detail : {};
    safeAppcuesTrack("Fullstory Rage Click", {
      fullstory_replay_url: d.eventReplayUrlAtCurrentTime || d.eventReplayUrlAtStart || "",
      fullstory_replay_url_at_start: d.eventReplayUrlAtStart || "",
      fullstory_replay_url_at_current_time: d.eventReplayUrlAtCurrentTime || ""
    });
  });
})();
/**
 * ReadMe Table Lightbox Override (table-only)
 *
 * What this does:
 * - ONLY targets images inside ReadMe-rendered tables (.rdmd-table) that are lightbox-enabled (.img.lightbox)
 * - When the image is clicked, it navigates to the ONLY non-lightbox link in the same <td>
 *   (Guardrail: if there are 0 links or multiple links in that cell, it does nothing)
 * - Prevents the lightbox from opening by intercepting clicks in the CAPTURE phase
 * - Hides the hover "magnifying glass" affordance in tables by injecting scoped CSS
 * - Re-applies cursor + CSS on SPA navigation (pageLoad) and a couple delayed passes
 */
(function () {
  'use strict';

  var STYLE_ID = 'rm-no-lightbox-magnifier';

  function getSingleLinkForLightbox(lightboxEl) {
    var td = lightboxEl.closest('td');
    if (!td) return null;

    // Only consider links in the same <td> that are NOT inside the lightbox wrapper.
    var links = Array.prototype.slice.call(td.querySelectorAll('a[href]')).filter(function (a) {
      return !a.closest('.img.lightbox');
    });

    // Guardrail: if the cell has 0 or >1 links (e.g., bullet list), do nothing.
    if (links.length !== 1) return null;

    return links[0];
  }

  function applyPointerCursor() {
    var imgs = document.querySelectorAll('.rdmd-table .img.lightbox img');
    for (var i = 0; i < imgs.length; i++) {
      imgs[i].style.cursor = 'pointer';
    }
  }

  function injectNoMagnifierCSS() {
    if (document.getElementById(STYLE_ID)) return;

    var style = document.createElement('style');
    style.id = STYLE_ID;
    style.type = 'text/css';
    style.appendChild(
      document.createTextNode(
        [
          // Kill the hover overlay/icon (commonly pseudo-elements) — table-only
          '.rdmd-table .img.lightbox::before,',
          '.rdmd-table .img.lightbox::after,',
          '.rdmd-table .img.lightbox .lightbox-inner::before,',
          '.rdmd-table .img.lightbox .lightbox-inner::after {',
          '  content: none !important;',
          '  display: none !important;',
          '  background: none !important;',
          '}',

          // Sometimes the icon is implemented as a background-image — table-only
          '.rdmd-table .img.lightbox,',
          '.rdmd-table .img.lightbox .lightbox-inner {',
          '  background-image: none !important;',
          '  background: none !important;',
          '}',

          // Ensure pointer cursor within tables
          '.rdmd-table .img.lightbox img { cursor: pointer !important; }'
        ].join('\n')
      )
    );

    document.head.appendChild(style);
  }

  function handleActivate(e) {
    // Only intercept lightbox images inside tables
    var lightbox =
      e.target && e.target.closest
        ? e.target.closest('.rdmd-table .img.lightbox')
        : null;

    if (!lightbox) return;

    var link = getSingleLinkForLightbox(lightbox);
    if (!link) return;

    // Stop the lightbox before it sees the event
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();
    if (e.stopImmediatePropagation) e.stopImmediatePropagation();

    var href = link.getAttribute('href');
    if (!href) return;

    // Respect ctrl/cmd click behavior + target=_blank
    var openNewTab =
      (e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey) ||
      (link.getAttribute('target') === '_blank');

    if (openNewTab) {
      window.open(href, '_blank', 'noopener,noreferrer');
      return;
    }

    window.location.href = href;
  }

  function boot() {
    injectNoMagnifierCSS();
    applyPointerCursor();
  }

  // Capture phase is key: it runs before ReadMe's delegated lightbox handlers
  document.addEventListener('click', handleActivate, true);

  // Keyboard support (role="button" wrapper)
  document.addEventListener(
    'keydown',
    function (e) {
      if (e.key !== 'Enter' && e.key !== ' ') return;
      handleActivate(e);
    },
    true
  );

  // Initial + SPA
  boot();
  document.addEventListener('pageLoad', boot);

  // Safety: some pages render content slightly after pageLoad
  setTimeout(boot, 500);
  setTimeout(boot, 1500);
})();



// ----------------------------
// Add placeholder text + styling to ReadMe search input (SPA-safe, does not touch your existing JS)
// ----------------------------
(function () {
  // ---- Safety: optionally skip inside the Dash editor iframe ----
  try {
    if (window.self !== window.top && /dash\.readme\.com/i.test(document.referrer || "")) return;
  } catch (e) {}

  if (window.__rmSearchPlaceholderInit) return;
  window.__rmSearchPlaceholderInit = true;

  var PLACEHOLDER_TEXT = "Search JFrog help...";
  var PLACEHOLDER_COLOR = "#999DB4";
  var PLACEHOLDER_FONT_SIZE = "16px";

  function getSearchRoot() {
    return document.getElementById("AppSearch") || document.querySelector(".rm-SearchModal, #hub-search-results");
  }

  function getSearchInput() {
    var root = getSearchRoot();
    if (!root) return null;

    return (
      root.querySelector('input[type="search"][aria-label="Search"]') ||
      root.querySelector('input[type="search"]') ||
      root.querySelector(".SearchBoxnZBxftziZGcz input")
    );
  }

  function ensurePlaceholderStyle() {
    if (document.getElementById("rm-search-placeholder-style")) return;

    var style = document.createElement("style");
    style.id = "rm-search-placeholder-style";
    style.type = "text/css";

    // Scope to the search UI so we don't accidentally restyle other inputs on the page
    style.textContent =
      [
        '#AppSearch input[type="search"]::placeholder { color: ' + PLACEHOLDER_COLOR + '; font-size: ' + PLACEHOLDER_FONT_SIZE + '; }',
        '#AppSearch input[type="search"]::-webkit-input-placeholder { color: ' + PLACEHOLDER_COLOR + '; font-size: ' + PLACEHOLDER_FONT_SIZE + '; }',
        '#AppSearch input[type="search"]::-moz-placeholder { color: ' + PLACEHOLDER_COLOR + '; font-size: ' + PLACEHOLDER_FONT_SIZE + '; opacity: 1; }',
        '#AppSearch input[type="search"]:-ms-input-placeholder { color: ' + PLACEHOLDER_COLOR + '; font-size: ' + PLACEHOLDER_FONT_SIZE + '; }',
        '#AppSearch input[type="search"]::-ms-input-placeholder { color: ' + PLACEHOLDER_COLOR + '; font-size: ' + PLACEHOLDER_FONT_SIZE + '; }',

        // Fallback if #AppSearch isn't present for some reason (still kept fairly tight)
        '.rm-SearchModal input[type="search"]::placeholder { color: ' + PLACEHOLDER_COLOR + '; font-size: ' + PLACEHOLDER_FONT_SIZE + '; }'
      ].join("\n");

    document.head.appendChild(style);
  }

  function applyPlaceholder() {
    var input = getSearchInput();
    if (!input) return;

    ensurePlaceholderStyle();

    // Only set if missing/different (keeps this low-impact)
    if ((input.getAttribute("placeholder") || "") !== PLACEHOLDER_TEXT) {
      input.setAttribute("placeholder", PLACEHOLDER_TEXT);
    }
  }

  // React mounts/unmounts search UI; observe and re-apply
  var mo = new MutationObserver(function () {
    applyPlaceholder();
  });
  mo.observe(document.documentElement, { childList: true, subtree: true });

  // Run once immediately too
  applyPlaceholder();
})();


(function () {
  // ---- Safety: optionally skip inside the Dash editor iframe ----
  // If you're editing a project in ReadMe's dashboard, the site often runs in an iframe.
  // This prevents weirdness while editing (end-users on the live site won't hit this).
  try {
    if (window.self !== window.top && /dash\.readme\.com/i.test(document.referrer || "")) return;
  } catch (e) {
    // If cross-origin blocks access, just continue; we won't assume it's the editor.
  }

  // ---- Config ----
  var STORAGE_KEY = "rm:lastSearch:" + location.host; // per hub domain
  var RESTORE_ON_EMPTY_ONLY = true; // set false if you always want to overwrite
  var DEBUG = false;

  function log() {
    if (!DEBUG) return;
    try { console.log.apply(console, ["[rm-search-restore]"].concat([].slice.call(arguments))); } catch (_) {}
  }

  function getSearchRoot() {
    // Based on your snippet: search modal container has id="AppSearch"
    return document.getElementById("AppSearch") || document.querySelector(".rm-SearchModal, #hub-search-results");
  }

  function getSearchInput() {
    var root = getSearchRoot();
    if (!root) return null;

    // Prefer the most sget selector first
    return (
      root.querySelector('input[type="search"][aria-label="Search"]') ||
      root.querySelector('input[type="search"]') ||
      root.querySelector(".SearchBoxnZBxftziZGcz input")
    );
  }

  // React-controlled inputs usually need the native setter + an input event.
  function setReactInputValue(inputEl, nextValue) {
    if (!inputEl) return;

    var valueSetter = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype, "value").set;
    valueSetter.call(inputEl, nextValue);

    // Trigger React listeners
    inputEl.dispatchEvent(new Event("input", { bubbles: true }));
    inputEl.dispatchEvent(new Event("change", { bubbles: true }));
  }

  function readStoredQuery() {
    try {
      return (sessionStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY) || "").trim();
    } catch (e) {
      return "";
    }
  }

  function storeQuery(q) {
    try {
      sessionStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, (q || "").trim());
      log("stored:", q);
    } catch (e) {}
  }

  // ---- Save as user types (debounced) ----
  var saveTimer = null;
  function attachSaveListener(inputEl) {
    if (!inputEl || inputEl.__rmSearchSaveAttached) return;
    inputEl.__rmSearchSaveAttached = true;

    inputEl.addEventListener(
      "input",
      function () {
        clearTimeout(saveTimer);
        var val = inputEl.value || "";
        saveTimer = setTimeout(function () {
          storeQuery(val);
        }, 150);
      },
      { passive: true }
    );

    log("save listener attached");
  }

  // ---- Store immediately if a result is clicked (captures the latest) ----
  document.addEventListener(
    "click",
    function (e) {
      var a = e.target && e.target.closest ? e.target.closest("a.SearchResults-result14C9m0b6kNXJ, a[href]") : null;
      if (!a) return;

      // Only treat clicks inside the search UI as "search result" clicks
      var root = getSearchRoot();
      if (!root || !root.contains(a)) return;

      var inputEl = getSearchInput();
      if (inputEl) storeQuery(inputEl.value || "");
    },
    true // capture, so it runs before navigation
  );

  // ---- Restore when the modal/input appears ----
  function tryRestore() {
    var inputEl = getSearchInput();
    if (!inputEl) return;

    attachSaveListener(inputEl);

    if (inputEl.__rmSearchRestored) return; // do once per mount
    var stored = readStoredQuery();
    if (!stored) return;

    var current = (inputEl.value || "").trim();
    if (RESTORE_ON_EMPTY_ONLY && current) return;

    inputEl.__rmSearchRestored = true;
    log("restoring:", stored);

    setReactInputValue(inputEl, stored);

    // Optional: focus the input so the user can keep typing immediately
    // inputEl.focus();
  }

  // MutationObserver so this works even though the search UI is React-mounted dynamically
  var mo = new MutationObserver(function () {
    tryRestore();
  });

  mo.observe(document.documentElement, { childList: true, subtree: true });

  // Also run once on load
  tryRestore();
})();



(function () {
  if (window.__rmLogoSrcDebugV2) return;
  window.__rmLogoSrcDebugV2 = true;

  function logoImg() {
    return document.querySelector("header.rm-Header a.rm-Logo img.rm-Logo-img");
  }

  function isLogoImg(el) {
    if (!el || el.tagName !== "IMG") return false;
    if (el.classList && el.classList.contains("rm-Logo-img")) return true;
    if (el.closest && el.closest("header.rm-Header a.rm-Logo")) return true;
    return false;
  }

  function isSuspicious(val) {
    var v = (val || "").trim();
    if (!v) return true;
    // If it points at site root or relative weirdness, suspicious
    if (v === "/" || v === location.origin + "/" || v === location.href) return true;
    // Most valid logo src should be files.readme.io (or your own CDN)
    if (v.indexOf("files.readme.io/") === -1 && v.indexOf("http") === 0) return true;
    return false;
  }

  function logIfBad(action, el, value) {
    if (!isLogoImg(el)) return;
    if (!isSuspicious(value)) return;
    try {
      console.warn("[LOGO SRC SUSPECT]", action, "=>", value, "\n", new Error().stack);
      console.warn("Current logo img:", el);
    } catch (e) {}
  }

  // Patch setAttribute/removeAttribute
  var origSet = Element.prototype.setAttribute;
  Element.prototype.setAttribute = function (name, value) {
    if (String(name).toLowerCase() === "src") logIfBad("setAttribute(src)", this, String(value));
    return origSet.apply(this, arguments);
  };

  var origRemove = Element.prototype.removeAttribute;
  Element.prototype.removeAttribute = function (name) {
    if (String(name).toLowerCase() === "src") logIfBad("removeAttribute(src)", this, "");
    return origRemove.apply(this, arguments);
  };

  // Patch img.src setter
  try {
    var desc = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLImageElement.prototype, "src");
    if (desc && desc.set) {
      Object.defineProperty(HTMLImageElement.prototype, "src", {
        get: desc.get,
        set: function (v) {
          logIfBad(".src setter", this, String(v));
          return desc.set.call(this, v);
        }
      });
    }
  } catch (e) {}

  // Watch if the logo IMG node itself gets replaced
  var last = null;
  setInterval(function () {
    var cur = logoImg();
    if (cur && cur !== last) {
      // If it comes in without src, that's our smoking gun
      var s = cur.getAttribute("src") || "";
      if (isSuspicious(s)) {
        try {
          console.warn("[LOGO IMG REPLACED] new img has suspicious src:", s, "\n", new Error().stack);
        } catch (e) {}
      }
      last = cur;
    }
  }, 500);
})();


/**
 * ReadMe Header Project Dropdown (SAFER / SPA-friendly)
 *
 * Goals vs your original:
 * - No document-wide MutationObserver running forever
 * - No tight 400ms route polling loop (we prefer ReadMe's `pageLoad` if present)
 * - Only observes the header area (and a short-lived body observer until header exists)
 * - Touches ONLY elements we create (#rmps-wrap + #rmps-menu) and its own icon <img> tags
 *
 * Notes:
 * - Still idempotent (safe to inject multiple times)
 * - Still repositions on resize + when ReadMe SPA fires `pageLoad`
 */
(function () {
  'use strict';

  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  // Config
  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

  /* Icon URLs (SVG/PNG) */
  var ICONS = {
    devGovOps:
      'https://files.readme.io/41d9197fe09d1e053ff64ff99d331293d2545cc4afc3a8d2e7948988e5800042-DevGovOps.svg',
    devSecOps:
      'https://files.readme.io/c399216d430bf2dfd3da1dd376a5f90c30141391a30004e10e69f7bf6c4826e7-download-1.svg',
    cube: 'https://files.readme.io/390e6f5854803b5736db9af82cb1afc44870ab098cac86a2bedaa2b19fa196a9-Frame_427320456.svg',
    getStarted:
      'https://files.readme.io/1c0eeb9cc94ae8eb2c565fb8b9ca10c7f0cd474df0bd91f7377410c7a5534e65-Get_Started.svg',
    megaphone:
      'https://files.readme.io/2d1e1749398ab10f0eb7261d1ab5e10a70bbcdafe3eeadb5da8b0d513da2a17f-Meghaphone.svg',
    projectMgmt:
      'https://files.readme.io/90bd455c385425b9f72cf57837a16a78be9d83b8585a3a890eac30d376ff343a-PlatformAdministration_new.svg',
    settings:
      'https://files.readme.io/1fede2c16da3db465e852c06395316aba737e29e37a3fc1a4fd7af0207fd6714-Settings.svg',
    userAdmin:
      'https://files.readme.io/36df7c44531d2d2fe81decc44a4787490b08687ca396b6ce81be3a0d414d74f2-User_Admin.svg',
    wand: 'https://files.readme.io/e7165120c81825c3c24b98bafa7d1958cbe598d68c1690511245cbc237019942-Wand-transparent.svg',
    wrench:
      'https://files.readme.io/ecb5316cbee123c3cb3fef74d8165425b0470d9e1965154554999ae39255fff2-Wrench.svg',

    /* New icons */
    aiml:
      'https://files.readme.io/4e583a160bc1219fa2be63efb0d09a4b305f5011d67d223f70bcacc3fc1a7233-AI_new.svg',
    integrations:
      'https://files.readme.io/26c2ca6568df66f73debd1b8f6fb9a764bbaf17e858c6c5d80248a3c3c524a7e-Integrations_new.svg',
    pipelines:
      'https://files.readme.io/85afb59499002bfff30b04bbd21fc8b5ef297a5cc575a8d029db35b18c4530f8-Pipelines_new.svg',
  };

  /* Menu/trigger label overrides by project id */
  var PROJECT_LABEL_OVERRIDES = {
    // self: 'Self managed',
    // security: 'Security Docs',
  };

  /* Trigger label override (exact path wins) */
  var TRIGGER_LABEL_OVERRIDES_BY_PATH = {
    // '/installation/docs/getting-started': 'Self managed',
  };

  /* Trigger label override (longest path prefix match) */
  var TRIGGER_LABEL_OVERRIDES_BY_PREFIX = {
    '/installation': 'Self managed',
  };

  /* Force trigger project id (exact path) */
  var TRIGGER_PROJECT_OVERRIDES_BY_PATH = {
    // '/installation': 'self',
  };

  /* Force trigger project id (longest prefix match) */
  var TRIGGER_PROJECT_OVERRIDES_BY_PREFIX = {
    '/installation': 'self',
  };

  /* Updated order + updated icons + removed "Why JFrog" */
  var PROJECTS = [
    { id: 'setup', label: 'Set up JFrog', href: '/setup', iconUrl: ICONS.getStarted, match: /^\/setup(\/|$)/i },
    { id: 'release', label: 'Release Information', href: '/releases', iconUrl: ICONS.megaphone, match: /^\/releases(\/|$)/i },
    { id: 'Artifactory', label: 'Binary Management (DevOps)', href: '/artifactory', iconUrl: ICONS.cube, match: /^\/artifactory(\/|$)/i },
    { id: 'security', label: 'Security (DevSecOps)', href: '/security', iconUrl: ICONS.devSecOps, match: /^\/security(\/|$)/i },
    { id: 'governance', label: 'Governance & Lifecycle', href: '/governance', iconUrl: ICONS.devGovOps, match: /^\/governance(\/|$)/i },
    { id: 'aiml', label: 'AI & Machine Learning', href: '/ai-ml', iconUrl: ICONS.aiml, match: /^\/ai-ml(\/|$)/i },
    { id: 'integrations', label: 'Integrations', href: '/integrations', iconUrl: ICONS.integrations, match: /^\/integrations(\/|$)/i },
    { id: 'pipelines', label: 'Pipelines', href: '/pipelines', iconUrl: ICONS.pipelines, match: /^\/pipelines(\/|$)/i },
    {
      id: 'self',
      label: 'Self-Managed Installation',
      href: '/installation',
      iconUrl: ICONS.settings,
      match: /^\/installation(\/|$)/i,
    },
    { id: 'users', label: 'User Management', href: '/user-management', iconUrl: ICONS.userAdmin, match: /^\/user-management(\/|$)/i },
    { id: 'pm', label: 'Project Management', href: '/projects', iconUrl: ICONS.wrench, match: /^\/projects(\/|$)/i },
    { id: 'platform', label: 'Platform Administration', href: '/administration', iconUrl: ICONS.projectMgmt, match: /^\/administration(\/|$)/i },
  ];

  var DEFAULT_TRIGGER_LABEL = 'Choose Section';
  var DEFAULT_TRIGGER_ICON_URL = ICONS.cube;

  var LOGO_SELECTOR = 'header.rm-Header a.rm-Logo';
  var HEADER_SELECTOR = 'header.rm-Header';
  var HEADER_LEFT_SELECTOR = 'header.rm-Header .rm-Header-left';
  var OFFSET_X = 14;
  var OFFSET_Y = 0;
  var HIDE_BELOW_PX = 0; // keep visible on all widths
  var MOBILE_BREAKPOINT = 1120; // used ONLY for layout/positioning mode, not hiding

  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  // Internals / IDs
  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

  var STYLE_ID = 'rm-project-switcher-style';
  var WRAP_ID = 'rmps-wrap';
  var TRIGGER_ID = 'rmps-trigger';
  var MENU_ID = 'rmps-menu';
  var OPEN_CLASS = 'rmps-open';
  var HIDDEN_CLASS = 'rmps-hidden';

  var state = { open: false };
  var scheduled = false;

  // observers (scoped + short-lived)
  var bodyObserver = null;
  var headerObserver = null;
  var logoResizeObserver = null;

  var lastPath = normalizePath(location.pathname || '/');

  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  // Helpers
  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

  function escapeHtml(s) {
    return String(s)
      .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
      .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
      .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
      .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
      .replace(/'/g, '&#39;');
  }

  function normalizePath(pathname) {
    var p = (pathname || '').trim();
    if (!p) return '/';
    if (p.charAt(0) !== '/') p = '/' + p;
    if (p.length > 1) p = p.replace(/\/+$/, '');
    return p;
  }

  function getHeader() {
    return document.querySelector(HEADER_SELECTOR);
  }

  function getHeaderLeft() {
    return document.querySelector(HEADER_LEFT_SELECTOR);
  }

  function getLogo() {
    return document.querySelector(LOGO_SELECTOR);
  }

  function isElementVisible(el) {
    if (!el) return false;
    var r = el.getBoundingClientRect();
    if (r.width <= 0 || r.height <= 0) return false;
    if (r.bottom < 0 || r.top > window.innerHeight) return false;
    return true;
  }

  function isMobileLayout() {
    return window.innerWidth <= MOBILE_BREAKPOINT;
  }

  function findProjectById(id) {
    for (var i = 0; i < PROJECTS.length; i++) {
      if (PROJECTS[i] && PROJECTS[i].id === id) return PROJECTS[i];
    }
    return null;
  }

  function getProjectDisplayLabel(p) {
    if (!p) return '';
    var o = PROJECT_LABEL_OVERRIDES[p.id];
    return o ? String(o).trim() : p.label;
  }

  function getLongestPrefixMatch(map, path) {
    if (!map) return '';
    var bestKey = '';
    for (var k in map) {
      if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(map, k)) continue;
      var key = normalizePath(k);
      if (key === '/' || !key) continue;
      if (path === key || path.indexOf(key + '/') === 0) {
        if (key.length > bestKey.length) bestKey = key;
      }
    }
    return bestKey ? map[bestKey] : '';
  }

  function getTriggerLabel(p) {
    var path = normalizePath(location.pathname || '/');

    var exact = TRIGGER_LABEL_OVERRIDES_BY_PATH[path];
    if (exact) return String(exact).trim();

    var pref = getLongestPrefixMatch(TRIGGER_LABEL_OVERRIDES_BY_PREFIX, path);
    if (pref) return String(pref).trim();

    if (p) return getProjectDisplayLabel(p);

    return DEFAULT_TRIGGER_LABEL;
  }

  function getCurrentProject() {
    var rawPath = location.pathname || '/';
    var path = normalizePath(rawPath);

    var forcedExact = TRIGGER_PROJECT_OVERRIDES_BY_PATH[path];
    if (forcedExact) {
      var forcedP = findProjectById(forcedExact);
      if (forcedP) return forcedP;
    }

    var forcedPref = getLongestPrefixMatch(TRIGGER_PROJECT_OVERRIDES_BY_PREFIX, path);
    if (forcedPref) {
      var forcedP2 = findProjectById(forcedPref);
      if (forcedP2) return forcedP2;
    }

    for (var i = 0; i < PROJECTS.length; i++) {
      var p = PROJECTS[i];
      if (p.match && p.match.test(rawPath)) return p;
    }
    return null;
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  // DOM creation
  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

  function injectStylesOnce() {
    if (document.getElementById(STYLE_ID)) return;

    var css = [
      '/* ---- Project Switcher (Injected / Header-mounted / SPA-friendly) ---- */',
      ':root{',
      '  --rmps-navy-1000:#111821;',
      '  --rmps-navy-900:#324152;',
      '  --rmps-hover:#E9F2F6;',
      '  --rmps-white:#ffffff;',
      '  --rmps-text:#0B1220;',
      '  --rmps-trigger-text:#F8FAFC;',
      '  --rmps-green:#55D16A;',
      '  --rmps-radius-trigger:12px;',
      '  --rmps-radius-menu:12px;',
      '  --rmps-w:340px;',
      '  --rmps-trigger-h:56px;',
      '  --rmps-item-h:46px;',
      '  --rmps-item-pad-left:38px;',
      '  --rmps-item-pad-right:20px;',
      '  --rmps-gap:10px;',
      '  --rmps-trigger-font:400 16px/22px "Open Sans", system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;',
      '  --rmps-item-font:400 14px/22px "Open Sans", system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;',
      '}',

      HEADER_SELECTOR + '{position:relative !important;}',

      '#' + WRAP_ID + '{position:absolute;z-index:99;display:none;align-items:center;}',
      '#' + WRAP_ID + ' *{box-sizing:border-box;}',
      '#' + WRAP_ID + '.rmps-visible{display:inline-flex;}',

      'button#' + TRIGGER_ID + '{',
      '  width:min(var(--rmps-w), calc(100vw - 24px)) !important;',
      '  margin-left:30px !important;',
      '  max-width:var(--rmps-w) !important;',
      '  height:var(--rmps-trigger-h) !important;',
      '  display:flex !important;',
      '  align-items:center !important;',
      '  justify-content:flex-start !important;',
      '  gap:var(--rmps-gap) !important;',
      '  padding:16px 20px !important;',
      '  border-radius:var(--rmps-radius-trigger) !important;',
      '  border:1px solid var(--rmps-navy-900) !important;',
      '  background:transparent !important;',
      '  color:var(--rmps-trigger-text) !important;',
      '  font:var(--rmps-trigger-font) !important;',
      '  cursor:pointer !important;',
      '  user-select:none !important;',
      '  text-align:left !important;',
      '}',
      'button#' + TRIGGER_ID + ':hover{box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(85,209,106,.08) !important;}',
      'button#' + TRIGGER_ID + ':focus{box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(85,209,106,.10) !important;}',

      'button#' + TRIGGER_ID + ' .rmps-trigger-icon{width:28px;height:28px;flex:0 0 28px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}',
      'button#' + TRIGGER_ID + ' .rmps-trigger-icon img{width:28px;height:28px;display:block;}',
      'button#' + TRIGGER_ID + ' .rmps-label{flex:1 1 auto;min-width:0;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;text-align:left !important;}',
      'button#' + TRIGGER_ID + ' .rmps-chevron{margin-left:auto !important;flex:0 0 auto;display:block;width:20px !important;height:20px !important;}',

      '#' + MENU_ID + '{',
      '  padding:0;',
      '  position:absolute; z-index:2147483000;',
      '  width:min(var(--rmps-w), calc(100vw - 24px)) !important;',
      '  max-width:var(--rmps-w) !important;',
      '  background:var(--rmps-white);',
      '  border:1px solid rgba(203,213,225,.95);',
      '  border-radius:var(--rmps-radius-menu);',
      '  box-shadow:0 18px 40px rgba(2,6,23,.16), 0 2px 10px rgba(2,6,23,.08);',
      '  overflow:hidden;',
      '  display:none;',
      '}',
      '#' + MENU_ID + '.' + OPEN_CLASS + '{display:block;}',

      '#' + MENU_ID + ' .rmps-item{',
      '  display:flex; align-items:center; gap:var(--rmps-gap);',
      '  height:var(--rmps-item-h);',
      '  padding:0 var(--rmps-item-pad-right) 0 var(--rmps-item-pad-left);',
      '  width:100%;',
      '  text-decoration:none;',
      '  color:var(--rmps-text);',
      '  font:var(--rmps-item-font);',
      '  cursor:pointer;',
      '}',
      '#' + MENU_ID + ' .rmps-item:hover{background:var(--rmps-hover);}',
      '#' + MENU_ID + ' .' + HIDDEN_CLASS + '{display:none !important;}',

      '#' + MENU_ID + ' .rmps-icon{width:24px;height:24px;flex:0 0 24px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}',
      '#' + MENU_ID + ' .rmps-icon img{width:24px;height:24px;display:block;}',

      // Keep this block harmless even if HIDE_BELOW_PX=0 (won't affect real screens)
      '@media (max-width:' + HIDE_BELOW_PX + 'px){',
      '  #' + WRAP_ID + '{display:none !important;}',
      '  #' + MENU_ID + '{display:none !important;}',
      '}',

      // MOBILE OVERRIDES (show + fit safely)
      '@media (max-width:' + MOBILE_BREAKPOINT + 'px){',
      '  #' + WRAP_ID + '{',
      '    z-index:2147482998;',
      '  }',
      '  #' + WRAP_ID + '.rmps-visible{',
      '    display:inline-flex !important;',
      '  }',
      '  button#' + TRIGGER_ID + '{',
      '    width:calc(100vw - 16px) !important;',
      '    max-width:none !important;',
      '    margin-left:0 !important;',
      '    padding:12px 14px !important;',
      '    height:auto !important;',
      '    min-height:48px !important;',
      '  }',
      '  #' + MENU_ID + '{',
      '    width:calc(100vw - 16px) !important;',
      '    max-width:none !important;',
      '  }',
      '}',

      '#' + MENU_ID + ' .rmps-spacer{height:10px;width:100%;background:#fff;}',
      '#' + MENU_ID + ' .rmps-spacer.rmps-spacer-top{border-radius:12px 12px 0 0;}',
      '#' + MENU_ID + ' .rmps-spacer.rmps-spacer-bottom{border-radius:0 0 12px 12px;}',
    ].join('\n');

    var style = document.createElement('style');
    style.id = STYLE_ID;
    style.type = 'text/css';
    style.appendChild(document.createTextNode(css));
    document.head.appendChild(style);
  }

  function svgChevron() {
    return (
      '<svg class="rmps-chevron" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">' +
      '<path d="m6 9 6 6 6-6" stroke="var(--rmps-green)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>' +
      '</svg>'
    );
  }

  function ensureWrap() {
    var wrap = document.getElementById(WRAP_ID);

    function mountIntoHeader(el) {
      var left = getHeaderLeft();
      if (left && left.parentNode) {
        if (el.parentNode !== left.parentNode) {
          left.parentNode.insertBefore(el, left.nextSibling);
        }
        return;
      }

      var header = getHeader();
      if (header) {
        if (el.parentNode !== header) el.appendChild ? null : null;
        if (el.parentNode !== header) header.appendChild(el);
        return;
      }

      // last resort
      if (el.parentNode !== document.body) document.body.appendChild(el);
    }

    if (wrap) {
      // key: if it was created before header existed, move it now
      mountIntoHeader(wrap);
      return wrap;
    }

    wrap = document.createElement('div');
    wrap.id = WRAP_ID;

    var p = getCurrentProject();
    var label = getTriggerLabel(p);
    var iconUrl = p ? p.iconUrl : DEFAULT_TRIGGER_ICON_URL;

    var btn = document.createElement('button');
    btn.id = TRIGGER_ID;
    btn.type = 'button';
