    btn.setAttribute('aria-haspopup', 'menu');
    btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
    btn.innerHTML =
      '<span class="rmps-trigger-icon"><img alt="" aria-hidden="true" src="' +
      escapeHtml(iconUrl) +
      '"></span>' +
      '<span class="rmps-label">' +
      escapeHtml(label) +
      '</span>' +
      svgChevron();

    btn.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      toggleMenu();
    });

    wrap.appendChild(btn);
    mountIntoHeader(wrap);
    return wrap;
  }

  function ensureMenu() {
    var menu = document.getElementById(MENU_ID);
    if (menu) return menu;

    menu = document.createElement('div');
    menu.id = MENU_ID;
    menu.setAttribute('role', 'menu');
    menu.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Project navigation');

    var html = '<div class="rmps-spacer rmps-spacer-top"></div>';

    for (var i = 0; i < PROJECTS.length; i++) {
      var p = PROJECTS[i];
      var icon = p.iconUrl ? '<img alt="" aria-hidden="true" src="' + escapeHtml(p.iconUrl) + '">' : '';
      var o = PROJECT_LABEL_OVERRIDES[p.id];
      var menuLabel = o ? String(o).trim() : p.label;

      html +=
        '<a class="rmps-item" role="menuitem" tabindex="-1" data-id="' +
        escapeHtml(p.id) +
        '" href="' +
        escapeHtml(p.href) +
        '">' +
        '<span class="rmps-icon">' +
        icon +
        '</span>' +
        '<span>' +
        escapeHtml(menuLabel) +
        '</span>' +
        '</a>';
    }

    html += '<div class="rmps-spacer rmps-spacer-bottom"></div>';
    menu.innerHTML = html;

    menu.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
      var a = e.target && e.target.closest ? e.target.closest('a.rmps-item') : null;
      if (!a) return;
      closeMenu();
    });

    var header = getHeader();
    (header || document.body).appendChild(menu);

    syncMenuVisibility();
    return menu;
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  // Sync + positioning
  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

  function syncTrigger() {
    var btn = document.getElementById(TRIGGER_ID);
    if (!btn) return;

    var p = getCurrentProject();
    var label = getTriggerLabel(p);
    var iconUrl = p ? p.iconUrl : DEFAULT_TRIGGER_ICON_URL;

    var iconEl = btn.querySelector('.rmps-trigger-icon img');
    var labelEl = btn.querySelector('.rmps-label');

    // Only mutate our own trigger elements
    if (iconEl && iconEl.getAttribute('src') !== iconUrl) iconEl.setAttribute('src', iconUrl);
    if (labelEl && labelEl.textContent !== label) labelEl.textContent = label;
  }

  function syncMenuVisibility() {
    var menu = document.getElementById(MENU_ID);
    if (!menu) return;

    var p = getCurrentProject();
    var activeId = p ? p.id : null;

    var items = menu.querySelectorAll('a.rmps-item');
    for (var i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
      var a = items[i];
      var id = a.getAttribute('data-id');
      if (activeId && id === activeId) a.classList.add(HIDDEN_CLASS);
      else a.classList.remove(HIDDEN_CLASS);
    }
  }

  function positionTriggerMobile(header, wrap) {
    var trigger = document.getElementById(TRIGGER_ID);
    if (!header || !wrap || !trigger) return;

    var headerRect = header.getBoundingClientRect();
    var th = trigger.getBoundingClientRect().height || 56;

    // Safe mobile placement: full-width-ish bar inside header, left aligned
    var left = 8;
    var top = 8;

    // If header is taller, center-ish vertically while keeping a minimum top padding
    if (headerRect.height > th + 12) {
      top = Math.max(6, Math.round((headerRect.height - th) / 2));
    }

    wrap.classList.add('rmps-visible');
    wrap.style.left = left + 'px';
    wrap.style.top = top + 'px';

    if (state.open) positionMenu();
  }

  function positionTriggerToLogo() {
    var wrap = ensureWrap();
    ensureMenu();

    syncTrigger();
    syncMenuVisibility();

    // Keep this branch for compatibility, but HIDE_BELOW_PX=0 means never hides in practice.
    if (window.innerWidth < HIDE_BELOW_PX) {
      wrap.classList.remove('rmps-visible');
      closeMenu();
      return;
    }

    var header = getHeader();
    if (!header) {
      wrap.classList.remove('rmps-visible');
      closeMenu();
      return;
    }

    // MOBILE MODE: do NOT depend on logo visibility
    if (isMobileLayout()) {
      positionTriggerMobile(header, wrap);
      return;
    }

    var logo = getLogo();

    if (!logo || !isElementVisible(logo)) {
      wrap.classList.remove('rmps-visible');
      closeMenu();
      return;
    }

    var headerRect = header.getBoundingClientRect();
    var logoRect = logo.getBoundingClientRect();

    wrap.classList.add('rmps-visible');

    var trigger = document.getElementById(TRIGGER_ID);
    var th = trigger ? trigger.getBoundingClientRect().height : 56;

    var left = Math.round(logoRect.right - headerRect.left + OFFSET_X);
    var top = Math.round(logoRect.top - headerRect.top + (logoRect.height - th) / 2 + OFFSET_Y);
    if (top < 0) top = 0;

    wrap.style.left = left + 'px';
    wrap.style.top = top + 'px';

    if (state.open) positionMenu();
  }

  function positionMenu() {
    var header = getHeader();
    var trigger = document.getElementById(TRIGGER_ID);
    var menu = document.getElementById(MENU_ID);
    if (!header || !trigger || !menu) return;

    var headerRect = header.getBoundingClientRect();
    var r = trigger.getBoundingClientRect();
    var margin = 8;

    menu.style.left = '0px';
    menu.style.top = '0px';

    var top = Math.round(r.bottom - headerRect.top + margin);
    var left = Math.round(r.left - headerRect.left);

    menu.classList.add(OPEN_CLASS);

    var mw = menu.offsetWidth || 340;
    var mh = menu.offsetHeight || 300;

    var maxLeft = Math.max(12, window.innerWidth - mw - 12);
    var leftAbs = Math.round(r.left);
    if (leftAbs > maxLeft) left = maxLeft - headerRect.left;
    if (left < 12 - headerRect.left) left = 12 - headerRect.left;

    var topViewport = Math.round(r.bottom + margin);
    var maxTopBelow = window.innerHeight - mh - 12;
    if (topViewport > maxTopBelow && r.top > mh + 12) {
      top = Math.round(r.top - headerRect.top - mh - margin);
    }
    if (top < 12 - headerRect.top) top = 12 - headerRect.top;

    menu.style.left = left + 'px';
    menu.style.top = top + 'px';
  }

  function scheduleReposition() {
    if (scheduled) return;
    scheduled = true;
    requestAnimationFrame(function () {
      scheduled = false;
      positionTriggerToLogo();
    });
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  // Open/close behavior (scoped listeners)
  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

  function openMenu() {
    var trigger = document.getElementById(TRIGGER_ID);
    var menu = ensureMenu();

    state.open = true;
    menu.classList.add(OPEN_CLASS);
    if (trigger) trigger.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');

    syncTrigger();
    syncMenuVisibility();
    positionMenu();

    setTimeout(function () {
      var first = menu.querySelector('.rmps-item:not(.' + HIDDEN_CLASS + ')') || null;
      if (first) first.focus();
    }, 0);

    document.addEventListener('mousedown', onDocMouseDown, true);
    document.addEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown, true);
  }

  function closeMenu() {
    var trigger = document.getElementById(TRIGGER_ID);
    var menu = document.getElementById(MENU_ID);

    state.open = false;
    if (menu) menu.classList.remove(OPEN_CLASS);
    if (trigger) trigger.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');

    document.removeEventListener('mousedown', onDocMouseDown, true);
    document.removeEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown, true);
  }

  function toggleMenu() {
    if (state.open) closeMenu();
    else openMenu();
  }

  function onDocMouseDown(e) {
    if (!state.open) return;
    var trigger = document.getElementById(TRIGGER_ID);
    var menu = document.getElementById(MENU_ID);

    if (menu && menu.contains(e.target)) return;
    if (trigger && trigger.contains(e.target)) return;
    closeMenu();
  }

  function onKeyDown(e) {
    if (!state.open) return;

    if (e.key === 'Escape') {
      e.preventDefault();
      closeMenu();
      var trigger2 = document.getElementById(TRIGGER_ID);
      if (trigger2) trigger2.focus();
      return;
    }

    var menu = document.getElementById(MENU_ID);
    if (!menu) return;

    var itemsAll = menu.querySelectorAll('.rmps-item:not(.' + HIDDEN_CLASS + ')');
    if (!itemsAll.length) return;

    var idx = -1;
    for (var i = 0; i < itemsAll.length; i++) {
      if (document.activeElement === itemsAll[i]) {
        idx = i;
        break;
      }
    }

    if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') {
      e.preventDefault();
      var next = itemsAll[Math.min(itemsAll.length - 1, idx + 1)];
      if (next) next.focus();
    } else if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') {
      e.preventDefault();
      var prev = itemsAll[Math.max(0, idx - 1)];
      if (prev) prev.focus();
    }
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  // SPA hooks (safer)
  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

  function onRouteOrPageLoad() {
    // Close menu on navigation (prevents stuck open state across mounts)
    closeMenu();

    // Re-sync label/icon/hidden item + reposition
    scheduleReposition();

    // Track path change with a low-frequency fallback poll
    lastPath = normalizePath(location.pathname || '/');
  }

  function bindReadMePageLoad() {
    // Prefer ReadMe SPA hook (commonly present in custom JS environments)
    // and namespace the handler so it doesn't multiply.
    var $ = window.jQuery || window.$;
    if ($ && typeof $.fn === 'object' && typeof $(window).on === 'function') {
      $(window).off('pageLoad.rmps').on('pageLoad.rmps', function () {
        onRouteOrPageLoad();
      });
    }
  }

  function startShortLivedBodyObserver() {
    if (bodyObserver) return;

    // Only to detect when header/logo appears or gets swapped.
    bodyObserver = new MutationObserver(function () {
      // Once header exists and our UI is mounted, we can disconnect this.
      var header = getHeader();
      var logo = getLogo();

      if (header && (logo || isMobileLayout())) {
        ensureWrap();
        ensureMenu();
        scheduleReposition();

        // swap to a header-only observer (lighter)
        stopBodyObserver();
        startHeaderObserver();
        startLogoResizeObserver();
      }
    });

    bodyObserver.observe(document.body || document.documentElement, { childList: true, subtree: true });
  }

  function stopBodyObserver() {
    if (!bodyObserver) return;
    try {
      bodyObserver.disconnect();
    } catch (e) {}
    bodyObserver = null;
  }

  function startHeaderObserver() {
    if (headerObserver) return;

    var header = getHeader();
    if (!header) return;

    // Watch ONLY the header subtree for swaps that affect logo/left layout.
    headerObserver = new MutationObserver(function () {
      scheduleReposition();
    });

    headerObserver.observe(header, { childList: true, subtree: true });
  }

  function startLogoResizeObserver() {
    if (logoResizeObserver) return;

    var logo = getLogo();
    if (!logo || typeof ResizeObserver !== 'function') return;

    logoResizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(function () {
      scheduleReposition();
    });
    logoResizeObserver.observe(logo);
  }

  function startLowFreqPathPoll() {
    // Fallback only (in case pageLoad doesn't fire for some reason).
    // 1s is plenty and much gentler than 400ms.
    if (window.__rmpsPathPoll) return;

    window.__rmpsPathPoll = setInterval(function () {
      var p = normalizePath(location.pathname || '/');
      if (p !== lastPath) {
        lastPath = p;
        onRouteOrPageLoad();
      }
    }, 1000);
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  // Start
  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

  function init() {
    injectStylesOnce();
    ensureWrap();
    ensureMenu();
    scheduleReposition();

    // Resize is safe + expected
    window.addEventListener('resize', scheduleReposition, true);

    // Prefer ReadMe SPA event
    bindReadMePageLoad();

    // If header/logo isn't ready yet, watch briefly until it is.
    if (!getHeader() || (!getLogo() && !isMobileLayout())) {
      startShortLivedBodyObserver();
    } else {
      startHeaderObserver();
      startLogoResizeObserver();
    }

    // Gentle fallback for route changes
    startLowFreqPathPoll();

    // A couple delayed repositions for late fonts/layout
    setTimeout(scheduleReposition, 250);
    setTimeout(scheduleReposition, 1000);
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  // Start (hydration-safe + "can't miss" boot)
  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

  function boot() {
    if (window.__rmpsBooted) return;
    window.__rmpsBooted = true;

    // Delay a couple frames so React hydration/paint can settle
    requestAnimationFrame(function () {
      requestAnimationFrame(function () {
        init();
      });
    });
  }

  // 1) Hook ReadMe SPA event the way your file already does it (jQuery on window)
  (function bindBootToPageLoad() {
    var $ = window.jQuery || window.$;
    if ($ && typeof $(window).on === 'function') {
      // Boot on first pageLoad we see
      $(window).off('pageLoad.rmpsBoot').on('pageLoad.rmpsBoot', function () {
        boot();
      });
    }
  })();

  // 2) Boot on initial load (but also handle "script injected after load")
  if (document.readyState === 'complete') {
    setTimeout(boot, 0);
  } else {
    window.addEventListener('load', function () {
      setTimeout(boot, 0);
    }, { once: true });
  }

  // 3) Last-resort fallback in case none of the above fires for whatever reason
  setTimeout(boot, 2000);

})();

// ============================================================================
// Scroll position persistence (per route) — SAFER (no history monkey-patching)
// ============================================================================
(function () {
  "use strict";

  // Idempotent guard (safe to inject multiple times)
  if (window.__rmScrollPersistV2) return;
  window.__rmScrollPersistV2 = true;

  // ====== Config ======
  var STORAGE_KEY = "rm_scroll_positions_v2";
  var MAX_ENTRIES = 200;
  var RESTORE_MAX_FRAMES = 40; // ~40 frames max
  var RESTORE_FRAME_MS = 16;  // ~1 frame
  var SCROLLER_SELECTOR = ""; // optional: set if ReadMe scrolls inside a container

  // ====== Helpers ======
  function safeParse(str, fallback) {
    try { return JSON.parse(str); } catch (e) { return fallback; }
  }

  function getMap() {
    return safeParse(sessionStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY) || "{}", {});
  }

  function setMap(map) {
    try { sessionStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(map)); } catch (e) {}
  }

  function pageKey(loc) {
    return (loc.pathname || "") + (loc.search || "");
  }

  function now() {
    return Date.now();
  }

  function isSameOriginUrl(url) {
    try {
      var u = new URL(url, location.href);
      return u.origin === location.origin;
    } catch (e) {
      return false;
    }
  }

  // Try to find the element that actually scrolls (some layouts scroll a container, not window).
  function findScroller() {
    if (SCROLLER_SELECTOR) {
      var el = document.querySelector(SCROLLER_SELECTOR);
      if (el) return el;
    }

    // Prefer the document scrolling element (fast + standard)
    // If this returns <html> or <body>, treat as window scrolling.
    var se = document.scrollingElement;
    if (se && (se === document.documentElement || se === document.body)) return window;

    // Fallback heuristic: walk up from content to find a scrollable parent
    var anchor =
      document.querySelector(".markdown-body") ||
      document.querySelector("article") ||
      document.querySelector("main") ||
      document.querySelector('[role="main"]');

    var node = anchor;
    while (node && node !== document.body) {
      var cs = getComputedStyle(node);
      var scrollable =
        (cs.overflowY === "auto" || cs.overflowY === "scroll") &&
        node.scrollHeight > node.clientHeight + 10;
      if (scrollable) return node;
      node = node.parentElement;
    }

    return window;
  }

  var scroller = findScroller();
  var lastKey = pageKey(location);

  function getScrollTop() {
    if (scroller === window) return window.scrollY || 0;
    return scroller.scrollTop || 0;
  }

  function setScrollTop(y) {
    if (scroller === window) window.scrollTo(0, y);
    else scroller.scrollTop = y;
  }

  function prune(map) {
    var entries = Object.entries(map);
    if (entries.length <= MAX_ENTRIES) return map;

    entries
      .sort(function (a, b) { return (a[1].t || 0) - (b[1].t || 0); })
      .slice(0, entries.length - MAX_ENTRIES)
      .forEach(function (pair) { delete map[pair[0]]; });

    return map;
  }

  function savePositionForCurrentPage() {
    var key = pageKey(location);
    var map = getMap();
    map[key] = { y: getScrollTop(), t: now() };
    prune(map);
    setMap(map);
    lastKey = key;
  }

  function restorePositionForCurrentPage() {
    // If there's a hash, prefer anchor behavior (don't fight it)
    if (location.hash) return;

    var key = pageKey(location);
    var map = getMap();
    var entry = map[key];
    if (!entry || typeof entry.y !== "number") return;

    // scroller might have changed after route render
    scroller = findScroller();

    var targetY = entry.y;
    var frames = 0;
    var timer = null;

    function tick() {
      frames += 1;
      setScrollTop(targetY);

      var diff = Math.abs(getScrollTop() - targetY);
      if (diff < 2 || frames >= RESTORE_MAX_FRAMES) {
        if (timer) clearInterval(timer);
        timer = null;
      }
    }

    // Start after the browser has had a chance to paint the new content
    // (helps with SPA hydration / async renders)
    setTimeout(function () {
      tick();
      timer = setInterval(tick, RESTORE_FRAME_MS);
    }, 0);
  }

  // ====== Scroll listener (throttled) ======
  var scrollTicking = false;

  function onScroll() {
    if (scrollTicking) return;
    scrollTicking = true;
    setTimeout(function () {
      scrollTicking = false;
      savePositionForCurrentPage();
    }, 150);
  }

  function attachScrollListener() {
    scroller = findScroller();
    if (scroller === window) window.addEventListener("scroll", onScroll, { passive: true });
    else scroller.addEventListener("scroll", onScroll, { passive: true });
  }

  function detachScrollListener() {
    if (scroller === window) window.removeEventListener("scroll", onScroll);
    else if (scroller) scroller.removeEventListener("scroll", onScroll);
  }

  function reattachScrollListener() {
    detachScrollListener();
    attachScrollListener();
  }

  // ====== Save before navigation (non-invasive) ======
  // We *do not* prevent default or stop propagation.
  document.addEventListener(
    "click",
    function (e) {
      var a = e.target && e.target.closest ? e.target.closest("a[href]") : null;
      if (!a) return;

      var href = a.getAttribute("href") || "";
      var target = (a.getAttribute("target") || "").toLowerCase();
      var isModifiedClick = e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey || e.shiftKey || e.altKey || e.button !== 0;

      if (target === "_blank" || isModifiedClick) return;
      if (!href || href.startsWith("mailto:") || href.startsWith("tel:")) return;
      if (href.startsWith("#")) return;

      if (isSameOriginUrl(href)) savePositionForCurrentPage();
    },
    true
  );

  // Also save on page hide/unload (covers refresh/close + some SPA transitions)
  window.addEventListener("pagehide", savePositionForCurrentPage);
  document.addEventListener("visibilitychange", function () {
    if (document.visibilityState === "hidden") savePositionForCurrentPage();
  });

  // ====== SPA hooks ======
  function onRouteLikelyChanged() {
    // If the key changed, scroller might change too
    var key = pageKey(location);
    if (key !== lastKey) {
      lastKey = key;
      reattachScrollListener();
    }
    restorePositionForCurrentPage();
  }

  // Prefer ReadMe's SPA event if present
  (function bindReadMePageLoad() {
    var $ = window.jQuery || window.$;
    if ($ && typeof $(window).on === "function") {
      $(window).off("pageLoad.rmScrollV2").on("pageLoad.rmScrollV2", function () {
        // small delay so layout settles
        setTimeout(onRouteLikelyChanged, 0);
      });
    }
  })();

  // Back/forward
  window.addEventListener("popstate", function () {
    setTimeout(onRouteLikelyChanged, 0);
  });

  // Fallback: gentle path poll (avoids history monkey-patch)
  // Only needed if pageLoad isn't firing consistently.
  (function startPathPoll() {
    var last = pageKey(location);
    setInterval(function () {
      var cur = pageKey(location);
      if (cur !== last) {
        last = cur;
        onRouteLikelyChanged();
      }
    }, 1000);
  })();

  // ====== Init ======
  setTimeout(function () {
    attachScrollListener();
    restorePositionForCurrentPage();
  }, 0);
})();


// ============================================================================
// Card links: internal SPA navigation patch (cards + same-origin)
// ============================================================================
(function () {
  function isInternalHref(href) {
    if (!href) return false;
    if (href.startsWith("/")) return true;
    try {
      const url = new URL(href, window.location.origin);
      return url.origin === window.location.origin;
    } catch {
      return false;
    }
  }

  function spaNavigate(href) {
    // Convert to absolute path for pushState
    const url = href.startsWith("http")
      ? new URL(href)
      : new URL(href, window.location.origin);

    // Push + popstate is the most widely-supported "router nudge"
    window.history.pushState({}, "", url.pathname + url.search + url.hash);
    window.dispatchEvent(new PopStateEvent("popstate"));
  }

  document.addEventListener(
    "click",
    function (e) {
      if (e.button !== 0) return;
      if (e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey || e.shiftKey || e.altKey) return;

      // Look for the anchor the Card renders (or any anchor inside it)
      const a = e.target.closest("a[href]");
      if (!a) return;

      // Only intercept clicks that came from a Card (adjust selector if needed)
      const inCard = e.target.closest(".rm-Cards, .rm-Card, [data-testid*='card'], .Card");
      if (!inCard) return;

      const href = a.getAttribute("href") || "";
      if (!isInternalHref(href)) return;

      // If they *explicitly* wanted a new tab/window, don't interfere
      const target = (a.getAttribute("target") || "").toLowerCase();
      if (target && target !== "_self") return;

      e.preventDefault();
      e.stopPropagation();
      if (e.stopImmediatePropagation) e.stopImmediatePropagation();

      spaNavigate(href);
    },
    true
  );
})();

// Inline images: classify small icons (scoped to markdown + unique class)
(function () {
  const MIN_W = 30;
  const MAX_W = 120;
  const SCOPE_SEL = ".rm-Markdown"; // only doc content

  function classify(img) {
    if (!img || img.dataset.rmInlineIconClassified === "1") return;

    // Only touch doc content (skip header/nav/footer)
    if (!img.closest(SCOPE_SEL)) return;

    // Skip tables
    if (img.closest("table, thead, tbody, tfoot, tr, td, th")) return;

    img.dataset.rmInlineIconClassified = "1";

    const apply = () => {
      const w = img.naturalWidth || 0;
      if (w >= MIN_W && w <= MAX_W) img.classList.add("rm-inline-icon");
    };

    if (img.complete) apply();
    else img.addEventListener("load", apply, { once: true });
  }

  function scan(root) {
    const scope = root && root.querySelectorAll ? root : document;
    scope
      .querySelectorAll(
        `${SCOPE_SEL} span.img.lightbox img, ${SCOPE_SEL} p img, ${SCOPE_SEL} li img`
      )
      .forEach(classify);
  }

  scan(document);

  const obs = new MutationObserver((muts) => {
    for (const m of muts) {
      for (const n of m.addedNodes) {
        if (n.nodeType === 1) scan(n);
      }
    }
  });

  obs.observe(document.documentElement, { childList: true, subtree: true });
})();

// ============================================================================
// Internal links with target=_blank: guarantee new-tab behavior
//    - Targets anchors that already have target="_blank"
//    - Only intercepts plain left-clicks (no modifier keys)
//    - Only for same-origin / internal hrefs
//    - Uses capture phase to beat SPA/router handlers
// ============================================================================
(function () {
  // -----------------------------------------
  // Determine whether an href is internal
  // -----------------------------------------
  function isInternalHref(href) {
    if (!href) return false;

    // Relative internal paths
    if (href.startsWith("/")) return true;

    // Same-origin absolute URLs
    try {
      const url = new URL(href, window.location.origin);
      return url.origin === window.location.origin;
    } catch {
      return false;
    }
  }

  // -----------------------------------------
  // Click interceptor (capture phase)
  // -----------------------------------------
  document.addEventListener(
    "click",
    function (e) {
      // Left-click only
      if (e.button !== 0) return;

      // Respect user intent: if they're already using modifiers, don't interfere
      if (e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey || e.shiftKey || e.altKey) return;

      const a = e.target.closest('a[target="_blank"][href]');
      if (!a) return;

      const href = a.getAttribute("href") || "";
      if (!isInternalHref(href)) return;

      // Resolve to absolute URL (so window.open always gets a full URL)
      const url = href.startsWith("http")
        ? href
        : new URL(href, window.location.origin).href;

      // Stop ReadMe router / SPA click handling
      e.preventDefault();
      e.stopPropagation();
      if (e.stopImmediatePropagation) e.stopImmediatePropagation();

      // Guarantee new tab
      window.open(url, "_blank", "noopener,noreferrer");
    },
    true // capture phase is important to beat SPA handlers
  );
})();

(function () {
  const GUIDES_LABELS = ["guides", "documents"];

  const CHANGELOG_PREFIX = "/security/changelog";
  const CHANGELOG_DOCS_OVERRIDE_HREF = "/security/docs/supported-technologies";

  /* ------------------------------------------------
     Detect changelog route
  --------------------------------------------------*/
  function isOnSecurityChangelogRoute() {
    const path = (location.pathname || "").replace(/\/+$/, "");
    const prefix = CHANGELOG_PREFIX.replace(/\/+$/, "");
    return path === prefix || path.startsWith(prefix + "/");
  }

  function getNav() {
    return document.querySelector(".Header-subnavnVH8URdkgvEl");
  }

  function getTabs(nav) {
    return nav ? Array.from(nav.querySelectorAll(".Header-bottom-link_mobile")) : [];
  }

  /* ------------------------------------------------
     Apply GREEN highlight class without overriding ReadMe
     - Clears rm-forced-active
     - Adds rm-forced-active to ReadMe's current active tab
  --------------------------------------------------*/
  function mirrorReadMeActiveToGreen(tabs) {
    tabs.forEach((t) => t.classList.remove("rm-forced-active"));

    const active =
      tabs.find((a) => a.classList.contains("active")) ||
      tabs.find((a) => a.getAttribute("aria-current") === "page");

    if (active) active.classList.add("rm-forced-active");
  }

  /* ------------------------------------------------
     Highlight Release Notes tab (changelog override)
  --------------------------------------------------*/
  function highlightReleaseNotesTab(tabs) {
    tabs.forEach((t) => t.classList.remove("rm-forced-active"));

    const target =
      tabs.find((a) => a.getAttribute("href") === CHANGELOG_PREFIX + "/") ||
      tabs.find((a) => a.getAttribute("href") === CHANGELOG_PREFIX) ||
      tabs.find((a) => (a.textContent || "").trim().toLowerCase() === "release notes");

    if (target) target.classList.add("rm-forced-active");
  }

  /* ------------------------------------------------
     Force hard reload for Release Notes
  --------------------------------------------------*/
  function forceHardNavForReleaseNotes() {
    if (window.__rmHardNavReleaseNotesBound) return;
    window.__rmHardNavReleaseNotesBound = true;

    document.addEventListener(
      "click",
      function (e) {
        const a = e.target && e.target.closest ? e.target.closest("a[href]") : null;
        if (!a) return;

        const href = (a.getAttribute("href") || "").trim();
        if (href !== CHANGELOG_PREFIX && href !== CHANGELOG_PREFIX + "/") return;

        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();
        if (e.stopImmediatePropagation) e.stopImmediatePropagation();

        window.location.href = href;
      },
      true
    );
  }

  /* ------------------------------------------------
     Main nav sync
     - Normal routes: mirror ReadMe's active tab into rm-forced-active
     - Changelog route: override Guides href + force-highlight Release Notes
  --------------------------------------------------*/
  function updateTopNav() {
    const nav = getNav();
    if (!nav) return;

    const tabs = getTabs(nav);
    if (!tabs.length) return;

    if (isOnSecurityChangelogRoute()) {
      const guidesLink = tabs.find((a) =>
        GUIDES_LABELS.includes((a.textContent || "").trim().toLowerCase())
      );

      if (guidesLink) {
        guidesLink.setAttribute("href", CHANGELOG_DOCS_OVERRIDE_HREF);
      }

      highlightReleaseNotesTab(tabs);
      return;
    }

    // Default: do NOT change ReadMe state; just apply your green class to whatever is active
    mirrorReadMeActiveToGreen(tabs);
  }

  /* ------------------------------------------------
     Bind ReadMe SPA navigation
  --------------------------------------------------*/
  function bindPageLoadHandler() {
    const handler = () => {
      // ReadMe sometimes sets `.active` a tick later; run a couple times
      updateTopNav();
      setTimeout(updateTopNav, 50);
      setTimeout(updateTopNav, 250);
    };

    if (window.$ && typeof $(window).on === "function") {
      $(window).off("pageLoad.rmTopNav").on("pageLoad.rmTopNav", handler);
    } else if (window.jQuery && typeof window.jQuery(window).on === "function") {
      window.jQuery(window).off("pageLoad.rmTopNav").on("pageLoad.rmTopNav", handler);
    }
  }

  forceHardNavForReleaseNotes();
  bindPageLoadHandler();
  updateTopNav(); // initial
})();

// ============================================================================
// Top-nav click: force full navigation for Guides/Documents
//    - Prevent ReadMe internal router from intercepting
//    - Uses href already set by the script above
// ============================================================================
(function () {
  const GUIDES_LABELS = ["guides", "documents"];

  document.addEventListener("click", function (e) {
    // Only care about primary (left) clicks
    if (e.button !== 0) return;

    // Respect modifier keys (new tab / new window)
    if (e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey || e.shiftKey || e.altKey) return;

    const link = e.target.closest(".Header-bottom-link_mobile");
    if (!link) return;

    const label = link.textContent.trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!GUIDES_LABELS.includes(label)) return;

    // At this point, this is a plain left-click on the GUIDES/DOCUMENTS tab
    const targetHref = link.getAttribute("href");
    if (!targetHref) return;

    // Stop ReadMe's internal router from handling this click
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();

    // Force navigation to whatever href we've already set via our other script
    window.location.href = targetHref;
  });
})();

// ============================================================================
// Sidebar: active-path enforcer (SPA-safe)
//    - Ensures all ancestors of the active page are expanded
//    - Allows temporary user collapse (data-user-collapsed-until)
//    - Resets collapse flags when route truly changes
// ============================================================================
$(window).on("pageLoad.sidebarEnforcer", function (e, state) {
  // ==============================
  // ACTIVE PATH ENFORCER (SPA-safe)
  // - Opens the full chain to the current active page.
  // - Respects manual collapses for sections and parent-page <li> groups.
  // - Clears manual-collapse flags carefully on SPA route change.
  // ==============================

  const SIDEBAR_SECTION_SEL = ".rm-Sidebar-section";
  const PARENT_LINK_SEL =
    "a.Sidebar-link_parent, a.rm-Sidebar-link.Sidebar-link_parent";
  const EXPAND_BTN_SEL = ".Sidebar-link-buttonWrapper3hnFHNku8_BJ";
  const ACTIVE_SEL =
    ".rm-Sidebar-link[aria-current='page'], .rm-Sidebar-link.active";
  const USER_COLLAPSE_GRACE = 90_000; // 90 seconds

  if (window.__sidebarEnforcerInterval) {
    clearInterval(window.__sidebarEnforcerInterval);
    window.__sidebarEnforcerInterval = null;
  }

  // Only define once
  window.__lastActiveKey = window.__lastActiveKey || undefined;

  function isUserCollapsed(el) {
    if (!el) return false;
    const until = parseInt(
      el.getAttribute("data-user-collapsed-until") || "0",
      10
    );
    if (!until) return false;
    if (Date.now() < until) return true;
    el.removeAttribute("data-user-collapsed-until");
    return false;
  }

  function ensureLiParentOpen(li) {
    if (!li) return;
    if (isUserCollapsed(li)) return;

    const parentA = li.querySelector(`:scope > ${PARENT_LINK_SEL}`);
    if (!parentA) return;

    const btn = parentA.querySelector(EXPAND_BTN_SEL);
    const aria = btn && btn.getAttribute("aria-expanded");

    if (btn && aria !== "true") {
      btn.click();
    }

    li.classList.add("subnav-expanded");
  }

  function ensureSectionOpen(sectionEl) {
    if (!sectionEl) return;
    if (isUserCollapsed(sectionEl)) return;

    sectionEl.classList.add("expanded");

    const topBtn = sectionEl.querySelector(`:scope > a ${EXPAND_BTN_SEL}`);
    if (topBtn && topBtn.getAttribute("aria-expanded") !== "true") {
      topBtn.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
    }
  }

  function openAllAncestorsForActiveLink(activeLink) {
    let el = activeLink;
    while (el && el !== document.body) {
      if (el.tagName === "LI") ensureLiParentOpen(el);
      if (el.classList && el.classList.contains("rm-Sidebar-section")) {
        ensureSectionOpen(el);
      }
      el = el.parentElement;
    }
  }

  function getActiveKey() {
    const a =
      document.querySelector(".rm-Sidebar-link[aria-current='page']") ||
      document.querySelector(".rm-Sidebar-link.active");
    if (!a) return undefined;
    try {
      const url = new URL(a.href, location.origin);
      return url.pathname + url.search + "|" + (a.textContent || "").trim();
    } catch {
      return (
        (a.getAttribute("href") || "") + "|" + (a.textContent || "").trim()
      );
    }
  }

  function enforceOpenForAllActives() {
    const currentKey = getActiveKey();

    // Only reset collapse flags after delay AND if key really changed
    if (currentKey && currentKey !== window.__lastActiveKey) {
      const thisKey = currentKey;
      setTimeout(() => {
        if (getActiveKey() === thisKey) {
          document
            .querySelectorAll("[data-user-collapsed-until]")
            .forEach((el) => el.removeAttribute("data-user-collapsed-until"));
        }
      }, 400); // short grace window to allow manual collapse

      window.__lastActiveKey = currentKey;
    }

    const actives = document.querySelectorAll(ACTIVE_SEL);
    if (!actives.length) return;

    actives.forEach((active) => openAllAncestorsForActiveLink(active));
  }

  enforceOpenForAllActives();
  setTimeout(enforceOpenForAllActives, 150);
  setTimeout(enforceOpenForAllActives, 400);

  window.__sidebarEnforcerInterval = setInterval(enforceOpenForAllActives, 1000);
});

// ============================================================================
// Sidebar: manual collapse controls (temporary grace)
//    - Section heading click toggles section expanded state
//    - Parent-page expand/collapse button click records temporary user collapse
// ============================================================================
/* SECTION heading: allow manual collapse of an active section (temporary) */
$(document)
  .off("click.sidebarToggle")
  .on("click.sidebarToggle", ".rm-Sidebar-heading", function () {
    const $section = $(this).closest(".rm-Sidebar-section");
    const wasExpanded = $section.hasClass("expanded");
    $section.toggleClass("expanded");
    const nowExpanded = $section.hasClass("expanded");

    const containsActive =
      $section.find(
        ".rm-Sidebar-link[aria-current='page'], .rm-Sidebar-link.active"
      ).length > 0;

    if (wasExpanded && !nowExpanded && containsActive) {
      $section.attr("data-user-collapsed-until", Date.now() + 90_000);
    }
    if (nowExpanded) {
      $section.removeAttr("data-user-collapsed-until");
    }

    if (nowExpanded && !wasExpanded && containsActive) {
      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        requestAnimationFrame(() =>
          scrollActiveNearTop({ padding: 16, smooth: true })
        );
      });
    }
  });

/* PARENT PAGE expand/collapse button: allow manual collapse of the active parent <li> */
$(document)
  .off("click.sidebarParentToggle")
  .on(
    "click.sidebarParentToggle",
    ".Sidebar-link-buttonWrapper3hnFHNku8_BJ",
    function (e) {
      const li = this.closest("li");
      if (!li) return;

      const containsActive = !!li.querySelector(
        ".rm-Sidebar-link[aria-current='page'], .rm-Sidebar-link.active"
      );

      setTimeout(() => {
        const expanded = this.getAttribute("aria-expanded") === "true";

        if (containsActive && !expanded) {
          li.setAttribute("data-user-collapsed-until", Date.now() + 90_000);
        } else if (expanded) {
          li.removeAttribute("data-user-collapsed-until");
        }
      }, 0);
    }
  );

// ============================================================================
// TOC: rebuild from headings (DOM order) + collapsible sections
//    - Reads headings from content in DOM order
//    - Builds hierarchy using heading level stack (parentId)
//    - Replaces TOC UL with a freshly built ordered tree
//    - Preserves expand/collapse state + active link highlight when possible
//    - Re-runs on DOM mutations with rAF throttle
// ============================================================================
(function () {
  // ------------------------------------
  // Helpers
  // ------------------------------------
  function getHashIdFromHref(href) {
    if (!href) return null;
    const i = href.indexOf("#");
    if (i === -1) return null;
    const id = href.slice(i + 1).trim();
    return id ? id : null;
  }

  function isRealHashLink(a) {
    const href = a && a.getAttribute && a.getAttribute("href");
    if (!href) return false;
    if (href === "#") return false;
    return href.includes("#") && getHashIdFromHref(href) !== null;
  }

  function isTocReady(tocNav) {
    const rootUl = tocNav && tocNav.querySelector(".toc-children > ul");
    if (!rootUl) return false;
    return !!rootUl.querySelector('a[href*="#"]:not([href="#"])');
  }

  function getContentRoot() {
    return (
      document.querySelector('.rm-Markdown[data-testid="RDMD"]') ||
      document.querySelector(".rm-Markdown") ||
      document
    );
  }

  function extractHeadingTitle(headingEl) {
    if (!headingEl) return "";
    const textEl = headingEl.querySelector(".heading-text") || headingEl;

    const clone = textEl.cloneNode(true);

    clone
      .querySelectorAll("button, .rdmd-code-copy, .heading-anchor-icon, svg, .icon, i")
      .forEach((n) => n.remove());

    return (clone.textContent || "").replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim();
  }

  function captureExpandedState(tocNav) {
    const expandedById = {};
    tocNav.querySelectorAll(".toc-item-header").forEach((header) => {
      const a = header.querySelector('a[href*="#"]');
      const t = header.querySelector(".toc-toggle");
      if (!a || !t || !isRealHashLink(a)) return;

      const id = getHashIdFromHref(a.getAttribute("href") || "");
      if (!id) return;

      expandedById[id] = t.getAttribute("aria-expanded") === "true";
    });

    const activeHref =
      tocNav.querySelector(".is-active-toc-link")?.getAttribute("href") || null;

    return { expandedById, activeHref };
  }

  // ------------------------------------
  // Build heading list (in document order) + parent relationships
  // ------------------------------------
  function readHeadingsInOrder() {
    const contentRoot = getContentRoot();
    const anchors = Array.from(contentRoot.querySelectorAll(".heading-anchor[id]"));
    if (!anchors.length) return [];

    const headings = anchors
      .map((anchor) => {
        const id = anchor.id;
        const headingEl = anchor.closest("h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6");
        if (!headingEl) return null;

        const level = parseInt(headingEl.tagName.slice(1), 10);
        const title = extractHeadingTitle(headingEl);

        if (!id || !title || !level) return null;
        return { id, level, title };
      })
      .filter(Boolean);

    if (!headings.length) return [];

    // Compute parentId by stack (standard heading hierarchy)
    const stack = []; // [{id, level}]
    headings.forEach((h) => {
      while (stack.length && stack[stack.length - 1].level >= h.level) {
        stack.pop();
      }
      h.parentId = stack.length ? stack[stack.length - 1].id : null;
      stack.push({ id: h.id, level: h.level });
    });

    return headings;
  }

  // ------------------------------------
  // Render: replace TOC children UL with ordered tree
  // ------------------------------------
  function renderTocFromHeadings(tocNav, headings, restoreState) {
    const rootUl = tocNav.querySelector(".toc-children > ul");
    if (!rootUl) return;

    // Build children map in order
    const byId = {};
    headings.forEach((h) => (byId[h.id] = h));

    const childrenByParent = {};
    headings.forEach((h) => {
      const key = h.parentId || "__root__";
      if (!childrenByParent[key]) childrenByParent[key] = [];
      childrenByParent[key].push(h);
    });

    // Clear existing TOC items
    while (rootUl.firstChild) rootUl.removeChild(rootUl.firstChild);

    function buildList(parentKey, ul) {
      const kids = childrenByParent[parentKey] || [];
      kids.forEach((h) => {
        const li = document.createElement("li");

        const a = document.createElement("a");
        a.href = "#" + h.id;
        a.textContent = h.title;

        li.appendChild(a);

        const childList = childrenByParent[h.id];
        if (childList && childList.length) {
          const subUl = document.createElement("ul");
          li.appendChild(subUl);
          buildList(h.id, subUl);
        }

        ul.appendChild(li);
      });
    }

    buildList("__root__", rootUl);

    // Restore active state if we had one
    if (restoreState && restoreState.activeHref) {
      const match = tocNav.querySelector(
        `.toc-children a[href="${CSS.escape(restoreState.activeHref)}"]`
      );
      if (match) match.classList.add("is-active-toc-link");
    }
  }

  // ------------------------------------
  // Collapsible toggles (idempotent)
  // ------------------------------------
  function ensureCollapsible(tocNav, restoreState) {
    const expandedById = (restoreState && restoreState.expandedById) || {};

    const nestedLists = tocNav.querySelectorAll(".toc-children li > ul");

    nestedLists.forEach(function (ul) {
      const parentLi = ul.parentElement;
      if (!parentLi) return;

      const link = parentLi.querySelector(':scope > a[href*="#"]');
      if (!link) return;

      const parentId = getHashIdFromHref(link.getAttribute("href") || "");

      parentLi.classList.add("toc-has-children");
      ul.classList.add("toc-sublist");

      // Create or reuse header wrapper
      let header = parentLi.querySelector(":scope > .toc-item-header");
      if (!header) {
        header = document.createElement("div");
        header.className = "toc-item-header";
        parentLi.insertBefore(header, link);
      }

      // Move link into header if needed
      if (link.parentElement === parentLi) header.appendChild(link);

      // Create toggle if missing
      let toggle = header.querySelector(":scope > .toc-toggle");
      if (!toggle) {
        toggle = document.createElement("button");
        toggle.type = "button";
        toggle.className = "toc-toggle";
        header.appendChild(toggle);

        toggle.addEventListener("click", function (e) {
          e.preventDefault();
          const isExpanded = toggle.getAttribute("aria-expanded") === "true";
          toggle.setAttribute("aria-expanded", String(!isExpanded));
          toggle.textContent = isExpanded ? "+" : "−";
          ul.style.display = isExpanded ? "none" : "block";
        });
      }

      // Apply restored expanded state if available; otherwise default collapsed
      const shouldExpand =
        parentId && Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(expandedById, parentId)
          ? !!expandedById[parentId]
          : false;

      toggle.setAttribute("aria-expanded", shouldExpand ? "true" : "false");
      toggle.textContent = shouldExpand ? "−" : "+";
      ul.style.display = shouldExpand ? "block" : "none";
    });
  }

  // ------------------------------------
  // Apply (safe to run repeatedly)
  // ------------------------------------
  function applyTocEnhancements(tocNav) {
    if (!tocNav) return;
    if (!isTocReady(tocNav)) return;

    const headings = readHeadingsInOrder();
    if (!headings.length) return;

    const sig = headings.map((h) => `${h.id}:${h.level}:${h.parentId || ""}`).join("|");

    // If nothing changed, just make sure collapsibles exist and bail
    if (tocNav.dataset.tocSig === sig) {
      ensureCollapsible(tocNav, captureExpandedState(tocNav));
      tocNav.dataset.tocCollapsibleInitialized = "true";
      tocNav.setAttribute("data-toc-collapsible-initialized", "true");
      return;
    }

    const restoreState = captureExpandedState(tocNav);

    // Rebuild TOC in correct document order + hierarchy
    renderTocFromHeadings(tocNav, headings, restoreState);

    // Add toggles / collapse behavior
    ensureCollapsible(tocNav, restoreState);

    tocNav.dataset.tocSig = sig;
    tocNav.dataset.tocCollapsibleInitialized = "true";
    tocNav.setAttribute("data-toc-collapsible-initialized", "true");
  }

  function scanForTocs() {
    const navs = document.querySelectorAll('nav[aria-label="Table of contents"]');
    navs.forEach(applyTocEnhancements);
  }

  if (document.readyState === "loading") {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", scanForTocs);
  } else {
    scanForTocs();
  }

  let rafPending = false;
  const observer = new MutationObserver(() => {
    if (rafPending) return;
    rafPending = true;
    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      rafPending = false;
      scanForTocs();
    });
  });

  observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
})();

// ============================================================================
// TOC: highlight clicked anchor (click-only)
//    - Adds .is-active-toc-link to the clicked TOC link
//    - Clears prior active states within that TOC nav
// ============================================================================
(function () {
  const TOC_SELECTOR = 'nav[aria-label="Table of contents"]';

  document.addEventListener("click", function (e) {
    const anchor = e.target.closest(`${TOC_SELECTOR} a[href*="#"]`);
    if (!anchor) return;

    const href = anchor.getAttribute("href") || "";
    if (href === "#") return;

    const toc = anchor.closest(TOC_SELECTOR);
    if (!toc) return;

    const links = toc.querySelectorAll('a[href*="#"]');
    links.forEach((link) => link.classList.remove("is-active-toc-link"));

    anchor.classList.add("is-active-toc-link");
  });
})();

// ============================================================================
// TOC header text = Page H1 (observer-based, no initial hiding)
// ============================================================================
(function () {
  "use strict";

  var scheduled = false;
  var lastApplied = "";

  function getH1Text() {
    var h1 = document.querySelector("#content-head h1");
    return h1 ? (h1.textContent || "").trim() : "";
  }

  function getTocHeader() {
    return document.querySelector("section.content-toc a.tocHeader");
  }

  function applyTitle() {
    var title = getH1Text();
    var tocHeader = getTocHeader();
    if (!title || !tocHeader) return false;

    // If it's already correct, do nothing
    var currentText = (tocHeader.textContent || "").trim();
    if (currentText.indexOf(title) !== -1 && title === lastApplied) return true;

    // Preserve icon node if present
    var icon = tocHeader.querySelector("i");
    while (tocHeader.firstChild) tocHeader.removeChild(tocHeader.firstChild);
    if (icon) tocHeader.appendChild(icon);
    tocHeader.appendChild(document.createTextNode(" " + title));

    lastApplied = title;
    return true;
  }

  function scheduleUpdate() {
    if (scheduled) return;
    scheduled = true;

    // Let the SPA/React commit finish, then apply
    requestAnimationFrame(function () {
      scheduled = false;

      // Try a few times quickly to catch late hydration/re-renders
      var tries = 0;
      var maxTries = 30; // ~1.5s total
      var t = setInterval(function () {
        tries++;
        if (applyTitle() || tries >= maxTries) clearInterval(t);
      }, 50);
    });
  }

  // Observe DOM changes (SPA re-renders)
  var mo = new MutationObserver(function () {
    // Only schedule when either target exists / is being updated
    if (document.querySelector("#content-head") || document.querySelector("section.content-toc")) {
      scheduleUpdate();
    }
  });
  mo.observe(document.documentElement, { childList: true, subtree: true });

  // SPA navigation hooks
  function hookHistory(method) {
    var orig = history[method];
    if (!orig) return;
    history[method] = function () {
      var ret = orig.apply(this, arguments);
      scheduleUpdate();
      return ret;
    };
  }
  hookHistory("pushState");
  hookHistory("replaceState");
  window.addEventListener("popstate", scheduleUpdate);

  // Initial
  scheduleUpdate();
})();

// Fix "&amp;" showing up in Search modal project names (e.g. "Governance &amp; Lifecycle")
(function () {
  var MODAL_ID = 'AppSearch';
  var processedAttr = 'data-amp-fixed';

  function decodeHtmlOnce(str) {
    // Cheap decode without touching the rest of the DOM
    var ta = document.createElement('textarea');
    ta.innerHTML = str;
    return ta.value;
  }

  function decodeUntilStable(str, maxPasses) {
    var prev = str;
    for (var i = 0; i < (maxPasses || 3); i++) {
      var next = decodeHtmlOnce(prev);
      if (next === prev) break;
      prev = next;
    }
    return prev;
  }

  function fixNode(el) {
    if (!el || el.nodeType !== 1) return;
    if (el.getAttribute(processedAttr) === '1') return;

    // Only fix if it actually contains the bad sequence (avoids useless writes)
    var txt = el.textContent;
    if (!txt || (txt.indexOf('&amp;') === -1 && txt.indexOf('&amp') === -1)) {
      el.setAttribute(processedAttr, '1');
      return;
    }

    var fixed = decodeUntilStable(txt, 3);
    if (fixed !== txt) el.textContent = fixed;

    el.setAttribute(processedAttr, '1');
  }

  function scan(container) {
    if (!container) return;

    // Target ONLY the project label span inside results
    var nodes = container.querySelectorAll('[id="' + MODAL_ID + '"] .SearchResults-result-project1MVNLms0YfYH');
    for (var i = 0; i < nodes.length; i++) fixNode(nodes[i]);
  }

  function getModalRoot() {
    return document.getElementById(MODAL_ID);
  }

  var observer = null;

  function start() {
    if (observer) return;

    // Initial scan if already open
    scan(document);

    observer = new MutationObserver(function (mutations) {
      // If modal is gone, stop observing (prevents background cost)
      if (!getModalRoot()) {
        stop();
        return;
      }

      for (var i = 0; i < mutations.length; i++) {
        var m = mutations[i];
        if (!m.addedNodes || !m.addedNodes.length) continue;

        for (var j = 0; j < m.addedNodes.length; j++) {
          var n = m.addedNodes[j];
          if (!n || n.nodeType !== 1) continue;

          // If a result row (or subtree) was added, only scan within that subtree
          if (n.matches && n.matches('.SearchResults-result14C9m0b6kNXJ, .SearchResults-list27N2BCuUtAdm, #' + MODAL_ID)) {
            scan(n);
          } else if (n.querySelector) {
            var inner = n.querySelector('.SearchResults-result-project1MVNLms0YfYH');
            if (inner) scan(n);
          }
        }
      }
    });

    // Observe the whole document, but we early-exit + only act on relevant added nodes
    observer.observe(document.documentElement, { childList: true, subtree: true });
  }

  function stop() {
    if (!observer) return;
    observer.disconnect();
    observer = null;
  }

  // Kick off
  start();

  // Optional: expose toggles if you want
  window.__rmFixSearchAmp = { start: start, stop: stop };
})();


// ── Interior TOC survey widget ───────────────────────────────────────────────
(function () {
  const WIDGET_ID = 'jfrog-survey-widget';

  const css = `
    #${WIDGET_ID} {
      all: revert;
      display: block;
      margin-top: 24px;
    }
    #${WIDGET_ID} * {
      all: revert;
      box-sizing: border-box;
    }
    #${WIDGET_ID} .survey-widget {
      display: flex !important;
      flex-direction: column !important;
      align-items: flex-start !important;
      padding: 20px !important;
      width: 100% !important;
      height: auto !important;
      background: #D8E6ED !important;
      box-shadow: 0px 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1) !important;
      border-radius: 12px !important;
      margin: 0 !important;
    }
    #${WIDGET_ID} .survey-inner {
      display: flex !important;
      flex-direction: column !important;
      justify-content: center !important;
      align-items: center !important;
      gap: 16px !important;
      width: 100% !important;
      height: auto !important;
      padding: 8px 0 !important;
    }
    #${WIDGET_ID} .survey-text {
      display: flex !important;
      flex-direction: column !important;
      gap: 8px !important;
      width: 100% !important;
      margin: 0 !important;
      padding: 0 !important;
    }
    #${WIDGET_ID} .survey-title {
      font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif !important;
      font-weight: 600 !important;
      font-size: 14px !important;
      line-height: 22px !important;
      color: #000 !important;
      margin: 0 !important;
      padding: 0 !important;
      width: 100% !important;
    }
    #${WIDGET_ID} .survey-subtitle {
      font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif !important;
      font-weight: 400 !important;
      font-size: 13px !important;
      line-height: 22px !important;
      color: #414857 !important;
      margin: 0 !important;
      padding: 0 !important;
      width: 100% !important;
    }
    #${WIDGET_ID} .vote-btn {
      display: inline-flex !important;
      align-items: center !important;
      justify-content: center !important;
      position: relative !important;
      padding: 12px 32px !important;
      width: auto !important;
      height: 44px !important;
      background: #111821 !important;
      border: 1px solid #111821 !important;
      border-radius: 50px !important;
      cursor: pointer !important;
      text-decoration: none !important;
      overflow: hidden !important;
      transition: border-color 0.2s !important;
    }
    #${WIDGET_ID} .vote-btn .vote-label {
      transition: transform 0.2s !important;
    }
    #${WIDGET_ID} .vote-btn:hover .vote-label {
      transform: translateX(-4px) !important;
      color: #3DD068 !important;
    }
    #${WIDGET_ID} .vote-btn:hover {
      border-color: #3DD068 !important;
    }
    #${WIDGET_ID} .vote-btn:hover .vote-label {
      color: #3DD068 !important;
    }
    #${WIDGET_ID} .vote-btn:hover .vote-chevron {
      display: inline-block !important;
    }
    #${WIDGET_ID} .vote-label {
      font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif !important;
      font-weight: 600 !important;
      font-size: 14px !important;
      line-height: 20px !important;
      color: #fff !important;
      white-space: nowrap !important;
      margin: 0 !important;
      padding: 0 !important;
    }
    #${WIDGET_ID} .vote-chevron {
      position: absolute !important;
      right: 16px !important;
      top: 52% !important;
      transform: translateY(-50%) !important;
      opacity: 0 !important;
      width: 14px !important;
      height: 14px !important;
      transition: opacity 0.2s !important;
      display: block !important;
    }
    #${WIDGET_ID} .vote-btn:hover .vote-chevron {
      opacity: 1 !important;
    }
    #${WIDGET_ID} .vote-chevron polyline {
      stroke: #3DD068 !important;
      stroke-width: 2.5 !important;
      stroke-linecap: round !important;
      stroke-linejoin: round !important;
      fill: none !important;
    }
  `;

  const widgetHTML = `
    <div id="${WIDGET_ID}">
      <style>${css}</style>
      <div class="survey-widget">
        <div class="survey-inner">
          <div class="survey-text">
            <p class="survey-title">How satisfied are you with JFrog's Help Center?</p>
            <p class="survey-subtitle">Take 1 minute to help us improve</p>
          </div>
          <a href="#" class="vote-btn" onclick="if(window.Appcues) Appcues.track('Survey click', { location: 'project page' }); return false;">
            <span class="vote-label">Share Feedback</span>
            <svg class="vote-chevron" width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
              <polyline points="9,5 17,12 9,19" stroke="#3DD068" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
            </svg>
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;

  function inject() {
    const nav = document.querySelector('section.content-toc nav');
    if (!nav) return;

    const existing = document.getElementById(WIDGET_ID);
    if (existing) existing.remove();

    observer.disconnect();
    nav.insertAdjacentHTML('afterend', widgetHTML);
    const w = document.getElementById(WIDGET_ID);
    if (w) w.style.cssText += 'opacity: 1;';
    observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
  }

  let timer;
  const observer = new MutationObserver(() => { clearTimeout(timer); timer = setTimeout(inject, 50); });
  observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });

  inject();
})();


// ── Mobile drawer survey widget ──────────────────────────────────────────────

function injectSurveyWidget() {
  if (document.getElementById('jf-imh-survey')) return;
  const isHomepage = location.pathname === '/' || location.pathname === '';
  const linksWrap = isHomepage
    ? document.querySelector('.jf-drawer-links-wrap')
    : document.querySelector('.jf-imh-links-wrap');
  if (!linksWrap) return;

  if (!document.getElementById('jf-imh-survey-styles')) {
    const style = document.createElement('style');
    style.id = 'jf-imh-survey-styles';
    style.textContent = `
      #jf-imh-survey {
        margin: 24px 0 8px;
        background: #CCD8F1;
        border-radius: 12px;
        padding: 20px;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 16px;
        box-sizing: border-box;
        width: 100%;
        box-shadow: 0px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
      }
      #jf-imh-survey .jf-sv-title {
        font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif !important;
        font-weight: 600 !important;
        font-size: 16px !important;
        line-height: 22px !important;
        color: #000 !important;
        margin: 0 !important;
        padding: 0 !important;
        white-space: normal !important;
        word-break: normal !important;
      }
      #jf-imh-survey .jf-sv-subtitle {
        font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif !important;
        font-weight: 400 !important;
        font-size: 13px !important;
        line-height: 20px !important;
        color: #414857 !important;
        margin: 4px 0 0 !important;
        padding: 0 !important;
      }
      #jf-imh-survey .jf-sv-btn-wrap {
        display: flex !important;
        justify-content: center !important;
        width: 100% !important;
      }
      #jf-imh-survey .jf-sv-btn {
        display: inline-flex !important;
        align-items: center !important;
        justify-content: center !important;
        width: auto !important;
        max-width: 100% !important;
        height: 44px !important;
        padding: 12px 32px !important;
        background: #111821 !important;
        border: 1px solid #111821 !important;
        border-radius: 50px !important;
        font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif !important;
        font-weight: 700 !important;
        font-size: 15px !important;
        line-height: 20px !important;
        color: #fff !important;
        text-align: center !important;
        text-decoration: none !important;
        cursor: pointer !important;
        white-space: nowrap !important;
        box-sizing: border-box !important;
        transition: border-color 0.2s !important;
        flex-shrink: 0 !important;
      }
      #jf-imh-survey .jf-sv-btn:hover {
        border-color: #3DD068 !important;
      }
    `;
    document.head.appendChild(style);
  }

  const locationLabel = isHomepage ? 'home' : 'mobile menu';

  linksWrap.insertAdjacentHTML('afterend', `
    <div id="jf-imh-survey">
      <div>
        <p class="jf-sv-title">How satisfied are you with JFrog's Help Center?</p>
        <p class="jf-sv-subtitle">Take 1 minute to help us improve</p>
      </div>
      <div class="jf-sv-btn-wrap"><a href="#" class="jf-sv-btn" onclick="if(window.Appcues) Appcues.track('Survey click', { location: '${locationLabel}' }); return false;">Share Feedback</a></div>
    </div>
  `);
}

if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', injectSurveyWidget);
} else {
  injectSurveyWidget();
}

// Re-inject on SPA route changes + hamburger click
(function () {
  let lastUrl = location.pathname + location.search + location.hash;
  setInterval(function () {
    const now = location.pathname + location.search + location.hash;
    if (now !== lastUrl) {
      lastUrl = now;
      document.getElementById('jf-imh-survey')?.remove();
      injectSurveyWidget();
    }
  }, 300);

  document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
    if (e.target.closest('#jf-imh-menu-btn, #jf-mobile-menu-btn, #jf-mobile-drawer-open, [aria-label="Open menu"]')) {
      setTimeout(injectSurveyWidget, 50);
    }
  });
})();

<iframe src="https://gtm.jfrog.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T6MF8M"
height="0" width="0" style="display:none;visibility:hidden"></iframe>
