<style>
  /* =========================================================
     Ask AI chat: layout + disclaimer (UNDER search/input)
     - Uses both exact classnames (current) + prefix selectors (future-proof)
     ========================================================= */

  /* Make the whole chat area a column (safe default) */
  .rm-AskAi-chat .ChatInterface1-QcH4OG4Jqd,
  .rm-AskAi-chat .ChatInterface-container1efYRxivTO2b,
  .rm-AskAi-chat [class^="ChatInterface1-"],
  .rm-AskAi-chat [class^="ChatInterface-container"] {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    height: 100%;
    min-height: 0;
  }

  /* Disclaimer (now styled + naturally placed under the input) */
  .rm-ai-disclaimer {
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 20px;
    padding: 10px;
    margin: 5px;



    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  /* Dark mode safety (covers common patterns) */
  html.dark .rm-ai-disclaimer,
  html[data-color-mode="dark"] .rm-ai-disclaimer,
  body.dark .rm-ai-disclaimer {
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
    border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18);
  }

  /* Messages area scroll */
  .rm-AskAi-chat .ChatInterface-emptyChat30Oe0OpCASL2,
  .rm-AskAi-chat .ChatInterface-chat30Oe0OpCASL2,
  .rm-AskAi-chat [class^="ChatInterface-emptyChat"],
  .rm-AskAi-chat [class^="ChatInterface-chat"] {
    flex: 1 1 auto;
    min-height: 0;
    overflow: auto;
    background: #fff;
  }

  @media (max-width: 680px) {
    /* ✅ IMPORTANT: stop absolute positioning so it can sit under the input */
    .rm-ai-disclaimer {
      position: static !important;
      bottom: auto !important;
      margin: 10px 12px 0;
    }

    /* Undo prior mobile hacks that fight "under the search/input" */
    div[class^="ChatInterface-inputArea"] {
      margin-top: 0 !important;
    }

    div[class^="EmptyChatOptions-inputWrapper"] {
      position: static !important;
      bottom: auto !important;
    }

    /* Existing specific selector + a prefix-based fallback */
    .ContentWithOwlbot_with-sidebar2GrCj6YAOyV6 .ContentWithOwlbot-sidebar1cgUrK3uYZLh,
    [class^="ContentWithOwlbot_with-sidebar"] [class^="ContentWithOwlbot-sidebar"] {
      border: 0;
      border-radius: 0;
      -webkit-box-shadow: none;
      box-shadow: none;
      -webkit-box-flex: 0;
      -ms-flex: 0 0 100%;
      flex: 0 0 100%;
      position: relative;
      right: 0;
      top: 30px;
      width: 100%;
    }
  }
</style>

<script>
  // =========================================================
  // Ask AI disclaimer injection (SPA-safe + placed UNDER input)
  // - Inserts directly after the Ask AI input wrapper (empty state)
  // - Also handles chat state (input area)
  // - Moves existing disclaimer if it ended up elsewhere
  // =========================================================
  (function () {
    "use strict";

    // Idempotent guard
    if (window.__rmAskAiDisclaimerV3) return;
    window.__rmAskAiDisclaimerV3 = true;

    var DISCLAIMER_ID = "rm-ai-disclaimer";

    var disclaimerText =
      "AI can get things wrong, so double check any info or code. You're responsible for verifying results are accurate and fit your needs before taking action. Do not input sensitive information.";

    function getAskAiRoot() {
      return document.querySelector(".rm-AskAi-chat");
    }

    function findInsertionAnchor(root) {
      if (!root) return null;

      // ✅ Empty state input wrapper (your screenshot shows this)
      var emptyInput =
        root.querySelector(".EmptyChatOptions-inputWrapper1QdyF__AmKN8") ||
        root.querySelector('[class^="EmptyChatOptions-inputWrapper"]');

      if (emptyInput) return emptyInput;

      // ✅ Chat state input area
      var chatInput =
        root.querySelector('[class^="ChatInterface-inputArea"]') ||
        root.querySelector('[class*="ChatInterface-inputArea"]');

      if (chatInput) return chatInput;

      return null;
    }

    function ensureDisclaimer() {
      var root = getAskAiRoot();
      if (!root) return;

      var anchor = findInsertionAnchor(root);
      if (!anchor || !anchor.parentNode) return;

      var el = document.getElementById(DISCLAIMER_ID);

      if (!el) {
        el = document.createElement("div");
        el.id = DISCLAIMER_ID;
        el.className = "rm-ai-disclaimer";
        el.textContent = disclaimerText;
      }

      // Already immediately after the anchor => done
      if (anchor.nextSibling === el) return;

      // Insert directly under the input/search block
      anchor.parentNode.insertBefore(el, anchor.nextSibling);
    }

    // Throttle observer callbacks (avoid hammering during SPA hydration)
    var scheduled = false;
    function scheduleEnsure() {
      if (scheduled) return;
      scheduled = true;
      requestAnimationFrame(function () {
        scheduled = false;
        ensureDisclaimer();
      });
    }

    // Initial attempt
    if (document.readyState === "loading") {
      document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", scheduleEnsure);
    } else {
      scheduleEnsure();
    }

    // Observe ONLY body (not documentElement) to detect Ask AI mount/unmount
    var bodyObserver = new MutationObserver(function () {
      scheduleEnsure();
    });

    // If body isn't ready yet, wait a tick
    function startObserver() {
      if (!document.body) return setTimeout(startObserver, 50);
      bodyObserver.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
    }
    startObserver();
  })();
</script>

<style>
  /* PNG icon swap (default -> hover) */
  #rm-scroll-top-btn .rm-stt-icon {
    position: relative;
    width: 21px;
    height: 24px;
    display: block;
  }
  #rm-scroll-top-btn .rm-stt-icon img {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    width: 21px;
    height: 24px;
    display: block;
    user-select: none;
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  #rm-scroll-top-btn .rm-stt-icon .rm-stt-hover {
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 120ms ease;
  }
  #rm-scroll-top-btn:hover .rm-stt-icon .rm-stt-hover { opacity: 1; }
  #rm-scroll-top-btn:hover .rm-stt-icon .rm-stt-default { opacity: 0; }
</style>

<script>
/**
 * Scroll-to-top button (ReadMe Refactored / transform-scroll safe)
 * ---------------------------------------------------------------
 * ✅ Hidden on load
 * ✅ Shows after FIRST scroll intent (wheel/touch/keys)
 * ✅ Hides again when user returns to TOP (using moving content marker baseline)
 * ✅ Click scrolls to TOP OF ENTIRE PAGE (tries parent/top too) + hides + resets
 * ✅ SPA-safe (re-injects if React removes)
 * ✅ Mobile-safe: detects inner scroll container + guards against scroll-persist fighting back
 */
(function () {
  "use strict";

  if (window.__rmScrollTopWorkingV3) return;
  window.__rmScrollTopWorkingV3 = true;

  var BTN_ID = "rm-scroll-top-btn";
  var STYLE_ID = "rm-scroll-top-btn-style";

  // ===== CONFIG =====
  var RIGHT_PX = 34;
  var BOTTOM_PX = 110; // adjust to sit above Ask AI
  var SIZE_PX = 64;
  var Z_INDEX = 999999;

  // How close to "baseline top" counts as being back at top
  var TOP_TOLERANCE_PX = 6;

  // How long after an input we keep checking (covers inertial scroll)
  var CHECK_WINDOW_MS = 1400;
  // ==================

  // Remove prior injected button/style (prevents duplicates across edits)
  try {
    var oldBtn = document.getElementById(BTN_ID);
    if (oldBtn && oldBtn.parentNode) oldBtn.parentNode.removeChild(oldBtn);
    var oldStyle = document.getElementById(STYLE_ID);
    if (oldStyle && oldStyle.parentNode) oldStyle.parentNode.removeChild(oldStyle);
  } catch (e) {}

  function ensureStyles() {
    if (document.getElementById(STYLE_ID)) return;

    var css = ""
      + "#" + BTN_ID + "{"
      + "  position: fixed;"
      + "  right: " + RIGHT_PX + "px;"
      + "  bottom: " + BOTTOM_PX + "px;"
      + "  width: " + SIZE_PX + "px;"
      + "  height: " + SIZE_PX + "px;"
      + "  border-radius: 9999px;"
      + "  border: 1px solid #EAEEF5;"
      + "  cursor: pointer;"
      + "  display: inline-flex;"
      + "  align-items: center;"
      + "  justify-content: center;"
      + "  z-index: " + Z_INDEX + ";"
      + "  background: #F2F5F5;"
      + "  box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);"
      + "  opacity: 0;"
      + "  transform: translateY(10px) scale(0.98);"
      + "  pointer-events: none;"
      + "  transition: opacity 180ms ease, transform 180ms ease, background-color 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease;"
      + "}"
      + "#" + BTN_ID + ".rm-visible{"
      + "  opacity: 1;"
      + "  transform: translateY(0) scale(1);"
      + "  pointer-events: auto;"
      + "}"
      + "#" + BTN_ID + ":hover{"
      + "  background: #E1F7E1;"
      + "  border-color: #7CCF83;"
      + "  box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);"
      + "}"
      + "#" + BTN_ID + ":active{"
      + "  transform: translateY(0) scale(0.98);"
      + "}"
      + "#" + BTN_ID + " .rm-stt-icon{"
      + "  position: relative;"
      + "  width: 21px;"
      + "  height: 24px;"
      + "  display: block;"
      + "}"
      + "#" + BTN_ID + " .rm-stt-icon img{"
      + "  position: absolute;"
      + "  inset: 0;"
      + "  width: 21px;"
      + "  height: 24px;"
      + "  display: block;"
      + "  user-select: none;"
      + "  pointer-events: none;"
      + "}"
      + "#" + BTN_ID + " .rm-stt-icon .rm-stt-hover{"
      + "  opacity: 0;"
      + "  transition: opacity 120ms ease;"
      + "}"
      + "#" + BTN_ID + ":hover .rm-stt-icon .rm-stt-hover{ opacity: 1; }"
      + "#" + BTN_ID + ":hover .rm-stt-icon .rm-stt-default{ opacity: 0; }"
      + "@media (max-width: 680px){"
      + "  #" + BTN_ID + "{ width: 58px; height: 58px; right: 16px; bottom: " + (BOTTOM_PX - 10) + "px; }"
      + "}";

    var style = document.createElement("style");
    style.id = STYLE_ID;
    style.appendChild(document.createTextNode(css));
    (document.head || document.documentElement).appendChild(style);
  }

  function ensureButton() {
    var btn = document.getElementById(BTN_ID);
    if (btn) return btn;

    btn = document.createElement("button");
    btn.id = BTN_ID;
    btn.type = "button";
    btn.setAttribute("aria-label", "Scroll to top");

    btn.innerHTML =
      '<span class="rm-stt-icon" aria-hidden="true">'
    +   '<img class="rm-stt-default" alt="" src="https://files.readme.io/0bbf3e525b8281fda28a473882453e61b7c7985256bd41edbe6a699445760daf-ScollTop_default.png" />'
    +   '<img class="rm-stt-hover" alt="" src="https://files.readme.io/2029662fcad677ec72ff5a5505d8a2c125aa11b84b08e917e377e583d5d15701-ScrollTop_hover.png" />'
    + '</span>';

    btn.addEventListener("click", function () {
      // Signal to scroll-persist (Additional.js) not to fight us
      window.__rmScrollToTopInProgress = true;

      goToTopEveryWay();
      hide();
      hasScrollIntent = false;

      // Clear the flag after all restore timers in Additional.js will have fired
      setTimeout(function () {
        window.__rmScrollToTopInProgress = false;
      }, 2000);
    });

    document.body.appendChild(btn);
    return btn;
  }

  function show() { ensureButton().classList.add("rm-visible"); }
  function hide() { ensureButton().classList.remove("rm-visible"); }

  // ===== Detect the actual scrolling container (mobile fix) =====
  function getScrollContainer() {
    var candidates = [
      document.querySelector('[data-testid="RDMD"]'),
      document.querySelector(".rm-Markdown"),
      document.querySelector(".content-body"),
      document.querySelector("main"),
      document.body
    ];
    for (var i = 0; i < candidates.length; i++) {
      var el = candidates[i];
      if (!el) continue;
      var parent = el.parentElement;
      while (parent && parent !== document.documentElement) {
        var style = window.getComputedStyle(parent);
        var overflow = style.overflow + style.overflowY;
        if (/auto|scroll/.test(overflow) && parent.scrollHeight > parent.clientHeight) {
          return parent;
        }
        parent = parent.parentElement;
      }
      break;
    }
    var se = document.scrollingElement || document.documentElement;
    return (se && se.scrollTop > 0) ? se : window;
  }

  // ===== Reliable "top" detection (NO scrollTop) =====
  var baselineTop = null;

  function getMarkerEl() {
    return (
      document.querySelector('[data-testid="RDMD"]') ||
      document.querySelector(".rm-Markdown[data-testid]") ||
      document.querySelector(".rm-Markdown") ||
      document.querySelector(".content-body") ||
      document.querySelector("#content-container") ||
      document.querySelector(".rm-Article") ||
      document.querySelector("main")
    );
  }

  function ensureBaseline() {
    if (baselineTop != null) return;
    var m = getMarkerEl();
    if (!m || !m.getBoundingClientRect) return;
    baselineTop = m.getBoundingClientRect().top;
  }

  function isAtTop() {
    ensureBaseline();
    if (baselineTop == null) return false;

    var m = getMarkerEl();
    if (!m || !m.getBoundingClientRect) return false;

    var curTop = m.getBoundingClientRect().top;
    return curTop >= (baselineTop - TOP_TOLERANCE_PX);
  }

  // ===== Scroll intent → show/hide logic =====
  var hasScrollIntent = false;

  function updateVisibility() {
    if (!hasScrollIntent) { hide(); return; }
    if (isAtTop()) hide();
    else show();
  }

  var rafActive = false;
  var rafUntil = 0;

  function tick() {
    if (!rafActive) return;
    updateVisibility();
    if (Date.now() < rafUntil) requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    else rafActive = false;
  }

  function onScrollIntent() {
    hasScrollIntent = true;
    rafUntil = Date.now() + CHECK_WINDOW_MS;
    if (!rafActive) { rafActive = true; requestAnimationFrame(tick); }
    updateVisibility();
  }

  function isScrollKey(e) {
    var k = e && (e.key || e.keyCode);
    return (
      k === "ArrowDown" || k === "ArrowUp" ||
      k === "PageDown" || k === "PageUp" ||
      k === "Home" || k === "End" ||
      k === " " ||
      k === 32 || k === 33 || k === 34 || k === 35 || k === 36 ||
      k === 38 || k === 40
    );
  }

  // ===== "Go to top" — try everything including inner scroll container =====
  function goToTopEveryWay() {
    var sc = getScrollContainer();

    // Scroll the detected inner container first (mobile fix)
    try {
      if (sc && sc !== window && typeof sc.scrollTo === "function") {
        sc.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: "smooth" });
        sc.scrollTop = 0;
      }
    } catch (e) {}

    // Desktop fallbacks (preserved from original)
    try { window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: "smooth" }); } catch (e) {}
    try { window.top.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: "smooth" }); } catch (e) {}
    try { window.parent.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: "smooth" }); } catch (e) {}

    try {
      var se = document.scrollingElement || document.documentElement || document.body;
      if (se && se.scrollTo) se.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: "smooth" });
      if (se) se.scrollTop = 0;
    } catch (e) {}

    try {
      var header =
        document.querySelector(".rm-Header") ||
        document.querySelector("[class*='rm-Header']") ||
        document.querySelector("header");
      if (header && header.scrollIntoView) header.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "start" });
    } catch (e) {}

    try { window.scrollTo(0, 0); } catch (e) {}
  }

  function init() {
    ensureStyles();
    ensureButton();
    hide();
    ensureBaseline();

    // Desktop listeners (window-level)
    window.addEventListener("wheel",      onScrollIntent, { passive: true, capture: true });
    window.addEventListener("touchmove",  onScrollIntent, { passive: true, capture: true });
    window.addEventListener("touchstart", onScrollIntent, { passive: true, capture: true });
    window.addEventListener("keydown", function (e) { if (isScrollKey(e)) onScrollIntent(); }, true);

    // Mobile fix: also listen on the inner scroll container if it differs from window
    var sc = getScrollContainer();
    if (sc && sc !== window) {
      sc.addEventListener("scroll",    onScrollIntent, { passive: true });
      sc.addEventListener("touchmove", onScrollIntent, { passive: true });
    }

    // SPA-safe: if React swaps content and baseline changes, refresh baseline
    var mo = new MutationObserver(function () {
      ensureStyles();
      ensureButton();
      baselineTop = null;
      ensureBaseline();
      updateVisibility();
    });
    mo.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
  }

  if (document.readyState === "loading") {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", init, { once: true });
  } else {
    init();
  }
})();
</script>


<script>
  /**************************************
   * Async Consent (Transcend Airgap)
   * - SPA-safe "Cookie Settings" click handler (event delegation)
   * - Idempotent guards
   * - Exposes: window.jfrogConsent.addAirgapCallback(fn) + window.jfrogConsent.getConsent()
   *
   * Patch (prevents "random" image/src stripping):
   * - Sets data-unknown-request-policy="allow" so unclassified asset hosts (e.g., images/CDN)
   *   don't get request-regulated and have src/srcset neutered.
   * - Optional: hard-disable request regulation via data-protect="off" (commented).
   **************************************/
  (function () {
    "use strict";

    window.jfrogConsent = window.jfrogConsent || {};
    window.jfrogConsent.callbacks = window.jfrogConsent.callbacks || [];

    // Register callbacks that run once airgap is ready
    window.jfrogConsent.addAirgapCallback = function (callback) {
      if (typeof callback !== "function") {
        try { console.warn("Provided callback is not a function:", callback); } catch (e) {}
        return;
      }

      if (window.airgap && typeof window.airgap.getConsent === "function") {
        callback();
        return;
      }

      window.jfrogConsent.callbacks.push(callback);
    };

    // Preview/iframe guard (keeps production behavior, reduces preview flakiness)
    var isFramePreview = (location.search || "").indexOf("isFramePreview=true") !== -1;
    var isInIframe = false;
    try { isInIframe = window.self !== window.top; } catch (e) { isInIframe = true; }

    var BUNDLE_ID = "f0071674-c641-4cf3-9d31-303ec0c86b1b";

    function defineGetConsent() {
      window.jfrogConsent.getConsent = function () {
        if (window.airgap && typeof window.airgap.getConsent === "function") {
          var consent = window.airgap.getConsent() || {};
          var purposes = consent.purposes || {};
          return {
            functional: purposes.Functional === true,
            analytics: purposes.Analytics === true,
            advertising: purposes.Advertising === true,
            saleOfInfo: purposes.SaleOfInfo === true
          };
        }

        try { console.warn("airgap.getConsent is not available."); } catch (e) {}
        return {
          functional: false,
          analytics: false,
          advertising: false,
          saleOfInfo: false
        };
      };
    }

    // Ensure a stable shape even before airgap loads
    if (typeof window.jfrogConsent.getConsent !== "function") defineGetConsent();

    function runCallbacks() {
      var list = window.jfrogConsent.callbacks || [];
      for (var i = 0; i < list.length; i++) {
        try { if (typeof list[i] === "function") list[i](); } catch (e) {}
      }
    }

    // Load airgap.js (idempotent)
    function loadAirgap() {
      if (document.getElementById("__jfrog_airgap_script")) return;

      var script = document.createElement("script");
      script.id = "__jfrog_airgap_script";
      script.type = "text/javascript";
      script.src = "https://transcend-cdn.com/cm/" + BUNDLE_ID + "/airgap.js";
      script.async = true;
      script.defer = true;

      // Cloudflare directive
      script.setAttribute("data-cfasync", "false");

      // IMPORTANT: prevent "unknown host" request regulation from stripping image src/srcset
      // (best long-term fix is still classifying your image/CDN domains in Transcend,
      //  but this stops the breakage immediately.)
      script.setAttribute("data-unknown-request-policy", "allow");

      // Optional emergency hammer (NOT recommended unless you must):
      // Disables request regulation entirely (stops DOM URL stripping, but weakens enforcement)
      // script.setAttribute("data-protect", "off");

      // Overrides + language
      script.dataset.trackerOverrides =
        "GoogleConsentMode:security_storage=on;ad_storage=SaleOfInfo,Advertising;ad_user_data=SaleOfInfo,Advertising;ad_personalization=SaleOfInfo,Advertising;analytics_storage=Analytics,SaleOfInfo;functionality_storage=Functional,SaleOfInfo;personalization_storage=Functional,SaleOfInfo";
      script.dataset.languages = "en";

      script.addEventListener("error", function (evt) {
        try { console.error("Failed to load airgap.js:", evt); } catch (e) {}
      });

      (document.head || document.documentElement).appendChild(script);
    }

    // Stub airgap.ready queue if not present (so callbacks can register)
    if (!window.airgap || typeof window.airgap.ready !== "function") {
      window.airgap = window.airgap || {};
      window.airgap.readyQueue = window.airgap.readyQueue || [];
      window.airgap.ready = function (cb) {
        window.airgap.readyQueue.push(cb);
      };
    }

    // If we're in iframe preview, skip loading the external script (optional safety)
    // Cookie settings click handler below still works when transcend is available.
    if (!(isFramePreview || isInIframe)) {
      loadAirgap();
    }

    // When airgap becomes ready, define consent helper + run callbacks
    try {
      window.airgap.ready(function () {
        defineGetConsent();
        runCallbacks();
      });
    } catch (e) {}

    // SPA-safe Cookie Settings handler (event delegation) — bind once
    if (!window.__jfrogCookieSettingsBound) {
      window.__jfrogCookieSettingsBound = true;

      document.addEventListener(
        "click",
        function (e) {
          var link = e.target && e.target.closest ? e.target.closest("#cookie_settings") : null;
          if (!link) return;

          // Prevent "#" jump / URL mutation
          e.preventDefault();

          if (window.transcend && typeof window.transcend.showConsentManager === "function") {
            window.transcend.showConsentManager({ viewState: "CompleteOptions" });
            return;
          }

          try { console.warn("Transcend consent manager is not available."); } catch (err) {}
        },
        true
      );
    }
  })();
</script>


<style>
@media (min-width: 768px) and (max-width: 1320px) {
  .rm-Header-search .rm-SearchToggle {
    width: 100px !important;
    padding: 0 14px !important;
    gap: 8px !important;
    height: 40px !important;
  }

.rm-Header-search .rm-SearchToggle-placeholder::after {
        content: "Search";
        position: absolute;
        left: 0;
        top: 0;
        color: #111111 !important;
        font-weight: 400 !important;
  }

button#rmps-trigger {
    max-width: 200px !important;

  }
  }

@media (max-width: 1120px) {
    .Header-leftADQdGVqx1wqU {
        display: none;
    }
}
